[**July 10****, 1962:** Telstar 1 launched, marking a significant milestone in electronic communications. As the first communications satellite, it paved the way for transmitting live television signals and telephone conversations across the Atlantic Ocean. [**July 10****, 1965:** British rock band the Rolling Stones topped U.S. charts for the first time with the single (I Can't Get No) Satisfaction. The song reached the number one spot on the Billboard Hot 100, solidifying the band's success and impact on the music industry. "Satisfaction" became a timeless classic that propelled The Rolling Stones to new heights of fame.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=728c69e4aa424dc19779ef9c6bfc9c32&_e=GZ6RqkU88YjeouQswTYBb4elWjsr3AyrBYac2i9sX3h34iG650aUem-8NXu39qMp6QL3q1OGlEBOcdGgmTcALzRaBUMV7VxDWTIY5LYXfectIjmA-Zrbb4pOUgQPz6atWAYRoI0GzwSibVVjgIZV8RcB1cz0xyL3yjcrXRjbFUxS1tpvrZ4DW2r5k-ncxVbw_FTKaERsgrMtKNsLZP7QYTcFY2TrulbYWuRI4mZfxMJ_E47l8wsWU9hexQyDrtgMaxzRKWQDAdA5Cf1Z-bQfwA%3D%3D) **Source -[bestclassicbands.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=728c69e4aa424dc19779ef9c6bfc9c32&_e=GZ6RqkU88YjeouQswTYBb4elWjsr3AyrBYac2i9sX3h34iG650aUem-8NXu39qMp6QL3q1OGlEBOcdGgmTcALzRaBUMV7VxDWTIY5LYXfectIjmA-Zrbb4pOUgQPz6atWhEA9U9CWJlnTSoeeRDa2ouJuRjHz3xwwrXMBou9MsM8iI0NdC8gjDpj7BQV6V9Vt56L6AWMqyJss0KBFl8XupW_d3fUGA3NfC8PwJ4y1Dy7qyQY9sYF7OA1IfYh0WyPhMuNxMWED7HmYRADyzS00g%3D%3D)**

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: Why are you doing this?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=eb1c9f14a95f40df917cc40401fb25b1&_t=5amWheMFGBj8OUtmGYU-N9XFN3LhbzX5HCfeRiHLLeEE-4dSQ5c1D0YUl9KoPOe6R2126NyWjaVe4jfdyhsUwzH6pojFjZU1AhP-6CI-yno%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=eb1c9f14a95f40df917cc40401fb25b1&_t=5amWheMFGBj8OUtmGYU-N9XFN3LhbzX5HCfeRiHLLeEE-4dSQ5c1D0YUl9KoPOe6R2126NyWjaVe4jfdyhsUwzH6pojFjZU1AhP-6CI-yno%3D)
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=eb1c9f14a95f40df917cc40401fb25b1&_e=yvACVdvsZ5rMmkwnbM1qGpubrSG289zoZB8iFxVxIxGvaadL7MrAtcuxGfd2l1VQcxEZeVt3g5YhVWIFQtZvcRE0BEfTAiuvmNx6t_TpD3QcQHPAAkoe_aIE3KKDV98Gt5VTFfP34SKA9cIxTgvpghG0DZLe5B8MSxhknOEtTNL4-FpYXe1iBrT-zYNsO4giB-UGRYhwoD8CiG1reEb1YRLQO5eSTfrXkAo1h7giQT4TZVmUn5_7OE-oYJnXS52S8k-Da5A7_fJ3jb4jThaG_ML_Mc1qN8kKRLL5_I35Eg6sLjnhXMsxXCdoTwDNfKtnu2DY8gXtlXN5Czka2s7WGX0KCjx58Si8q2k9YzRY_MqnPDsEoQ5d4jKq2mZqSfMX8fpsu4YG9IuIiML5XcqYNyaZmshtGMHBfdvX9n9u7T0%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, _**“why are you doing this?”**_

**Here is what I tell them:** it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. **I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America.**
**
When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track.

It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign on Tuesday. **

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=eb1c9f14a95f40df917cc40401fb25b1&_e=yvACVdvsZ5rMmkwnbM1qGpubrSG289zoZB8iFxVxIxGvaadL7MrAtcuxGfd2l1VQcxEZeVt3g5YhVWIFQtZvcRE0BEfTAiuvmNx6t_TpD3QcQHPAAkoe_aIE3KKDV98Gt5VTFfP34SKA9cIxTgvpghG0DZLe5B8MSxhknOEtTNL4-FpYXe1iBrT-zYNsO4giB-UGRYhwoD8CiG1reEb1YRLQO5eSTfrXkAo1h7giQT4TZVmUn5_7OE-oYJnXS52St_XP_wXkJH4v5nbnoYwbASUEiJhKqWCeLirmvHzoPDvOA93V_W_-xcaOrf9yUK5b_yZUot-px7vCud8rmlKqTzNhNB_wr0uhIs7V4JmL9WwmG8x4K5YkFuvHMB7C9y-F6uUdNl51qYcl2bzI2RFmXWJaduFdToP6e1X06p62sNI%3D)

[**FOR GOD AND COUNTRY
CHIP IN TODAY
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=eb1c9f14a95f40df917cc40401fb25b1&_e=yvACVdvsZ5rMmkwnbM1qGpubrSG289zoZB8iFxVxIxGvaadL7MrAtcuxGfd2l1VQcxEZeVt3g5YhVWIFQtZvcRE0BEfTAiuvmNx6t_TpD3QcQHPAAkoe_aIE3KKDV98Gt5VTFfP34SKA9cIxTgvpghG0DZLe5B8MSxhknOEtTNL4-FpYXe1iBrT-zYNsO4giB-UGRYhwoD8CiG1reEb1YRLQO5eSTfrXkAo1h7giQT4TZVmUn5_7OE-oYJnXS52SFo0PLCY-ZJHzyb2nE7ypDnK6b4Xsn-CqYOgqX4dXSUBR1PkSjZPK0A6Vjl5RYQLGygQjrS5N3rmnM58GJalPEHxEKGfHIInEShmJHCl0dR_X0u50H42-BaVlnRoglUWgV7vgiwWOFYW-td4zl6bm4_fW4WLRZfe-uZRtAugNReM%3D)
I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. **[If you’re able to chip in a few dollars](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=eb1c9f14a95f40df917cc40401fb25b1&_e=yvACVdvsZ5rMmkwnbM1qGpubrSG289zoZB8iFxVxIxGvaadL7MrAtcuxGfd2l1VQcxEZeVt3g5YhVWIFQtZvcRE0BEfTAiuvmNx6t_TpD3QcQHPAAkoe_aIE3KKDV98Gt5VTFfP34SKA9cIxTgvpghG0DZLe5B8MSxhknOEtTNL4-FpYXe1iBrT-zYNsO4giB-UGRYhwoD8CiG1reEb1YRLQO5eSTfrXkAo1h7giQT4TZVmUn5_7OE-oYJnXS52SgR12ThKX7rOCBrhtQMZi95NFZ3DBJZSCfTLQAzWaQDvrJrRkuTOLM8UnSam2akYUv12cJV3b5LcVX8Eq2MmyV09BvMpCvEHHThbQpUjyBCfdHjUMWGK7GwKz-HxsyS8tJIiJkPVYcQ3zh-PcVKKo7Wj_501-HV8cyA8mJKnlmFk%3D)** before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground.

I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. Our campaign is about service, God, and country, not politics as usual.

Hooyah,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=eb1c9f14a95f40df917cc40401fb25b1&_e=yvACVdvsZ5rMmkwnbM1qGpubrSG289zoZB8iFxVxIxGvaadL7MrAtcuxGfd2l1VQcxEZeVt3g5YhVWIFQtZvcRE0BEfTAiuvmNx6t_TpD3QcQHPAAkoe_aIE3KKDV98Gt5VTFfP34SKA9cIxTgvpghG0DZLe5B8MSxhknOEtTNL4-FpYXe1iBrT-zYNsO4giB-UGRYhwoD8CiG1reEb1YRLQO5eSTfrXkAo1h7giQT4TZVmUn5_7OE-oYJnXS52STAFC6vnuXmWsUut9_lxvyGDdJB4vUIKDJPljS1AANQlVflO5Q6On2VH9y2vetYmLusiUdH4KMQteqqarKm4Agdu5RP8yux0cpx2QOWooQUmvdK4beyEi7lxD-k5omX7jLb-knH0GFamuCekovfcfh8nx2TrJx0BmPG8ZSkcSx2M%3D)
Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**SEND IN THE SEAL
CHIP IN TODAY **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=eb1c9f14a95f40df917cc40401fb25b1&_e=yvACVdvsZ5rMmkwnbM1qGpubrSG289zoZB8iFxVxIxGvaadL7MrAtcuxGfd2l1VQcxEZeVt3g5YhVWIFQtZvcRE0BEfTAiuvmNx6t_TpD3QcQHPAAkoe_aIE3KKDV98Gt5VTFfP34SKA9cIxTgvpghG0DZLe5B8MSxhknOEtTNL4-FpYXe1iBrT-zYNsO4giB-UGRYhwoD8CiG1reEb1YRLQO5eSTfrXkAo1h7giQT4TZVmUn5_7OE-oYJnXS52Sbq5ej7IZaw83ZGDBgaJbV_m4GSGZOEWsc1DTUaO6kn8lDmJAYDvaWaQngf66qTSVUoztRaXdhgNcdPhYUQPO-VYgjC7k7hnV6aJFVjqAiGi7-EML-A1wT7DO1C27nQbjLIQk0SeiDUd80byPAOpKYWwHGlHAh4uz25_Y4mrRaDQ%3D)

|

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

clean_body: I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. | | Fellow Conservative, I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, “why are you doing this?” Here is what I tell them: it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America. When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track. It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign on Tuesday. I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground. I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. Our campaign is about service, God, and country, not politics as usual. Hooyah, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:

Peter, After the latest round of decisions from our nation’s highest court, Democrats are doubling down on their attacks on the Supreme Court. _Here are 3 of the worst..._
1. **Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez** is calling to subpoena Chief Justice Roberts to appear before the Senate Judiciary Committee for a public scolding, bellowing of a “dangerous authoritarian expansion of power in the Supreme Court” and threatening that she has “ _[**impeachment on the table**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=03ee07ec65b64fa59591246e227b5059&_e=ClGxmh6LPscj6ppQwt5q4v2DUVIZyieq_mwCY5FXmg0aI72c9I6iGeLIIiCDfU7Dj5y4FUWOXCud48njZIZ0tEqlqj7ATc0y9Dyd9Piv1ND7coAzozRL0muePiQ0BwFb5SWzt7qtvdlZczSdzdT9lVXZ6vDNDWamymGvp28iel2pZj2PCtqcWdNRxABBpF7xCAGJr_6uZgB2C9PhR5GKilIbso-kWyQ8vdxGOs4bZv_wQ9W5XKKFeI8j__176pHccVuQTVHaOawUJegnRyR00KAf7Rclga43SKcfOHCb5SGKkbkmkxtgbMeFE82AEgLxruRSViiLUCX_r6M1p_B2JR92Hpa7k_fSk9giOwUBVpX-zWzM_wxuVQ8GW2j4utoaj70cmVTX9i5yfWiOAkRqcA%3D%3D)_.”

2. When the Court declared**Joe Biden’s** student loan bailout “unconstitutional,” he roared that “the Court misinterpreted the Constitution”... and insisted that “this is not a normal court.”

3. And **Chuck Schumer** pledged “a sustained effort to rebalance our federal courts.”

---
[**STOP THEM FROM DESTROYING THE COURT**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=03ee07ec65b64fa59591246e227b5059&_e=ClGxmh6LPscj6ppQwt5q4v2DUVIZyieq_mwCY5FXmg0aI72c9I6iGeLIIiCDfU7Dj5y4FUWOXCud48njZIZ0tEqlqj7ATc0y9Dyd9Piv1ND7coAzozRL0muePiQ0BwFb5SWzt7qtvdlZczSdzdT9lVXZ6vDNDWamymGvp28iel2pZj2PCtqcWdNRxABBpF7xCAGJr_6uZgB2C9PhR5GKilIbso-kWyQ8vdxGOs4bZv_wQ9W5XKKFeI8j__176pHcPt5gkjorg4oZygYn_W8jWdbV5cVTFJOSX3AXcRPyMWHOmDfXSdMWSlvezgPO3XUIfaJER-nM5DcF0Y7cMmpMGbxBHwBYPe102dp1bwi1UngNBjlSCdc1shjUL0yEzTTgTaPhWdOOUB2QhAlVVMPw6Q%3D%3D)
---
**Here’s the truth:****The judicial branch is the last check we have against the power grabs of the far left...and progressive radicals are ENRAGED when someone reminds them that laws need to be constitutional.** Remember the last time there were major Supreme Court decisions the Left disagreed with? We saw:
* _Riots..._
* _Protests at justice’s houses..._
* _Even death threats!_

The Capitol Police have already apprehended one person leaving a suspicious package on the steps of the Supreme Court after June’s wave of progressive defeats in Court. _We must put an end to this madness. We must protect the court and its independence from the Left's agenda._ _[Fair Courts America](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=03ee07ec65b64fa59591246e227b5059&_e=ClGxmh6LPscj6ppQwt5q4v2DUVIZyieq_mwCY5FXmg0aI72c9I6iGeLIIiCDfU7Dj5y4FUWOXCud48njZIZ0tEqlqj7ATc0y9Dyd9Piv1ND7coAzozRL0muePiQ0BwFb5SWzt7qtvdlZczSdzdT9lVXZ6vDNDWamymGvp28iel2pZj2PCtqcWdNRxABBpF7xCAGJr_6uZgB2C9PhR5GKilIbso-kWyQ8vdxGOs4bZv_wQ9W5XKKFeI8j__176pHcKBPOdVrY_14N2dukJXj5koU8x4Wq3vdnX4OafA1mTQ8v5Fv-DEVLGqmbLKm3cTNwnR-mtQu9LF_NZA29aMENovr1CBt564hqBk89f_Aj6tykXJmAwxxTnzdkef169umNqrtTYROUlB3oTJJimi4o9A%3D%3D)_ was founded to protect the freedom and fairness of our judicial system. **That means keeping the radicals away from our country's highest court.** We are tracking the woke mob’s activity and ready to fight for our courts at every level of our government — but we can’t do it without you.** ** **_We’re calling on all patriots to donate to the Court Defense Fund today! _** **— DONATE NOW —**

---

Peter,

At the end of June, while thousands were still celebrating Pride month, the Supreme Court ruled that businesses have the right to refuse service to LGBTQ+ customers.

This decision to allow discrimination towards members of the LGBTQ+ community is wrong. Kim knows it’s long past time we ensure all Americans have the same protections under the laws – and it’s time for Congress to take action.

**House Democrats just reintroduced the Equality Act, which would explicitly outlaw any discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation or gender identity nationwide.**

Kim has been proud to support the Equality Act since she was first sworn into office, and it’s past time for both chambers of Congress to pass this landmark legislation.

clean_body: House Democrats just reintroduced the Equality Act, which would explicitly outlaw any discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation or gender identity nationwide. "Supreme Court rules businesses can refuse service to LGBTQ+ customers" | Peter, At the end of June, while thousands were still celebrating Pride month, the Supreme Court ruled that businesses have the right to refuse service to LGBTQ+ customers. This decision to allow discrimination towards members of the LGBTQ+ community is wrong. Kim knows it’s long past time we ensure all Americans have the same protections under the laws – and it’s time for Congress to take action. House Democrats just reintroduced the Equality Act, which would explicitly outlaw any discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation or gender identity nationwide. Kim has been proud to support the Equality Act since she was first sworn into office, and it’s past time for both chambers of Congress to pass this landmark legislation. Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. But if President Trump wins, power will be restored to its only rightful place - with YOU, the American people. | Thank you, Team Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown — I’m a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, [**a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9e7201132a894caca66bec8372627a24&_e=ty2jmWxyGiZGNunI8Fg75kHdaNM00C8XyxQesmKEbvRGJ2FzmOettZZAHljrSjvqi6HCeefaaB_xCTTGoazhnrcWZ8GSEbtuHaOfZQBUzcUdEyDP8OUD4068Tgbl97K4kW9o1OadCJKPIWBs-kEnpF0cFovl3RX2udtsoHBqykEFjzROZqfbJRiML5KhusX6HvrGz8YQ5S8HW4NwbSfU-Y5deNCqvz7cvKK8JcG16jdoIr2BejaGRyG6rvq8pg9LMRpaW5sXYjo2M-872uAopXdRoqWj4VOiB1NCoEtBW7oc6VaBsp9yS9TrTTDfpLjJE-TVUrr_nkM9UYFbk6xSAsde9ZwgjF4Q5p-PhPHVDcdL4JcG6uuUK3cAPrhxUihLIBS9zholzHYDBOrwZp7ZTXf9D-MaGSpaNgoaOfqniE0%3D) [**While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb detonated below the gas tank of my vehicle.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9e7201132a894caca66bec8372627a24&_e=ty2jmWxyGiZGNunI8Fg75kHdaNM00C8XyxQesmKEbvRGJ2FzmOettZZAHljrSjvqi6HCeefaaB_xCTTGoazhnrcWZ8GSEbtuHaOfZQBUzcUdEyDP8OUD4068Tgbl97K4kW9o1OadCJKPIWBs-kEnpF0cFovl3RX2udtsoHBqykEFjzROZqfbJRiML5KhusX6HvrGz8YQ5S8HW4NwbSfU-Y5deNCqvz7cvKK8JcG16jdoIr2BejaGRyG6rvq8pg9LMRpaW5sXYjo2M-872uAopba6FBBe8QPsboVuRWfWj90A-sBLl9GihqeNr3ic-7p4c5fe6F5KJqpN7aB8nZCYRsrYrOHkcRRrUqNUPN0L_VXSdDd96zjwtmvGc8zJiNZKlEnD96VoCyedEcgGr-zsi9LByg7MHYuIlYtR3bssfyg%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9e7201132a894caca66bec8372627a24&_e=ty2jmWxyGiZGNunI8Fg75kHdaNM00C8XyxQesmKEbvRGJ2FzmOettZZAHljrSjvqi6HCeefaaB_xCTTGoazhnrcWZ8GSEbtuHaOfZQBUzcUdEyDP8OUD4068Tgbl97K4kW9o1OadCJKPIWBs-kEnpF0cFovl3RX2udtsoHBqykEFjzROZqfbJRiML5KhusX6HvrGz8YQ5S8HW4NwbSfU-Y5deNCqvz7cvKK8JcG16jdoIr2BejaGRyG6rvq8pg9LMRpaW5sXYjo2M-872uAopY6ybbVc4S-NpWi_Qd6GVOOyCOGWOV56w7nHAobNNzGY2wnXkQY3W-9mWbb6VXkxVi-l4FYf5JHL-xLdx9mq6oMFFZGJEZVUhJ1WwBHTPVc7Bl3eh7x5HfkUsd_it5j4dOpD8BG1BrYJkZT4FS9Lcak%3D)
---
My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking “How long will it be before I burn to death?” But despite our enemy’s best efforts,**_I survived._** By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. **I truly shouldn’t be alive today.** For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I’ve ever learned: **_Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable._** That’s why every day since I nearly lost my life, I’ve dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. [**Friend, I’m telling you all this because I’m hoping that I can count on your financial support**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9e7201132a894caca66bec8372627a24&_e=ty2jmWxyGiZGNunI8Fg75kHdaNM00C8XyxQesmKEbvRGJ2FzmOettZZAHljrSjvqi6HCeefaaB_xCTTGoazhnrcWZ8GSEbtuHaOfZQBUzcUdEyDP8OUD4068Tgbl97K4kW9o1OadCJKPIWBs-kEnpF0cFovl3RX2udtsoHBqykEFjzROZqfbJRiML5KhusX6HvrGz8YQ5S8HW4NwbSfU-Y5deNCqvz7cvKK8JcG16jdoIr2BejaGRyG6rvq8pg9LMRpaW5sXYjo2M-872uAopXJJF1i16lzgOEZEb_YG-OIVoVJpz4K8pdELm0p1mAjz73wirHDuzsYdlXBrRS9a59yetwqbUUBQybc3sFynB2myc3VWzyE2cUW0OY3hLYqkA_eGarRxhlrnLopf08PNbCQ9QDC26frwd3cGRGLcTMM%3D) — but I don’t want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. **_The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. _**
---
[**SEND AN ARMY CAPTAIN TO THE SENATE**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9e7201132a894caca66bec8372627a24&_e=ty2jmWxyGiZGNunI8Fg75kHdaNM00C8XyxQesmKEbvRGJ2FzmOettZZAHljrSjvqi6HCeefaaB_xCTTGoazhnrcWZ8GSEbtuHaOfZQBUzcUdEyDP8OUD4068Tgbl97K4kW9o1OadCJKPIWBs-kEnpF0cFovl3RX2udtsoHBqykEFjzROZqfbJRiML5KhusX6HvrGz8YQ5S8HW4NwbSfU-Y5deNCqvz7cvKK8JcG16jdoIr2BejaGRyG6rvq8pg9LMRpaW5sXYjo2M-872uAopTWoiTKlUjiJWuMhPmvTYcMjI66pGfYyYIv3jMZdM-AbGQHaX5ZWZh6wq5zdBMjJbfJtuZRMkD5ljNIChirXSNXMYzPe-aA4mu10sMJB9yQvHvepYavMrJcOxFoC-vOzAUzDmAanT59jrjSkU_AmVX0%3D)
---
Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there’s NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that’s worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. [**Can you help me out and chip in $10, 15, or even $25 so that I can continue serving our country?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9e7201132a894caca66bec8372627a24&_e=ty2jmWxyGiZGNunI8Fg75kHdaNM00C8XyxQesmKEbvRGJ2FzmOettZZAHljrSjvqi6HCeefaaB_xCTTGoazhnrcWZ8GSEbtuHaOfZQBUzcUdEyDP8OUD4068Tgbl97K4kW9o1OadCJKPIWBs-kEnpF0cFovl3RX2udtsoHBqykEFjzROZqfbJRiML5KhusX6HvrGz8YQ5S8HW4NwbSfU-Y5deNCqvz7cvKK8JcG16jdoIr2BejaGRyG6rvq8pg9LMRpaW5sXYjo2M-872uAopUkxxj6O3pdCAz14aCA-4-SZscYCRVBOTWxrEF5kBZ2RR_h1S2IkyvZSUskRwv0T2i5dx-GwJ6hD7p-unkR08z4HvydZAVMY8bmoMun8X6Je5DDRb-KOSrjW_glZFutoSJCed70VGEThHcETTZ9hEbo%3D) Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve — even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. [**Please, join my team today!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9e7201132a894caca66bec8372627a24&_e=ty2jmWxyGiZGNunI8Fg75kHdaNM00C8XyxQesmKEbvRGJ2FzmOettZZAHljrSjvqi6HCeefaaB_xCTTGoazhnrcWZ8GSEbtuHaOfZQBUzcUdEyDP8OUD4068Tgbl97K4kW9o1OadCJKPIWBs-kEnpF0cFovl3RX2udtsoHBqykEFjzROZqfbJRiML5KhusX6HvrGz8YQ5S8HW4NwbSfU-Y5deNCqvz7cvKK8JcG16jdoIr2BejaGRyG6rvq8pg9LMRpaW5sXYjo2M-872uAopabpY61Fzg9jaOzBq27el6Nhem9iTZGIT4OtQIgDLSbK_uCDVByxJSAacMOakVhOnl-8HAWmryoyY_9NhndWfAgWjX0IIGcx4KHB-yHL5TgUWsHNmEx4Mt5bn-h8zuAwOqZctJc4kgCRWvh0jyGzswM%3D) Duty First,

Friend,

I want to introduce you to two very important members of my team: Franklin and Walter, two dogs Connie and I rescued years ago.

We named them after President FDR and former UAW President Walter Reuther – two leaders who dedicated their lives to fighting for the Dignity of Work.
Look friend, I'm in the fight of my life to defend Ohio's battleground Senate seat. Experts at _CNN_ are calling me one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot, and if we lose here, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are virtually guaranteed to flip the Senate red.

**I'm running a grassroots campaign, which means I'm counting on folks like you to chip in $5 or $10 to help me stand up to the GOP's attacks – and WIN. name: Kimberly Peeler-Allen
subject: 10 a.m. call with AG James

body:
Peter, did you get AG James’ last message?

We’re just a couple days out from our _critical public filing deadline,_ and we’re STILL $13,582 short of our $20,000 goal. **If we don’t make up at least $2,583 of the difference by 10 a.m., I’ll have to tell Letitia that we’re not on track to meet her goal.**
---
Peter, we can’t let Letitia fall short. With our fundamental rights on the line and the largest special interests in the country watching to see if we falter, there’s NO room to lose momentum now. **Will you rush a donation to AG James’ campaign now?**
**Here’s the best link to give:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jamesforny-23](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66294954/415907347/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1121-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzZjODFmMC04NDFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ude-C7Ghv6Bf8TSgJAS2y0dldSv8XC6pSwzWjaOi7X0=)**
Thank you for being a part of this team,
Kimberly Peeler-Allen

Senior Advisor

Peter, I'm facing a major PUBLIC filing deadline on Thursday, and I'm humbly asking for your help.
I've said it before: Asking for money is my _least_ favorite part of running a campaign. But if I don't, I won't have the resources to continue standing up for you and hold corporations and special-interest groups accountable for their actions.

clean_body: | | | | STOP Jamie McLeod-Skinner Peter, our former opponent just launched her campaign. We need all hands on deck to STOP her misguided agenda! Let me be absolutely clear: we are facing a fierce competitor who is not afraid to push the boundaries of radical left policies. In our last race, she managed to outraise us by over a million dollars... We can't let this happen again. | | | | Without your support, she may out-fundraise us - furthering her extreme radical agenda Team Lori | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Team Lori 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

name: Hilary Franz
subject: Anti-choice extremist enters the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D)
body:
Here’s the truth: Reichert is an anti-choice extremist who voted in line with Trump 92.5% of the time when he was in the House.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66298538/415916730/759276572?refcode=BP_Dave%20Reichert|X|X_Actives_HFFG-20230710-1_FR_CO_N&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTRjYjg3NDUtODkxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3u-g0LGRY6lf_ylwrWKU6c9wB848fBmW5eSlpw1a7WY=)

| Peter, **This past week, Republican Dave Reichert entered the race for governor, and pundits are calling him “the most prominent Republican to campaign for the position in more than a decade.”** Here’s the truth: Reichert is an anti-choice extremist who voted in line with Trump 92.5% of the time when he was in the House. **His vote to criminalize abortion is one that really stands out to me.** As the only woman running for governor of either party, I am the only candidate who intimately and personally understands this issue. I know the physical, psychological, and emotional toll that extremist attacks on our bodily autonomy can have. Frankly, I won’t stand for it. I have a plan to ensure that reproductive rights are never restricted, only expanded, in the state of Washington – both for Washington women and for women in neighboring states. My executive experience means I know how to execute a plan, especially when the stakes are this high. If you believe that Washington deserves a reproductive justice champion, who personally understands the issue, I hope you will join our team today. [_**With a contribution of just $5 today, you can ensure our team has the necessary resources to beat Republican anti-choice extremism and keep reproductive rights safe in Washington. **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66298540/415916731/-165497492?refcode=BP_Dave%20Reichert|X|X_Actives_HFFG-20230710-1_FR_CO_N&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTRjYjg3NDUtODkxZi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3u-g0LGRY6lf_ylwrWKU6c9wB848fBmW5eSlpw1a7WY=)

subject: we need you on our team, Peter

name: checking in (VPP)
subject: did you miss our email?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we can’t believe you don't support President Biden
| Did you miss our urgent petition we shared with you the other day??

The Supreme Court and the entire Republican mob have been attacking President Biden non-stop — **jeopardizing his agenda from student loan relief to LGBTQ+ rights and so much more.**

We were hoping loyal Democrats like you would rush to Biden’s defense...but when we checked this morning, **_your signature was missing!_**

Surely this can’t be right, so we’re giving you until MIDNIGHT tonight to sign our petition and stand with President Biden! [**Please, add your name now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230710_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=6&akid=9090%2E878179%2EvSqrfh) | [**YOUR SIGNATURE NEEDED: SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH PRESIDENT BIDEN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230710_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=7&akid=9090%2E878179%2EvSqrfh)
---
Thank you so much! We’ve attached the original email below for your reference.

The Voter Protection Project
**–BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE–**

FROM: SIGNATURE REQUEST (protectvoting.org)
SL: President Biden needs your help
**🚨 PLEASE DON’T SCROLL AWAY! 🚨** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230710_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=8&akid=9090%2E878179%2EvSqrfh) | [**ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND WITH PRESIDENT BIDEN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230710_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=9&akid=9090%2E878179%2EvSqrfh)
---
Far-right Supreme Court Justices like Brett Kavanaugh, Clarence Thomas, and Amy Coney Barrett just issued HUGE blows to President Biden’s agenda:

**❌ DESTROYED Biden’s student debt relief plan ❌
❌ OBLITERATED LGBTQ+ rights ❌
❌ ENDED affirmative action in higher education ❌**
[**The Court’s MAGA majority will do WHATEVER it takes to ruin ALL of Biden’s priorities — so we need 5,000 loyal Democrats to defend him from these attacks! Add your name by our MIDNIGHT deadline to show your support for President Biden »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230710_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=10&akid=9090%2E878179%2EvSqrfh)
[**I STAND WITH PRESIDENT BIDEN! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230710_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=11&akid=9090%2E878179%2EvSqrfh)
---
Thanks so much for stepping up,

_VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9090%2E878179%2EvSqrfh). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9090%2E878179%2EvSqrfh).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9090%2E878179%2EvSqrfh) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=9090%2E878179%2EvSqrfh). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=9090%2E878179%2EvSqrfh)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=9090%2E878179%2EvSqrfh)

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: My campaign is about service, God, and country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
When your country calls and needs you, you answer. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=8ec584d806a64cbb896cf5e0f1da2eff&_t=0ZLm2hEYwZJ0J2deJYE4SgQ4qWHxRU036VnWGY4XdyOAf-NvfuJcOXroUHY973c5PykaO6DlpUFEELAKE1OSkqp_1ZWe3FsixwpXGXTpLv0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=8ec584d806a64cbb896cf5e0f1da2eff&_t=0ZLm2hEYwZJ0J2deJYE4SgQ4qWHxRU036VnWGY4XdyOAf-NvfuJcOXroUHY973c5PykaO6DlpUFEELAKE1OSkqp_1ZWe3FsixwpXGXTpLv0%3D)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8ec584d806a64cbb896cf5e0f1da2eff&_e=JiRsA7tLaNTJq9hpVof_PYGfuOxYWoyh--v9yAjNykQXJHeu7K0UqgALK-IpiKpViBfsqc8z4JHJzbrxkC-oIxcOtBFJcelt2uMLqvCz-EZJR3tahgmdlT5MXN74fm2r1j4GUYAGb1Qd8p5rIhYSoHYBOBhpJ_DpTCXuJhSDjPrgrrh3c-4rR1NvURQ10qPbiAdNveFSAiYSXgcyLL74PPiHXxSHm8X0GBGYpcoEJW1bHLaBS34IGAF8R9HjroNABx7BhZg67ajdzBzT5TZfme3EGpXd4h6JgI98tcievinRocHyMbTlgttd57u70izwlNIcm7jgIUkOjHhU61wNnt5-o93mJrD1b9ZjoK2Chbr6wavSlw7LksZDprnA2loFrlrie3oLCn8y5L9tIu-nCNT2WDkRobUrLvsxd3KZTF0%3D)

Peter,

I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, _**“why are you doing this?”**_

**Here is what I tell them:** it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. **I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America.**
**
When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track.

It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign on Tuesday. **

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8ec584d806a64cbb896cf5e0f1da2eff&_e=JiRsA7tLaNTJq9hpVof_PYGfuOxYWoyh--v9yAjNykQXJHeu7K0UqgALK-IpiKpViBfsqc8z4JHJzbrxkC-oIxcOtBFJcelt2uMLqvCz-EZJR3tahgmdlT5MXN74fm2r1j4GUYAGb1Qd8p5rIhYSoHYBOBhpJ_DpTCXuJhSDjPrgrrh3c-4rR1NvURQ10qPbiAdNveFSAiYSXgcyLL74PPiHXxSHm8X0GBGYpcoEJW1bHLaBS34IGAF8R9HjroNA3QM6vPhar6wWzfmXaTOJhVJy_YPLY3uGY8fUy8vxPmPjARfEMKdZafnaQog184wTDLBZ9PCTpgxrKMU0pybTItiS81BVx6VvBO8OJwqy9HrRGEyobMq5aV1nozqWG8PTHPKQLsitjOv7eSh-56y96_KRFCgR44G2T8H39LYIt3w%3D)

[**FOR GOD AND COUNTRY
CHIP IN TODAY
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8ec584d806a64cbb896cf5e0f1da2eff&_e=JiRsA7tLaNTJq9hpVof_PYGfuOxYWoyh--v9yAjNykQXJHeu7K0UqgALK-IpiKpViBfsqc8z4JHJzbrxkC-oIxcOtBFJcelt2uMLqvCz-EZJR3tahgmdlT5MXN74fm2r1j4GUYAGb1Qd8p5rIhYSoHYBOBhpJ_DpTCXuJhSDjPrgrrh3c-4rR1NvURQ10qPbiAdNveFSAiYSXgcyLL74PPiHXxSHm8X0GBGYpcoEJW1bHLaBS34IGAF8R9HjroNAptw2sN9O8rRSXnbijkzecBmKIHYwfbwrC0zg7E1gTcF9eTp12n7ex60C5D1XUA49O4Fl0oGX55PJhW4EaVrlsbZmye8cE9EvJt0joT_kVQF0lZ88-6D3N0KS060CCtd5z7xX0UoP9Dl93dhGdcMRCMApPlByTLxNAr4Kd8y6voA%3D)
I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. clean_body: When your country calls and needs you, you answer. | | Peter, I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, “why are you doing this?” Here is what I tell them: it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America. When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track. It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign on Tuesday. I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground. I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. Our campaign is about service, God, and country, not politics as usual. I find it easier to be worried rather than complacent. Why's that? Because I am inevitably wrong, and I prefer to be surprised positively. I'd rather be concerned about something that doesn't happen than to be shocked by unexpected developments. It's in that spirit that I offer three of the biggest global risks I see on the horizon, each of which has the potential to upend the world as we know it. While I can't comment on their likelihoods, I firmly believe these three (interconnected) developments will define the geopolitical, technology, and economic landscape over the next few decades.
The reason I chose these three risks is their timelines: each of the topics below has the potential to catalyze massively disruptive developments in the weeks and months ahead, creating ripples that will impact our world for decades. This is not to suggest that other gigantic global risks (such as climate change, inequality-driven social unrest, migration pressures, uncontrolled biotechnology, etc.) are not worthy of our attention, but rather that the following three risks appear more immediate.
### **US-CHINA WAR**
Unsurprisingly, at the very top on my list is the **escalating US-China war, the single most important geopolitical dynamic in the world today**. I have explicitly used the word "war" rather than "rivalry" or "competition" to express the belief that the United States and its allies are, like it or not, already in the midst of a _de facto_ war with China. Sure, it hasn't turned kinetic, but it is a conflict with many fronts--a trade war, a currency war, a space race, an arms race, a technology war, and ultimately, a war of values. Don't be fooled by rhetoric that suggests we are merely in a competition.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0cc7a211-0bde-45f3-9928-00d60f7fde8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
One of my earliest mentors who had a huge impact on my thinking [was Ambassador James Lilley](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/58b32a51-7e90-4d6c-b89d-3fe77ebd0577?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), who was America's top diplomat in China during the Tiananmen Square massacre. I had the honor of being an intern for him at the American Enterprise Institute for the summers of 1993 and 1994. Among the many pearls of wisdoms he shared during the course of my two summers helping him was his strong belief that actions speak louder than words, and that in order to understand China, we need to study their actions, not their words.
Doing so is telling. The Chinese Communist Party (CCP) assured the Obama administration that it [would not militarize the South China Sea](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5b750c62-b19b-4c5f-95e3-9bae71d68861?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but its actions tell a different story: [it has built military bases on newly-created islands](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7b421db4-c137-4bf9-b09d-47be224330b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The CCP stated the education camps in East Turkestan are there to help keep China safe, but [investigations by Amnesty International reveal concentration camps](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/afd06ae3-5298-4082-b6c8-47498b5f2b38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) seeking to exterminate Uyghur and Kazakh culture within Xinjiang, leading the American government to call the situation a genocide. And let's not forget the CCP expressions of support for climate change mitigation efforts, while its actions include [frenetic building of coal-fired power plants](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c974ea3a-bab4-4467-9df9-90b0ef771264?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..T1AkmLJWrrgcMiMoRxqikWvfo7mkrwiNGxZs0qFdIUM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=127912131)
There are many aspects of this US-China War that I will explore in future commentary, but for now, let's focus on Chinese expansionism. What is the likelihood and timeline of a [potential reunification effort with Taiwan](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8292ddec-add9-4e36-9495-95e5320d342c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? Will it involve armed conflict, and if so, will the US provide moral support, military aid (i.e. dollars), and/or military support (i.e. troops)? Is it possible that China would instead begin its expansion elsewhere? Might [Japan](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/539b991d-fad9-4ed2-8755-5181b18fe2ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or [Australia](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d35981c2-5a22-4fec-8010-3ca955f73235?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) be easier targets for the PLA, given the increasing focus on Taiwan? Or perhaps Central Asia? How will each of these possibilities affect the global economy and the ability for businesses to operate?
Other potential implications of the US-China War include the death of multilateralism (does the UN continue to serve any meaningful purpose at this point?) and rapidly increasing global competition for scarce energy, agricultural, and other critical resources. Russia's invasion of Ukraine might also be relevant: Could it be possible that the China-Russia-Iran alliance feels the need to use nuclear weapons as defeat in Ukraine grows in likelihood?
### **ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE**
The **rapid acceleration of artificial intelligence** is likely to be one of the most disruptive developments of our time. It will impact the nature of geo-strategic competition, corporate competition, human interactions, and even our individual belief systems. AI will impact every industry across every geography and impact most functions. And surprise surprise, it's also related to the first risk in that AI advancements have created [a chip war between America and China](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a8f93f06-ec00-44f1-bc50-5769f262dd6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/412d29b8-6b11-4e4d-aa6c-7a973f1ceefc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Thinking through the many risks of AI will be the subject of future commentary, but again, I want to focus on one potential application through which artificial intelligence will disrupt our belief systems. That application is something known as _deepfake technology_ , through which videos of real people are generated to deliver fake messages. Consider one use of the technology: ransom attacks. Imagine a video image of your spouse being held by a hostage and desperately pleading for you to send bitcoin in the next hour to meet their assailant's deadlines. The video is so realistic that you can't help but assume it's real. How would you react? What if it were a phone call from your child in which she had forgotten her social security number and was at the bank needing you to read it to her? The voice on the phone is indistinguishable from her real voice that you don't even consider the possibility that it might not be real.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..T1AkmLJWrrgcMiMoRxqikWvfo7mkrwiNGxZs0qFdIUM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=127912131)

I'm not a biologist or medical practitioner, but I'm pretty confident that our finely tuned human perception systems are not ready to deal with this reality-shattering possibility. Who and what will we trust? How can we know anything is actually true in the virtual world? Will such a breakdown of basic perception lead to other unforeseen problems? Can governance structures such as democracy survive in such a world?
One of the most interesting commentaries on the risks emerging from AI is a talk by Tristan Harris and Aza Raskin of the [Center for Humane Technology](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/355e8ee6-cf88-4d89-a6c6-e64c5dc58e80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). They were major contributors to [The Social Dilemma](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/11ab62f9-3a5d-4329-a852-aabc6f037953?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the docudrama about social media risks that has been watched by more than 100 million viewers in 190 countries in 30 languages. Here are some highlights of the AI Dilemma that I hope entice you to watch; I promise it won't be a waste of your time.
> **" 2024 will be the last human election"**
> **" Loneliness [will] become the biggest national security threat"**
> **" 50% of AI researchers believe there's a 10% or greater chance that humans go extinct from an inability to control AI."**
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b8f5bc06-64c6-49d2-b16f-42068a294dde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### US DOLLAR DYNAMICS
The third topic that keeps me up at night is the **US dollar** , or more specifically, its global reserve currency status. Because most of the world's reserves are maintained in US dollars, the appetite for American debt is almost inexhaustible, allowing America to borrow more, spend more, and do more than otherwise possible. Further, given most trade is settled in US dollars, there seems to constant demand for the greenback. Other global powers, noting the "exorbitant privilege" conferred on America by the US dollar's role, are now actively seeking to displace it.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d72590b8-96ff-4424-9010-9c01f9f412a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A couple of years ago, I had a chance to [speak with Ambassador Kishore Mahbubani](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0da26254-f725-44dc-868a-02e04050ae93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ([video of my conversation](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b7bcb20a-7148-4457-9c03-df4482331fe4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), former President of the UN Security Council and a leading Singaporean diplomat. At the time, he had just published a book titled "Has China Won?" and we had a spirited discussion about mistakes both sides had made and the outlook for potential conflict. One of the biggest mistakes America had made, he suggested, was the weaponization of the US dollar against America's rivals and enemies. It's incentivized countries around the world, and especially China, to encourage the use of and to develop new non-dollar currencies, he claimed.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..T1AkmLJWrrgcMiMoRxqikWvfo7mkrwiNGxZs0qFdIUM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=127912131)
Recently, we've seen more frequent news about a BRIC currency (BRIC is a term that referred to Brazil, Russia, India and China). Leaders from the emerging market nations have noted a new currency [would protect their countries from sanctions should they find themselves in disagreement with the United States](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c645585c-fc9a-4506-87a8-89b96f605a4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). While news like that might normally be dismissed as the normal banter against the dollar that has existed for decades, it has been more noteworthy as it took place in the context of several other developments.
Consider the following:
1. In March 2023, **[Brazil](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5f5af082-4d10-4044-ae8c-2ef25c341bf6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ and China agreed to begin using the Chinese Yuan to settle bilateral trade between the two nations](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5f5af082-4d10-4044-ae8c-2ef25c341bf6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
2. In the wake of US sanctions on **Russia** following its 2022 invasion of Ukraine, [India accepted delivery of Russian oil and paid for it in Russian rubles](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2b11fd4e-8de0-451a-bbf8-fdde065a93fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
3. **[India](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/19dc147e-1003-4682-9952-737a843be403?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ recently signed an agreement with Malaysia allowing for bilateral trade to be settled in Indian Rupees](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/19dc147e-1003-4682-9952-737a843be403?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg); the country has also [issued statements calling for the use of INR more broadly in the use of trade settlement](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bfdb07d0-ca60-44fa-9708-67436ec2408a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
4. In March 2023, **[China](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c2ed424e-7a46-4071-932b-60c0460c8d38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ accepted a delivery of liquified natural gas (LNG) and paid for it in Chinese yuan](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c2ed424e-7a46-4071-932b-60c0460c8d38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the first time it had not settled hydrocarbon imports in US dollars.

In summary, every one of the BRIC countries has been increasingly (and publicly) making gestures to move off the US dollar. It's also worth noting that the Russian news outlet RT recently announced that a new BRICS (the "S" is for South Africa, inconsistently included) currency, backed by gold, would be launched later in August 2023.
If global faith in the US dollar were to ever be lost, the entire global economy would face a jolt of readjustment that would threaten the very viability of the US economy. And even if this new gold-backed currency does gain traction, it will take years before corporate leaders (and other stewards of large pools of capital) would be willing to park tens of billions of dollars in another currency. Is a new global currency an imminent possibility? Certainly. Will it have immediate consequences? Perhaps. Might it have long-term ramifications? Definitely.
### OPPORTUNITY WITHIN RISK
Every risk is accompanied by tremendous opportunity... and the three risks I highlight here are no exception. Leaders who take the time to understand a wide range of potential outcomes for ambiguous developments will be better positioned to successful navigate the uncertainty plaguing our world...and doing so will not only generate a better understanding of the risks, it will also help identify opportunities.

[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..T1AkmLJWrrgcMiMoRxqikWvfo7mkrwiNGxZs0qFdIUM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=127912131)
About [Vikram Mansharamani](https://open.substack.com/users/37278065-vikram-mansharamani?utm_source=mentions)
Dr. Mansharamani is a global generalist who tries to look beyond the short term view that tends to dominate today's agenda. He spends his time speaking with leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism...and prides himself on voraciously consuming a wide variety of books, magazines, articles, TV shows, and podcasts. _LinkedIn_ twice listed him as their #1 Top Voice for Global Economics and _Worth_ profiled him on their list of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. He has taught at Yale and Harvard and has a PhD from MIT. He is also the author of [THINK FOR YOURSELF: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5308e770-5a03-408f-aeae-6afe097cfe3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Follow him on [Twitter](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bb82fcd4-f516-4715-b244-461a130cff74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or [LinkedIn](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f4d30757-def9-4b6b-99da-25580384ed2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..T1AkmLJWrrgcMiMoRxqikWvfo7mkrwiNGxZs0qFdIUM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=127912131)

Because I am inevitably wrong, and I prefer to be surprised positively. I'd rather be concerned about something that doesn't happen than to be shocked by unexpected developments. It's in that spirit that I offer three of the biggest global risks I see on the horizon, each of which has the potential to upend the world as we know it. subject: Dave Min Raises Over $400,000 In Second Quarter
body:
Min, Who Is Running To Succeed Katie Porter, With Her Endorsement, Has Raised Nearly $1 Million Since Entering the Race | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bb7589283335/dave-min-raises-over-400000-in-second-quarter-15658496?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** July 10, 2023
**Contact:**[**press@davemin.com**](mailto:press@davemin.com) **Dave Min Raises Over $400,000 In Second Quarter**
_Min, Who Is Running To Succeed Katie Porter, With Her Endorsement, Has Raised Nearly $1 Million Since Entering the Race – with NO Self-funding Or Donations From Corporate PACs or Big Oil_
**Impressive Fundraising Haul Comes On The Heels Of Polling Showing Min Beating Likely Republican Nominee** **IRVINE, CA —** Today, State Senator Dave Min reported raising over $400,000 from April 1 to June 30 for his campaign for Congress in California’s 47th Congressional District. This is the second quarter of impressive fundraising for Dave Min, whose coalition of support includes Congresswoman Katie Porter, SEIU California, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, and more than 125 local and state elected officials. California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that is being vacated by Rep. Porter, who is running for U.S. Senate. California’s 47th is being heavily targeted by Republicans–Rep. Richard Hudson, the chair of the NRCC this cycle, has called the district “probably our best pickup opportunity in the country.” The announcement comes a few weeks after a [Public Policy Polling](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=4ae9f5aaf7&e=7017cc100e) poll showed Min with a commanding lead against his likely Republican opponent in the 2024 General Election. “**With Republicans calling their shot, California’s 47th needs a candidate who knows how to run a strong campaign and has a track record of winning here in a tough district** ,” said Orrin Evans, senior advisor to the Dave Min for Congress campaign. “**Working families in Orange County know that Dave Min represents something different than the old tired politics of talking out of both sides of your mouth. Dave Min is a fighter who wins elections and delivers on his promises. We’re so thankful for the tremendous support we’ve received since this campaign kicked off in January, and we’re excited about the grassroots movement we’re building that is going to keep this seat Blue**.” It’s important to consider the source of the funding as well. Notably,**Min’s fundraising to date includes no money from corporate PACs and no loans from the candidate.** Min has also signed the No Fossil Fuel Money Pledge, and his list of donors reflects those commitments. Considering fundraising and endorsements in tandem tells a compelling story about Dave Min’s general election viability. While approaching $1 million raised, he’s also consolidated support from local, state, and national endorsers. In recent weeks, Min has announced endorsements from the Service Employees International Union (SEIU), the California Federation of Teachers (CFT), the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) Local 47, UFCW Local 324, Teamsters Joint Council 42, California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, State Treasurer Fiona Ma, Insurance Commissioner Ricardo Lara, Superintendent of Public Instruction Tony Thurmond, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, more than 50 local Orange County government officials, and more than 60 state legislators. A full endorsement list is available[ here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=c1b2a135fc&e=7017cc100e). Dave Min is the Democrats’ most viable candidate in the race, having entered the contest with the endorsement of the outgoing incumbent Katie Porter. Min currently represents over 80% of the 47th Congressional District in the State Senate, and won CA-47 during that election by over 5% in 2020, a tough year for Orange County Democrats. Just after the end of 2023’s first quarter, former Congressman Harley Rouda ended his bid for the 47th, leaving Min as the only Democrat in the race with previous campaign, legislative or federal policy experience. Senator Min, the only Korean-American in the state legislature, serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. Min has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on hate crimes, gun violence prevention, family safety, and women’s reproductive rights. In the wake of the 2021 Huntington Beach Oil Spill, he stood up to the oil industry and led efforts to end offshore drilling. Min serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. He previously chaired the Senate Cybersecurity Select Committee. Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law. He resides with his wife Jane Stoever, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout.
######
_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._

subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsOvRD9DN-

Hillsdale College

Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey
on the United States Supreme Court..

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osOvRD9DN-

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in Hillsdale
College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is
requested.

Your response will only take a few
minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and
the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the
proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court
differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the
bench.

Do you agree that the role of the
Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and
NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives dismayed by
recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with
additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put
it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to
a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by
four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you
today...

What is your opinion about the Supreme
Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me
using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme
Court right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form
effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper
role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution
instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your National
Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62014782:sOvRD9DN-:m:3:2532013465:F3C229F864D1621BDE1D89946D846E81:r

Thank you for your time and
attention-and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty
since 1844

Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI
49242 USA

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Colorado Politics Exposed: Polis Is STILL the Problem
body:
Episode #14 of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl is LIVE!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-r/) Hi Peter, Two decades ago the Republicans had about the same power as the Democrats do in Colorado right now. Thanks not just to the Democrat billionaires and bought-off media, we have to also tip our hats off to some folks in the Colorado conservative movement for tanking our beautiful state. This week I started a spicy 3-part series called "Colorado Politics Exposed" diving deep into how Colorado flipped from red to blue, beginning with a full episode detailing who Jared Polis REALLY is. I tell some stories straight from the campaign that I've never told before, so you're going to want to tune in. Next week we'll dig into the Blueprint and how the Democrats do their dirty work. The following week, we'll take a look at the Republican side. In order to win, we have to understand our strengths, weaknesses, and what we're up against.
### **Episode #14 - COLORADO POLITICS EXPOSED (PART 1):
POLIS IS STILL THE PROBLEM**
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-y/) [WATCH ON YOUTUBE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-j/) [WATCH ON RUMBLE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-t/) [LISTEN HERE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-i/) _Not into podcasts? I post transcripts of my monologues and full episode breakdowns every week on my Substack.[You can subscribe here!](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-d/)_
## **A TOPIC I'M FIRED UP ABOUT THIS WEEK:**
I spent an afternoon this past week watching the movie **[Sound of Freedom](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-h/)** and while it was tough to watch, it's so necessary that we bring awareness to the issue of child trafficking. It's such a growing problem in the U.S. and the way we can help address it is by watching this film and telling other people to watch it, too. If you can't afford to go see it, please reach out to me. I am happy to help you get a ticket. This film was made five years ago, but it's been on a shelf because so many people don't want this information to come to light. Jim Caviezel and Tim Ballard stood firm and finally got it into theaters. Now it's our turn to make sure the message is heard. I encourage all of you to go see it and share it with your entire network. This horrific problem is hurting so many children across the planet. Let's stand up and make a difference. [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-k/)
## **MAKE THE SWITCH TO AMERICAN-MADE PRODUCTS:**
Running for governor last year really opened my eyes to just how corrupt things are right now. Unfortunately, the woke agenda is being weaved into almost every part of our daily lives -- from the schools to the stores we shop at for everyday household goods. I was finally so fed up with it that I decided I couldn't NOT take action.

In the last couple of months, my family made the switch away from big box back to family-owned, made on U.S. soil. If you really want to fight the woke agenda, you have to stop FUNDING it. We have to start putting our money where our mouth is and vote with our dollar.

If you want to learn more about making the switch for you and your family, join us for a call on **TOMORROW July 11th at 7pm MT**. Head to [patriotswitch.com/heidi](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-b/) to sign up! [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-n/) Have a great week, folks!Heidi [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-p/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-x/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-m/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-c/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-q/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-a/) | Heidi GanahlLone Tree, CO [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-aciihk-66AAC70D-tkwdjuidt-f) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-u-aciihk-tkwdjuidt-z/)
---

subject: Sign: Do NOT Pardon Trump
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Add your name: Do NOT Pardon Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3840bc4d-7f37-48d7-94fe-c7d2074cdfe1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta8d58014-09f0-4ab4-94c8-64c5f00a543d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | With Donald Trump facing multiple federal and state-level criminal charges, there are [calls](https://default.salsalabs.org/T96aebf18-804d-4b62-96c7-b0a8b8195d0b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) from Republicans (and even some Democrats) to pardon him in order to "heal" and "bring the nation together." [**We say HELL NO.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td73f862e-6ab5-4907-8b7d-be9af15a9de7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump is not above the law, and if he is convicted, he should pay the price and serve the time like anyone else. And anyone who honestly thinks Trump's supporters care about "healing" hasn't been paying attention for the last decade. [**Add your name, and tell federal and state officials NOT to pardon Trump.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b953111-e766-44d3-8917-cc4e4af1cdbd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf8815d8a-531c-40bc-aacf-16c58175f480/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_

|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5c45172-50f5-4cb7-b107-ceef5eeeead0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9fa7c265-3bc5-4760-abbf-b88c40aaff11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Corporations have gone woke, radical agendas are being taught in the classroom, and big-box retailers are promoting transgender clothing in the kids section. Schools, entertainment, and media push a political, sexualized, anti-American agenda on children. Is there anywhere that is still safe for our kids? **[PragerU Kids](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTkyLTcyMmM4YjE5NmQ0YTQ5ZjBhODU1NTU1MWY4NWE0M2JiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5wcmFnZXJ1LmNvbS9raWRzLXN1bW1lci1jaGFsbGVuZ2UtYWU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1hZSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1GQUxSNDA4MzkifQ/P4m_KygYe8-iFvhQC_yOfQ)** fights this attack on the next generation by providing wholesome, educational shows, books, magazines, and lesson plans that teachers and parents trust and children love. No woke garbage here! PragerU Kids is the leading network that makes educational, entertaining, pro-American**** content for every grade level. We offer everything families and educators need to teach and celebrate traditional American values at home and in schools. This summer, we invite your family to participate in our brand new **[_PragerU Kids 30-Day Summer Challenge_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTkyLTcyMmM4YjE5NmQ0YTQ5ZjBhODU1NTU1MWY4NWE0M2JiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5wcmFnZXJ1LmNvbS9raWRzLXN1bW1lci1jaGFsbGVuZ2UtYWU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1hZSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1GQUxSNDA4MzkifQ/ljzinZtZz8hdM3mPk-AwUQ)**!

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, _**“why are you doing this?”**_

**Here is what I tell them:** it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. **I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America.**
**
When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track.

It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign on Tuesday. **

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c261451ff0014619861701b464ef6a46&_e=Nl-u4AEUMJRCTYPKRYTwA8iHkS9HtwGpD8N8GM0kF2Ww6fns800sJNr0RkG44k0J1L-oiRUrcs5YU93GYRqJTGmfmlhlmwXEGxckUvv4ERgVV2UOBiKWOP93b1lfqwzrHoXfizypSthYrCaDzAfCe4eDEPIm6I3vlnxCk4b1fsUv7xAQTaq2gv8tnK3of6RUwL6XsJMJod1W7knnihyDIc4tLqHqxGSPdCJEqjy3l7vOPDzYyeD3dTF_virblLH10M06cUbJBppED1r9jYzfFlQ0lA4CgqhmPz-jbgje_HU_vas0i_DghOenWRYD3haNKtEy2Z8n_sNm3Z0mo_0dVfkOW2WsPEAFrdSeKaQ3JzUl56HcPB7LklKemb4T9l5eSZMvb4UsIM9glz8S7pIQ5d0H401MfXeZxOn1rDQc0lo%3D)

[**FOR GOD AND COUNTRY
CHIP IN TODAY
**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c261451ff0014619861701b464ef6a46&_e=Nl-u4AEUMJRCTYPKRYTwA8iHkS9HtwGpD8N8GM0kF2Ww6fns800sJNr0RkG44k0J1L-oiRUrcs5YU93GYRqJTGmfmlhlmwXEGxckUvv4ERgVV2UOBiKWOP93b1lfqwzrHoXfizypSthYrCaDzAfCe4eDEPIm6I3vlnxCk4b1fsUv7xAQTaq2gv8tnK3of6RUwL6XsJMJod1W7knnihyDIc4tLqHqxGSPdCJEqjy3l7vOPDzYyeD3dTF_virblLH1tgFMgshzvxCZQaY2EVi4JfSJv-AmYssEtcTZzBFA3CCKtysLYiSB0FUUEdVh6Ovf60F_y4WTxO-lL-bvVTYRpPK-LfMyW_seRkB_9SwQT3V-NduepGZdy5niVNUtLa8ZFcnt7WLBB_zSR91zN7aG_LKvhXhI_EDqN5jGgUhffL8%3D)
I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. **[If you’re able to chip in a few dollars](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c261451ff0014619861701b464ef6a46&_e=Nl-u4AEUMJRCTYPKRYTwA8iHkS9HtwGpD8N8GM0kF2Ww6fns800sJNr0RkG44k0J1L-oiRUrcs5YU93GYRqJTGmfmlhlmwXEGxckUvv4ERgVV2UOBiKWOP93b1lfqwzrHoXfizypSthYrCaDzAfCe4eDEPIm6I3vlnxCk4b1fsUv7xAQTaq2gv8tnK3of6RUwL6XsJMJod1W7knnihyDIc4tLqHqxGSPdCJEqjy3l7vOPDzYyeD3dTF_virblLH1R9_iPM3ljq5svfSOHdFXeMi_sbeExLzNEPISMH9jBPq07VjtOF14vJ8AyFxPGF4izguzn5py--r05w33P0I6Und_40YP9ErAQprAOMqE1fxAfH9iScXUWt0pmgrmVnRzhey1N57jH5PTcZbGXNeu2cLaqPjpuG7ixCMHUhLSbBw%3D)** before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground.

I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. Our campaign is about service, God, and country, not politics as usual.

Hooyah,

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c261451ff0014619861701b464ef6a46&_e=Nl-u4AEUMJRCTYPKRYTwA8iHkS9HtwGpD8N8GM0kF2Ww6fns800sJNr0RkG44k0J1L-oiRUrcs5YU93GYRqJTGmfmlhlmwXEGxckUvv4ERgVV2UOBiKWOP93b1lfqwzrHoXfizypSthYrCaDzAfCe4eDEPIm6I3vlnxCk4b1fsUv7xAQTaq2gv8tnK3of6RUwL6XsJMJod1W7knnihyDIc4tLqHqxGSPdCJEqjy3l7vOPDzYyeD3dTF_virblLH1iZ17qjyMP2C8B3tTnhKwFgtN5fda-qjrvOIQAMavAXVoN7yPyk_qGd3gh1sGsROEMINxZSScYRvAad97yZwgKJ0k4fIympTMmG7cZ0SqJChkE0taecjnKI2UptmD6Ukd1SAQ1dxLfbeK83YNMrYuPixp5b931F-auuz6yC_c6Gk%3D)

subject: Fox News covered our huge win against LGBT activists in Texas
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014aB1eLDKfhu3Ima0Te7Vx0KRP5oiqlyMkaxcAo3InoLIbR8d76JuNck_N-WtG0z7goKnpwTyeGsRm-vN6MUdpXeqEpuLeRqJnaKQ01JtsJKn4J3V9t2OsOCl22bNSxzkMwyreDW3rLTuLZPxzQKKHmZPZhY3xqwhiupFBTqExwk=&c=h-N7qdPslqDIlRINxxGoqFP9h54759f62pHUUsEZsvwXOSRRaa-zYg==&ch=WAkn5eXmEkumf0Os6Nn5vxpwmPGJKrsl-UwvCdhn6JMucOCeqZlMtg==)

| Fellow American, In case you haven't heard, parents and students earned a huge victory in Texas. Due to the dedication of Citizens Defending Freedom, along with collaborative efforts from True Texas Project, and local community members, the Keller Independent School District BANNED transgender bathrooms and pronoun usage. The story is so big that Fox News and The Daily Wire covered it.
[Click here to read the full story](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014aB1eLDKfhu3Ima0Te7Vx0KRP5oiqlyMkaxcAo3InoLIbR8d76JuNX7b2n2wNjczivsjtlH3D-6um5o4fFKLkko9Skh0OA5eM0NPt8WAhn1p3T64sVK3x7sGBUfRM1HETBFvkJgYfYtDQkkamFZMu2WF-O7BmMKSuf4uU2oOpDv8BtxhgnkzALvViyHzOZRxwAI5WCCkk_E0FZWOTOJiRvL2HO78v99BUOd7Nkf969cxq2qJmaPFXnKhHQIkCT0cNY5aheP_Gzx3bGUNhzj0UA==&c=h-N7qdPslqDIlRINxxGoqFP9h54759f62pHUUsEZsvwXOSRRaa-zYg==&ch=WAkn5eXmEkumf0Os6Nn5vxpwmPGJKrsl-UwvCdhn6JMucOCeqZlMtg==).
