name: Barbara Boxer via Blue Amp Action
subject: A true swing seat
body:
Democrats must win this district
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1cf185da-98b5-437d-9c8e-1fa65820fce7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4655df68-5b5c-4f4e-8b25-514e47524244/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I’ve got a huge announcement that should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart: former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins is running for Congress in California’s 41st district -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House. Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal. There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign. I have committed my energy, time and money to this race and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent. [I’ll share more about why I'm backing Will, but first, I have an important request: Could you split a $10 donation between Will’s campaign and Blue Amp Action to help him launch with strength? Will can win this thing, so please donate now.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb03c1545-c7ff-4607-9a0d-01556801a849/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teec3ff37-b84e-42e4-8e8c-0b7feec389a4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Here’s why Democrats across the country should pay close attention to this race: 1\. We need candidates like Will in Congress. As a former federal prosecutor, he understands the ongoing danger that extremism poses to our democracy. He brought justice to insurrectionists, and I know he'll take the oath to defend democracy as seriously now as he did in the Justice Department. 2\. Retaking the House runs through CA-41. After the new lines were drawn, CA-41 became a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress. 3\. GOP super PACs. Despite the tough midterm environment in 2022, Will was the third most “overperforming” Dem challenger in the country. He was also heavily outspent by the GOP’s dark money machine. If Democrats help Will keep pace, he can flip this seat! 4\. Will’s opponent Ken Calvert has got to go. Calvert voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He backs the extreme ban on abortion -- including for instances of rape, and wants doctors who perform them to go to jail. CA-41 is home to one of the most LGBTQ-friendly cities in Palm Springs, yet Calvert staunchly opposes gay marriage. The rematch is on, folks. Will came so close to winning in 2022, and this is our chance to finish the job. But it depends on widespread, grassroots support. [Please split a $10 contribution between Will Rollins’ campaign for Congress and Blue Amp Action today. I’m telling you, this will be one of the most critical races in the country, so don’t sit this one out! We need lots of Democrats to step up right out of the gate.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T51e8180c-408f-4ca9-a3a1-85813b797f83/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks, Barbara Boxer Former U.S. Senator, California
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a589569-baf2-4515-b993-79a15a7bcf68/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Greedy companies mining URANIUM near the Grand Canyon
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1869492?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell President Biden to protect the Grand Canyon region from uranium mining! ** The Grand Canyon is an icon of American natural landscapes. Its red rock walls and stunning expanse attract tourists from around the world. The surrounding public lands are also home to historical and cultural relics -- from ancient settlements and camps to rock carvings that are **more than 10,000 years old! ** But the **1.1 MILLION acres surrounding the Grand Canyon are unprotected.** Greedy companies are **mining for URANIUM,** and it’s already contaminated ground and surface water in the region -- **_including drinking water!_ **This iconic region will continue to be DESTROYED unless President Biden protects it by recognizing the proposed Baaj Nwaavjo I’tah Kukveni Grand Canyon national monument. [**Please, Friend, will you help STOP uranium mining around the Grand Canyon? Add your name by 11:59pm TONIGHT!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1869493?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1869494?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The proposed monument would also protect critical habitat for _**several endangered species!**_ **California condors and Mexican spotted owls need your help to protect their habitats. **
Tribes have been urging President Biden to permanently protect the land, water, cultural sites, and wildlife. **Every second that passes, more companies are mining uranium from precious lands. [If just 1 of every 13 people reading this email takes action, we can push President Biden to declare the Baaj Nwaavjo I’tah Kukveni Grand Canyon national monument. You could be the difference!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1869495?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1869494?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Fossil fuel and lands campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

**FROM THE DESK OF MONICA CROWLEY** Throughout my career, I've been on both sides of the media equation.** ** I've been honored to serve two presidents and to have seen the inside of newsrooms from Fox News to MSNBC.** ** Bad journalism is everywhere. Most newspapers have chosen a side, and it's not yours. Instead of holding the corrupt and powerful accountable, they are protecting them. They are a menace to our republic.** ** But good journalism still exists - and it's thriving at The New York Sun! Founded in 1833, 18 years before the New York Times, the Sun puts that paper to shame.** ** The Sun is committed to "safeguarding liberty" and "speaking out the sentiment" of the American people. Principled and relentless, it's a paper that fights for us. Its editors are some of the smartest and fairest in the business, including famed editor-in-chief Seth Lipsky.** ** The Sun is making waves, but it's up against the biggest and best funded media giants in the industry.** ** The Sun has a secret weapon though: readers like you and me who are committed to joining the effort to build a better press. That's how we do it in America.** ** Membership starts at just 1c a day. You can't beat that! So please join me in this groundbreaking effort.** ** The New York Sun needs us, and America needs The New York Sun.
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTkyLTNhMTAxNGQ2NDFmZjQ4NTVhZGZkMDY1NWY4ZDNiNzZlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9TExPNDA4MTcifQ/6dZgKD-3WWiS9-eBqXyt7Q)
---
**Sign up today and make a real difference.**** ****See you on the other side!**
---

**Monica Crowley** Subscriber, The New York Sun

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | | FROM THE DESK OF MONICA CROWLEY Throughout my career, I've been on both sides of the media equation. I've been honored to serve two presidents and to have seen the inside of newsrooms from Fox News to MSNBC. Bad journalism is everywhere. Most newspapers have chosen a side, and it's not yours. Instead of holding the corrupt and powerful accountable, they are protecting them. They are a menace to our republic. But good journalism still exists - and it's thriving at The New York Sun! Founded in 1833, 18 years before the New York Times, the Sun puts that paper to shame. The Sun is committed to "safeguarding liberty" and "speaking out the sentiment" of the American people. Principled and relentless, it's a paper that fights for us. Its editors are some of the smartest and fairest in the business, including famed editor-in-chief Seth Lipsky. The Sun is making waves, but it's up against the biggest and best funded media giants in the industry. The Sun has a secret weapon though: readers like you and me who are committed to joining the effort to build a better press. That's how we do it in America. Membership starts at just 1c a day. You can't beat that! So please join me in this groundbreaking effort. The New York Sun needs us, and America needs The New York Sun. Sign up today and make a real difference. See you on the other side! Monica Crowley Subscriber, The New York Sun | Liberty Ledger P.O. ---|---
**Good morning! **On this day in 1804, the [famous duel](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FOwzAQQL_G2Rqdz746GTyARMRSVsbIiS_tgRNHrtuKv0dl5m1venqfp_EUJMl2_ggr-7rkMcxV7jyCO2h9QDNiE_3CjGwa9vrY9eA6S7a5-CNMQOwWIjdpC5GmyaKz2s7GQBe6RjwCGnD6CVlqYTYTUj-Tpp607pQFjlJzab-ybPXCS_rJdy7tnNcm-Uut-1WZF4WDwoG39iHfsnOU0OZyVjg8XeHweitFIb2hQupAIfXmPaySat7GeOPUFB_3h6Qk16NTFs5rkPTXqP8v_wYAAP__HVZUtA) occurred between Alexander Hamilton and Aaron Burr. It was a violent resolution to building tension between the two American leaders, and it left Hamilton dead.

In today's edition, we're talking about the Marine Corps' lack of a confirmed leader, President Biden's hot temper with staffers, and a special kind of paint that's helping the world's poor stay cool.

## Marine Core Without a Leader
For the first time since the 1850s, the Marine Corps is [without a commandant](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAUAL8Gb1iAAeOBoYu3dO1oYXgkrwJjAYqbv6_SubfecNJ93babw4TH_dNlsD2WzfmOT9jYTDmnYtrEEGwEEDANYLk2C5uNVHJ42OhdBKmN2sHs0Ux-CY5xvXsO2jCuB7SCiYnN_I2SamR-2oVavOJqUZwbIhkE7KWO3wWP_oCYXuUJdfQlD8k-ej8bmT6IWIlYr-saY_k54GpvT8R6loQdfSNiza7iAdSXejbqyxGxZgg0gQtQacTaOu2YgXIt6QtcbUO14bwwJWx6JpLds8P0F-7_f_gNAAD__60CYD4).

Senator Tommy Tuberville (R-AL) [is blocking](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAURp8Gb1j82mZg6OItXTta-PqS3ApDBChW375K537TJ53l6HzdtlugRPn-GU70PZYtQKcXbmLmUnKlNzUcPiIq1AN6OS1OzIuxZnh4HVychAPEeQpWgYA96l0aJSOiRhzIK6G0mOV71thRgN6VdWCldVbKhRmBB_VSx-9CuT8wpp_ywjpCOYfkH70_G9MfTK1Mrdd1jXmHjFd7c6bWZ0nUCRpTK5R8r9je9wyVMjbeMIeOHEqOVE88eMJwYOWRauu804lcLtbxCjk4bc00VH88L0qJ2jQzI-5noPSn0v8v8xsAAP__o1Nl3g) the fast-track promotions of nearly 250 military leaders--including Gen. Eric Smith, President Biden's nominee for the Marine Corps head, and the senator is sticking to his guns.

Tuberville is unhappy with the Pentagon's new policy of facilitating travel for abortions for service members, and he's unwilling to back off [his stance](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQRb_G7ojMwNhQULwmXV67pYVhiGcFOMJsov37Vbbe212d5uh83Nab58z1_t8Xcj0dqw-dn7ROi5BSgFphjC4RAamRnJyNnRajUY-70wlnANJJafJWJ0oKQW4ybjZGZc3IDiZQ0yLfQ42XKagN0AaUaFFKM-iJIvejXT4Prn2nlL-PJ7VLOMqY3d774xzUvwGuA1z9o9LrfKP3aZ1DpgGuxTeuJMJRiq_R1y42andq4izcd3FS9Z1E_9qoPTlnEiZglITSB-NnC6gjLkmSNVJZAqvH5uLjxTnzOS-Dnu7Fc_416n8H-gkAAP__lyhmNQ) until the Pentagon "follows the law or changes the law."

The senator emphasized his holdout rationale in a statement: "..._the burden is not on me to pass legislation to stop this illegal policy, the burden is on the administration_."
## Turkey to Allow Sweden's NATO Bid
Sweden applied for NATO membership a year ago, but Turkey has [routinely blocked](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L9uwyAYBPCnwRsWf4wdBoYu3tK1o_UZPhwaDBHQWH77yp1700m_5XRf9-UOIYa0fcKOpvm8gG3hjQubKOdUyEV0znhEgbJDw8ebZtNtUEP3MNxp4bjg3oNFaRUbFLeOTV54PTI_dsEIJiSb-BU1qJ5ZuQqlreJKK85vZGDoQsul_84htQf6eOY3lt7mvYvm0dqrEvlBxEzEfBxHn1ab8KiXEzFf9YJcoiNibj_liSeFrSBWuoJ90nqgw1RpgpbpGhyFGAMki7SiLdignHTDhAUirXBWWmwCLRXXXTHudYQYQx0nMrBthxD_drX_b_oNAAD__6nMato) the accession.

Now, Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan says he will allow the new membership (Hungary has also blocked it, but it's widely believed that they will follow Turkey's lead).

The stated reasoning for [Turkey's opposition](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2SrCAUhJ8Gs2PBEfwJCG5iNjfd0EI4jqwoFjBjzdtvufF22F3V9XV_PaaH8cEfz_9mJ12WOBlb_Jsm3oEQgM2EldMLEVJTkRZtP_Cul0pWq55t38_O2kEsOJCUbhaNUtwsxmArlr7yGjk2vBO3lFQ1t82MarBKqEEJ0TPJyfkSU_0d_VFWWsInvinVNu5V0GspZ2bNP4Yjw_G6rjrRq1DKd347MQXHcCyvtNEH8kWODgjRbuSgmLBlmBOZDfx-mpwJ7m44TImw0z5Tyqs_4WaEey5nOFZJu_PyIfjcdkzy5258-MUpf7_zEwAA__8kSmbF) has been Sweden's toleration of the _Kurdistan Workers ' Party, _an Islamic minority group that Turkey considers terrorists.

Sweden toughened its stance on the KWP ahead of Turkey's newfound acceptance, and though this seems to explain the change in policy, some analysts think that Erdoğan has used Sweden as a bargaining chip for his bid to purchase F-16s from the United States.

President Biden is scheduled to meet with the Turkish leader during the upcoming NATO summit.
## Football Coach Fired Amid Hazing Scandal
Pat Fitzgerald has been the head football coach at Northwestern since 2002, but [he was fired](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vwyAUAH8N3rD4MLE9MHTxlq4drRd42FQELHiN2_z6Kp176y2n-7iuV4gp5u0d7mgplBUcxQeuYuRScqVX1XkbEBXqDq28TLMYp8EM3W7Ro7w5ZRDcqGGanQkChdeAk0DtXBetEkqLUb4wg-mF0zdlZmekmY2UExsE-kil9p8lZtoxpJ_ywNq7cu-S3YmOxvQbUwtTy3mefSjfGc_28kwt7SiVGlNLLpX2ExthzTyUQjdIibsCbucHEA-RnhtWSJ6XL-I7PGPeeHOQPaSuWn-cMaXYLiMbxHaHmP4K6P8hvwEAAP___ARlSQ) Monday over allegations of abusive hazing and racism within the program.

The university started an investigation into the football team's culture in November, and it found a long history of hazing toward freshmen--including sexually inappropriate rituals. Initially, Fitzgerald was given a two-week suspension without pay for failing to be aware of the practices and acting.

Several former players then went public with [allegations of racism](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskk1zsyoAhX-N2ZERFJSFC3tN-jG1SdMkvcnGQUShA5IAxub--jvt8p33LM-cs3qez7qpmdJqHN6YEUXobcN4UDfRxBmAEKCkQYuu6IVAIlmIApKcxlme4nQhi7aLU9SKPoFUxFAQjFqadTzHOc-6nuCFKlCMkjiDP8EpXsY8aRGmHENMMYR5lMaiU8G65ZdVY5Ci13d7E27JrVnoQoZw8VFSRmgdobW_WBf88s6ktT-DCK1764xwYLQuyFn4INwIemtDy7QGF83uwnnAtBaDAI5x5Q1QI7g4OzhmAPOgZ1rbKYDeWQMk-0-NA_CcjR3TgNsxqHESHkAa53GaUriUwegoWQ8T53Yag3BRUsEIkWHionGiF879duxpF_OnmrzeadIlfDojejujb_1q3m7tR_7no_FqiJKqfC_LsjIHWVXIz5XaiBNeqXkYHinXLx8HD-6bzdFJ-kEP1by7EUK34Pj1zvTD6vsfyPCVE-nKi-zr83B9Js8v-F_9GZ5Pu442px5uzHlFxFTCbVynq2b_PhHgX3bS7BL-QDp4_NL7ls4mPdTjadfWt-v3fTPuh8P--iibXKvt1vtjqMmcvX6yx_PCFd1lVlorT7IojQfDlP5lF_6u0v8BAAD__4i-zoI), and the university's president decided to upgrade the punishment from a suspension to a firing.

clean_body: For the first time since the 1850s, the Marine Corps is without a commandant. | | | | | | TUESDAY, JULY 11, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1804, the occurred between Alexander Hamilton and Aaron Burr. It was a violent resolution to building tension between the two American leaders, and it left Hamilton dead. In today's edition, we're talking about the Marine Corps' lack of a confirmed leader, President Biden's hot temper with staffers, and a special kind of paint that's helping the world's poor stay cool. Have any suggestions? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | Marine Core Without a Leader For the first time since the 1850s, the Marine Corps is . Senator Tommy Tuberville (R-AL) the fast-track promotions of nearly 250 military leaders--including Gen. Eric Smith, President Biden's nominee for the Marine Corps head, and the senator is sticking to his guns. Tuberville is unhappy with the Pentagon's new policy of facilitating travel for abortions for service members, and he's unwilling to back off until the Pentagon "follows the law or changes the law." The senator emphasized his holdout rationale in a statement: "...the burden is not on me to pass legislation to stop this illegal policy, the burden is on the administration." Turkey to Allow Sweden's NATO Bid Sweden applied for NATO membership a year ago, but Turkey has the accession. Now, Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan says he will allow the new membership (Hungary has also blocked it, but it's widely believed that they will follow Turkey's lead). The stated reasoning for has been Sweden's toleration of the Kurdistan Workers ' Party, an Islamic minority group that Turkey considers terrorists. Sweden toughened its stance on the KWP ahead of Turkey's newfound acceptance, and though this seems to explain the change in policy, some analysts think that Erdoğan has used Sweden as a bargaining chip for his bid to purchase F-16s from the United States. President Biden is scheduled to meet with the Turkish leader during the upcoming NATO summit. Football Coach Fired Amid Hazing Scandal Pat Fitzgerald has been the head football coach at Northwestern since 2002, but Monday over allegations of abusive hazing and racism within the program. The university started an investigation into the football team's culture in November, and it found a long history of hazing toward freshmen--including sexually inappropriate rituals. Initially, Fitzgerald was given a two-week suspension without pay for failing to be aware of the practices and acting. Several former players then went public with , and the university's president decided to upgrade the punishment from a suspension to a firing. name: Anna Kaplan
subject: Cook Political Report: NY-3 a top pickup opportunity for Democrats in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi, it’s Anna Kaplan, Democratic candidate for Congress against George
Santos.

The Cook Political Report released a preview of the 2024 Congressional
elections, listing NY-3 as one of the top pickup opportunities for
Democrats.

Here’s why: Our district voted for President Biden in 2020. And George
Santos BARELY won his seat in 2022. And we’ve now learned that he LIED his
way to victory.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18993?t=1001&akid=3388%2E346206%2EyiSH4d ]If Democrats retake this seat in 2024, we’ll take a MASSIVE step toward
flipping the House. Will you pitch in $25 or more -- split with Charles
Booker -- to help me defeat Santos and flip the House?

I’ve defeated Republicans before. When I ran for the New York Senate, I
unseated a well-funded Republican Senator, flipped the seat, and flipped
the entire chamber, giving our party a “trifecta” in the New York House,
Senate, and Governorship.

When I defeat George Santos in 2024, we’ll flip the seat from red to blue
and win back control of the House for Democrats, taking the Speaker’s
gavel away from Kevin McCarthy for good.

clean_body: Hi, it’s Anna Kaplan, Democratic candidate for Congress against George Santos. The Cook Political Report released a preview of the 2024 Congressional elections, listing NY-3 as one of the top pickup opportunities for Democrats. Here’s why: Our district voted for President Biden in 2020. And George Santos BARELY won his seat in 2022. And we’ve now learned that he LIED his way to victory. [ ]If Democrats retake this seat in 2024, we’ll take a MASSIVE step toward flipping the House. Will you pitch in $25 or more -- split with Charles Booker -- to help me defeat Santos and flip the House? I’ve defeated Republicans before. When I ran for the New York Senate, I unseated a well-funded Republican Senator, flipped the seat, and flipped the entire chamber, giving our party a “trifecta” in the New York House, Senate, and Governorship. When I defeat George Santos in 2024, we’ll flip the seat from red to blue and win back control of the House for Democrats, taking the Speaker’s gavel away from Kevin McCarthy for good. [ ]Democratic control of the House runs through New York -- and I need your help to defeat George Santos. So please, split a donation between Charles Booker and my campaign now if you can. Thanks for your support, Anna Kaplan Contribute to Charles Booker:

---
| | | | | | Governor Glenn Youngkin Vote Early Message
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yr5R53eWtc-M5qn2mpXMTO06W-L4Ed_Lx9txcy_UGZ--4AMQIgj930fLtB6gvjse7fXxplX85sz00d0OIxsZmQrICpqabpVMnEhvZPLBppvv32xD3FfLRwYOIS7iJwc5AW9hOb7QmqtiWLGI4y7fdQCo_Va9iWXnVdwDB6J5KfLEnah50uVULA==&c=4aSKuCu8zKhFbsxvtHU_mR63eyDuDIaf0Wz1Wf7SXfPcF1l4Qx9vEw==&ch=MwpOph_n7KhJegeOBZ67sWo2o8IOPIqx5lw-wpuNBb5b74IpnFIYkw==)
---
| "We can't go into our elections down thousands of votes. I need you to Secure Your Vote early this year." -Governor Glenn Youngkin
---
| Friends,
There is a lot on the line with our election this Fall, and I am confident that we are going to win. To help make that happen, we need to make sure all voters secure their votes early. Here's the truth -in recent years, Democrats have been winning absentee and early votes. That means Republican candidates like me, are going into Election Day down thousands of votes. That has to change. If you believe in our campaign and what we stand for, then I need you to help secure your vote early this year. You can go to [SecureYourVoteVirginia.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yr5R53eWtc-M5qn2mpXMTO06W-L4Ed_Lx9txcy_UGZ--4AMQIgj930fLtB6gvjsevZOf4sJoT1NY4RTMJ0y65xWA0VB5rBmupa0QjZQztrFsCTndvvReUace95PaCkIIsd3sjslMLT2FNxkapcEh34ur8ZXnsaEk&c=4aSKuCu8zKhFbsxvtHU_mR63eyDuDIaf0Wz1Wf7SXfPcF1l4Qx9vEw==&ch=MwpOph_n7KhJegeOBZ67sWo2o8IOPIqx5lw-wpuNBb5b74IpnFIYkw==) and complete the application in less than five minutes. You can: Join the Permanent Absentee List so your ballot is automatically mailed to you. Make a Plan to Vote Early/ Apply to vote early by mail. Track the status of your application and your ballot. This is a safe and secure way to make sure your vote is counted this Fall, and to make sure that we don't start from behind.
---
| Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. All 140 seats in the Virginia General Assembly are on the ballot this November in Virginia. That's why Secure Your Vote Virginia is so important. Let's get to work. [Secureyourvotevirginia.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yr5R53eWtc-M5qn2mpXMTO06W-L4Ed_Lx9txcy_UGZ--4AMQIgj930fLtB6gvjsebmabyEweS5CztTN57gnHO_HuHFRRo6Ew9HN4OE1GUQkxJ0WgzRO6Ezcsa18lyC6id2sCjbI1333UhHK9aAGGAwngcRgp3FAt&c=4aSKuCu8zKhFbsxvtHU_mR63eyDuDIaf0Wz1Wf7SXfPcF1l4Qx9vEw==&ch=MwpOph_n7KhJegeOBZ67sWo2o8IOPIqx5lw-wpuNBb5b74IpnFIYkw==)
God willing, we will win in November and I will continue service in the State Senate. Take care, please spread the word, and I look forward to seeing you around the District!
---

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Secure your vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate
body:
| | |
---
| | Hi there- As you know, there is a LOT on the line with our election this fall. I am confident that we are going to win, but to make that happen, we need to make sure all voters secure their votes early. Here’s the truth – in recent years, Democrats have been winning absentee and early votes. That means Republican candidates like me are going into election day down thousands of votes. **That has to change. ** If you believe in our campaign and what we stand for, then I need you to secure your vote early this year. You can go to [SecureYourVoteVirginia.com](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/1e14135d1923897b/8911e3a6b66b919cc3d6b838967d376c/37923) and complete the application in less than five minutes. You can:
* Join the Permanent Absentee List So Your Ballot is Automatically Mailed To You
* Make a Plan to Vote Early
* Apply to Vote Early by Mail
* Track the Status of Your Application and Your Ballot

This is a safe and secure way to make sure your vote is counted this fall – and to make sure that we don’t start from behind.
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/1e14135d1923897b/d86d65a60d871215c3d6b838967d376c/37923 "Secure Your Vote Virginia")
Thank you for your support of our campaign so far. There are less than 120 days until the November election, but early voting starts even sooner. That’s why it’s important for you to go to [SecureYourVoteVirginia.com](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/1e14135d1923897b/3420e1c1acb088dcc3d6b838967d376c/37923) and help our campaign win. Thank you! -Karen
---
---
[P.S. If your budget allows, can you donate $51 to help me become the 51st vote for the Republican majority?](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/1e14135d1923897b/55cd2ff95f4ae9cbc3d6b838967d376c/37923)

name: Your America
subject: Mandatory U.S. Dollar Recall to Begin on July 26?
body:
If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account...

| Dear Reader, If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account... You must see **[this shocking video exposing the government's new plan to recall the U.S. dollar.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28614%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vwuOGqUfBRQcLNscrvR6tA&sysid=1)** The official announcement could come as soon as July 26. As _Business Insider_ says, this dollar recall "could be imminent." That means if you don’t prepare now... You could end up holding a bunch of worthless U.S. dollars. **[Click here to see the three simple steps you must take now to protect your life savings.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28625%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4I0SZCXhn0KDohCdWj4J0A&sysid=1)** Regards, Kendall Castillo
Managing Editor, _Palm Beach Letter_

name: American Action News
subject: Your input is needed
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztjsn1mgv67cds8dln875ram0c5s6g8pjtjl7oi0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie0o74sph2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn95756dtk6vjlf2r77s6tvjs16nrcm2dkd6a6c8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie0o74sph2bs).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcvtsamgrqtl0ra4t9epqv55g6if1jnvl1ah0stg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie0o74sph2bs)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zouk01c2v38h4hsq5dbv6mo490iv217fra5qktso_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie0o74sph2bs)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zao9o127t5ds2mt0oi0ti6kt6btkjmq8g8mcuvgo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie0o74sph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34cpgm6o70s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zevdqnt9ni57pb6ock8jg4sdc47ic7r3ghh1jmp0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie0o74sph2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfvn2t7stev56atjr5hi13pqjk6l6pjdek7ris6g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie0o74sph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Coach
subject: Taking a stand to STOP Joe Biden’s threat!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Show your support of my bill to get politics out of basing decisions >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/9431dcbe96d05613/11e5395bc6a0c900c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter,

Back in May, I wrote you about Joe Biden’s threat to retaliate against Alabama.

Government officials, speaking with reporters on the condition of anonymity, revealed that he’d ordered the Air Force to review the Trump administration’s decision to relocate Space Command’s headquarters to Huntsville, made after independent reviews determined the Army’s Redstone Arsenal is the best long-term location for this base.

This “review” is 100% POLITICAL and 100% WRONG.

**It’s all about Alabama’s stand to protect the unborn – _a direct response to the passage of our state’s abortion ban last year!_**

Last month, I cosponsored a new bill in the U.S. Senate that would prevent the Biden administration from making decisions based on access to abortion.

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH of the left’s assault against the sanctity of life.

[**If you support this legislation, take a moment to sign my new petition HERE >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/9431dcbe96d05613/e8b2fb486fc07d83c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/9431dcbe96d05613/24212b8d36874775c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Federal building and basing decisions should be based on merit – not on leftist activism.

**The vindictive Biden administration wants to PUNISH conservative Americans!**

SPACECOM’s headquarters belongs in Huntsville, and you’d better bet I’m going to be leading the charge against this dangerous precedent that Joe Biden wants to set.

[**Thank you in advance for showing that you’re behind me in this fight.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/9431dcbe96d05613/69f03e8c8d91f232c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

\- Coach

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcon1a2p9jgepc7lei96uvq8orlbs06fcv3756o0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie2o30slh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6jt0dgnhinc7301ojec9jlj6p7s8g4pt3kk1le8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie2o30slh2bs).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq98n0l7u1rd3trgqllfnajk0nhs7rln29e9ra0o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie2o30slh2bs)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg4iql569ggfrcfcqbthnhoealj61k8ut6anfu98_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie2o30slh2bs)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Giffords, Gabby
subject: “Dragon slayers.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66312624/415933723/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4275-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGIyYTU4YS1lYjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Soem_Ocafbgee2taM-8gH4kHYaysIBQ5uNkI7Kh5NHg=)
Friend,
**“Dragon slayers.”**
That’s what The New York Times dubbed Kirsten, me, and the other young women who defied the odds to defeat incumbent GOP congressmen in deep-red districts.
I first met Kirsten Gillibrand back in 2006, when we were freshman congresswomen — new to Washington, but more than ready to roll up our sleeves and get to work. We instantly connected over our shared values, our commitment to public service, and our fierce passion for electing more “dragon slayer” women to public office.
In Congress, we quickly became close partners, learning the ropes, building coalitions, and fighting for legislation to help our districts. And outside the halls of the Capitol, we became dear friends.
Kirsten has stood with me throughout it all — difficult reelection campaigns, the long recovery after I was shot, and my husband Mark’s successful run for Senate. **Trust me on this: Kirsten is someone you want on your team. And now, more than ever, we need her bold, fearless voice in the Senate. [That’s why today, I’m emailing you to ask you to join me in supporting Kirsten’s critical reelection campaign. Please, will you chip in $5 before midnight tonight to ensure that my friend can keep on fighting for progress in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66312625/415933724/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk4275-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGIyYTU4YS1lYjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Soem_Ocafbgee2taM-8gH4kHYaysIBQ5uNkI7Kh5NHg=)**

You see, Kirsten is facing a tough reelection campaign this year. New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in decades — flipping enough seats to retake control of the House. **Now, those same extremists are targeting Kirsten’s seat.**
If we lose in New York, we’ll almost certainly lose our Senate majority. And just as importantly, we’ll lose one of our fiercest advocates for the issues that matter most — gun violence prevention, reproductive rights, supporting families, and more.
Kirsten refuses to accept money from corporate PACs, so she’s counting on grassroots supporters like you to have her back. **[Please, friend, will you make a donation to defend Kirsten’s must-win seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66312630/415933729/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4275-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGIyYTU4YS1lYjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Soem_Ocafbgee2taM-8gH4kHYaysIBQ5uNkI7Kh5NHg=)**
Thank you for supporting my friend.

With courage,

Gabby
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66312631/415933730/-845680267?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4275-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGIyYTU4YS1lYjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Soem_Ocafbgee2taM-8gH4kHYaysIBQ5uNkI7Kh5NHg=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66312632/415933731/-845680267?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4275-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGIyYTU4YS1lYjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Soem_Ocafbgee2taM-8gH4kHYaysIBQ5uNkI7Kh5NHg=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66312633/415933732/-845680267?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4275-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGIyYTU4YS1lYjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Soem_Ocafbgee2taM-8gH4kHYaysIBQ5uNkI7Kh5NHg=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: | | | = Friend, “Dragon slayers.” That’s what The New York Times dubbed Kirsten, me, and the other young women who defied the odds to defeat incumbent GOP congressmen in deep-red districts. I first met Kirsten Gillibrand back in 2006, when we were freshman congresswomen — new to Washington, but more than ready to roll up our sleeves and get to work. We instantly connected over our shared values, our commitment to public service, and our fierce passion for electing more “dragon slayer” women to public office. In Congress, we quickly became close partners, learning the ropes, building coalitions, and fighting for legislation to help our districts. And outside the halls of the Capitol, we became dear friends. Kirsten has stood with me throughout it all — difficult reelection campaigns, the long recovery after I was shot, and my husband Mark’s successful run for Senate. Trust me on this: Kirsten is someone you want on your team. And now, more than ever, we need her bold, fearless voice in the Senate. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = You see, Kirsten is facing a tough reelection campaign this year. New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in decades — flipping enough seats to retake control of the House. Now, those same extremists are targeting Kirsten’s seat. If we lose in New York, we’ll almost certainly lose our Senate majority. And just as importantly, we’ll lose one of our fiercest advocates for the issues that matter most — gun violence prevention, reproductive rights, supporting families, and more. Kirsten refuses to accept money from corporate PACs, so she’s counting on grassroots supporters like you to have her back. = Thank you for supporting my friend. With courage, Gabby | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Brandon Williams
subject: Quick Medical Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon for Congress NY 22** ](https://d2z3Y104
body:
|
---
Peter, Since you are a key supporter, I wanted to drop you a quick email and let you know about a personal health update that has occurred over the last 48 hours. After a routine doctors appointment found an important medical issue, I am now scheduled for a minimally invasive surgical procedure this week. The timing will cause me to miss my first series of votes since being elected to serve the people of NY 22 in Congress. Stephanie and I greatly appreciate any prayers that you can provide over the next couple days as I hope to recover within a few days and am very grateful for the excellent medical care available right here in CNY. I look forward to getting back to work on behalf of our district as quickly as possible!
Warm regards,
Congressman Brandon Williams
---

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Add your name to my petition: We must ban the transfer of cluster munitions to Ukraine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
The U.S. cannot decry the immorality of Putin's use of cluster bombs one day, and then turn around and send those same weapons to Ukraine the next.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=341%2E791427%2Ez8D_LY)

Friends -
I want to take a moment this morning to tell you about cluster munitions, and then ask you to [**add your name to mine in support of banning their transfer and use.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em-july23-su-cluster-munitions/?source=em230711-1-subs&refcode2=341.791427.z8D_LY&akid=341%2E791427%2Ez8D_LY)
This is important, so please let me explain:
Last week, the Biden administration announced its intention to provide cluster bombs to Ukraine in their war against Russia.
Cluster munitions work by spreading many, many small bombs over a wide-ranging area. And because of their indiscriminate nature, they pose an incredible danger to civilians, even years after the end of a conflict.
Unexploded, dud munitions from cluster bombings gruesomely kill civilians — oftentimes children — sometimes decades after their use. I recently traveled on a congressional delegation visit to Vietnam, where I heard firsthand about people being killed by U.S. cluster bombs _to this day_ , nearly 50 years after the end of the Vietnam War.
These bombs have been banned by 108 countries worldwide, and 123 countries have ratified an international convention to ban their use entirely — including nearly all of our allies.
**Let me be crystal clear: the continued use of cluster munitions in Ukraine is condemning entire generations of civilians to preventable and gruesome injuries, death, and human suffering, and they should be outlawed as a war crime at an international level as soon as possible.**
If the US is going to try and act as a leader on human rights on the international stage, we cannot talk out of both sides of our mouth at the same time. We cannot decry the immorality of Putin's use of cluster bombs one day, and then turn around and send those same weapons to Ukraine the next.
No. We should be leading the effort to eradicate these weapons entirely, not continuing to spread the anguish they cause across the globe.
That's why this past week, along with my colleague Rep. Sara Jacobs, I was proud to introduce an amendment to the National Defense Authorization Act of 2024 which would prohibit the United States' transfer of these hideous weapons of war.
If we're going to make any progress on this issue, I cannot do it alone. It's going to take all of us standing together and demanding what is right, and what is just. That is why I'm asking you today:
**[Add your name to my petition if you agree: the United States must not provide Ukraine or anyone else with cluster bombs, and should join the international community by ratifying the Convention on Cluster Munitions. This is important.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em-july23-su-cluster-munitions/?source=em230711-1-subs&refcode2=341.791427.z8D_LY&akid=341%2E791427%2Ez8D_LY)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em-july23-su-cluster-munitions/?source=em230711-1-subs&refcode2=341.791427.z8D_LY&akid=341%2E791427%2Ez8D_LY)**
As someone who experienced the trauma and horror of war firsthand, this is an issue that is very close to my heart.
The fact is that we can continue to stand with the people of Ukraine against Russia's illegal and tyrannical invasion, while also opposing violations of international law.
That is what I will continue to do. I hope that we as a country can find it within ourselves to do the same.
Thank you in advance for adding your voice to mine today.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em-july23-su-cluster-munitions/?source=em230711-1-subs&refcode2=341.791427.z8D_LY&akid=341%2E791427%2Ez8D_LY)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=341%2E791427%2Ez8D_LY)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=341%2E791427%2Ez8D_LY)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=341%2E791427%2Ez8D_LY)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=341_791427_z8D_LY&akid=341%2E791427%2Ez8D_LY)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: 2023 Membership Services
subject: We’re giving you one more chance to stay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven’t heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661264%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A9BNVy6NR3b%2flB3B0RQjNw&sysid=1 "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we’ve seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they’re going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661275%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fcd8ypFq9MCpIyQJAIdKYQ&sysid=1 "but you only have until
midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661264%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A9BNVy6NR3b%2flB3B0RQjNw&sysid=1 "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You’ve fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can’t DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it’s too late>>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661276%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oTBwRDGugBmOZsHqPiNr%2fg&sysid=1 "Renew your membership
before it’s too late ")_**

\---------- Forwarded message \---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There’s good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661277%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dciWtIprad97wzPwcdArLg&sysid=1 "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661278%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QptDr6Lh%2f9bXYS5uviznZg&sysid=1 "Are you going to renew
your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4
consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to
let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661264%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A9BNVy6NR3b%2flB3B0RQjNw&sysid=1 "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661279%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CRDdBgDG5CroQ4zhgRa44w&sysid=1 "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn’t over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661270%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J7n5t5XbKV%2bfilD%2f1kINxg&sysid=1 "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it’s too late>>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661271%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1YczVKdIsV08ZOR27eX8RA&sysid=1 "Renew before it’s too late
")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

name: 2023 Membership Services
subject: We’re giving you one more chance to stay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6bcbbt5t7ldee688jmq7hcsf4fcbnrvd8g3grq0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie6or2c1h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1ff6sg59e3plbi02d1rlo0c027l3e3274qegdmg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie6or2c1h2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztl9a0023def2t1h6cv2dtv0f22qg1oue3768vm0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie6or2c1h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1ve1n6fln8mri6f6k9rooacup8meall14pcv3g0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie6or2c1h2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqqutsuk3e0f1v4tosjobone9an9mrieb6bcrnug_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie6or2c1h2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcu4s94kggi09u698dm47j2v51348hljft45bgsg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie6or2c1h2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zps1pt267f1mgfnojbbrvpesnebufsts9n00ekn8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie6or2c1h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4d77uok2numdoah60mepmgjlfgp079b5ubtrce8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie6or2c1h2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhvbktqu07ces256kbamtacu9i1u6meq5u2a74q0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie6or2c1h2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkfd9mu9kftejdr7hoegr7sgbcoav05de2itb9qo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s1ie6or2c1h2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Why we’re in the fight to replace Kyrsten Sinema
body:
The fight to replace Sinema has just begun. | | | Peter –
The formula is simple, familiar, and sickening:
1. Kyrsten Sinema raises a ton of money from Wall Street and other special interests like Big Pharma
2. Sinema does their legislative bidding in the Senate – like protecting special tax loopholes for private equity and getting in the way of drug pricing reform
3. Then she uses the campaign cash to subsidize her luxury lifestyle – including lavish international trips, her expensive triathlon hobby, fine wine, and fancy meals

Gross. Sinema sold out, plain and simple. The last people on her mind are the everyday Arizonans who elected her to serve them. **[That’s why we’re working every day to Replace Sinema. Our own research uncovered some of Sinema’s biggest corruption – the lavish trips with dubious purposes, the fancy meals, the thousands and thousands of dollars spent on wine. And as a result of what we found, we filed a 27 page complaint with the FEC. Thanks to our work, the FEC is now investigating Kyrsten Sinema – and it’s made the news across Arizona.
But we still have an uphill battle ahead of us. Sinema has $10 million in her campaign account. And we know she has no problem raising millions more from Wall Street and other deep-pocketed special interests. She even has taken money from Harlan Crow – the right-wing billionaire who pays for Clarence Thomas’s vacations.

All of the experts say Arizona will be one of the closest races in the country next year. Control of the Senate is up for grabs – and it could all hinge on Arizona. It’s not going to be easy, but that’s why we’re getting a head start.
**We’ve endorsed Ruben Gallego because he’ll never leave behind everyday Arizonans the way Sinema has.****[Chip in now to help us get the word out >>>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wEryr7r9SbEa8VTn1VgWYiAyxuMQcPJPBlvNpXTKAtlnoPRCGCHBgA7T0CoK59qrHapekrfKBwOfTD21xoTbLWoiT8mKx-NldUXBioWYTQtuemac6aFCR_NVtQlHyBgridsx91pA6v_q8IcNikU_orzc6S6cF8aRYpU40zIfDXj8WsJNFdoK_Pz2_HZollM277k7qi4B6vTEJvAmLtN_9bOtRMrTiue4J5uHVvtwqGKrhsdQKSWLH2I90ml90ePMb0E0204hlgOg53zsbKfMk1jZRMy7U14OXyDZWhy7KvgHF79Q0RjfQLHASiLKwQ1O9dCJnAOhf375_rM2HPnk5m/3xs/pr-MdO8PQXmNhYdzS71mJg/h7/RqQAUV-OFHOfUGMEZotmsQwCzKgO4-0cfygCedmledk)**
One more thing: as if Sinema’s corruption weren’t bad enough, she’s also sided repeatedly with Republicans to obstruct the basic rights of Arizonans and all Americans. Specifically, she helped Republicans filibuster abortion rights and voting rights legislation. She calls herself pro-choice, but when she had the chance to project Roe v. Wade, she chose to side with Republicans instead.
Help us defeat Sinema once and for all, and finally deliver the representation that Arizona deserves.
Sellout Sinema’s days are numbered!
-Replace Sinema and Change for Arizona 2024

Friend,
---
After a month of the Biden White House, woke corporations, and the media celebrating “Pride” I have introduced a resolution that would designate July as “American Pride Month.”
---
_An entire month to celebrate America and all its accomplishments and opportunities and the patriots that have made this country the greatest in the world._
---
**It's time we bring American exceptionalism back into the spotlight and ensure America’s youth know what it means to be an American and what an honor it is.**
---
With your help, we can show the radical Left that patriotism is alive and well and make July a true celebration.
---
[**Please add your name to my official petition to show your support for designating July “American Pride Month” to celebrate America the way it deserves.**](https://links.huntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=62b9e8f0f4af49e7a1bc9dc5e871043e&_e=ZzABozmwbXHWvaf8IysIkmIgq84bRomu5P6f5jukdRtOwCdKhiR005-lvl1qMs1u6BOYJNbtE2o5k-UsmS8mL2TZLCxa6bOPPZAOK7TpeerRiJxGqrSQBpMyEhzsiw0M4hbGkVVDHLphtwm-2QnlKA-XwEXdlam4r2jc5tKwJmb8wkbg6tKIAe1fgVWQfW9UDcSUePvwevHkyi7rOz_X7HEbI7JmmDi-P965AWVe3tNzNVt1HDd2g6UJg7351vWNGwcm5gznLAYudLOT3d9dzR4BDDfO4f_hAeOEu1-sWIzqEG4wgL3aaUPyyDztApF3WvEDNClsGlpRBlNrlUslYTCyZhK_3rgrSDeTihzPtZ_Yuypvuf567X5begO-qVRoJo_J1r6GTe5KUjMWviBu1Z0mnDLumqCy5utWEyZI8qCMZGwajbTvf_Yw7tcK4NdPudjGprI_YZFoVgONM9tLJw%3D%3D)

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.huntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=62b9e8f0f4af49e7a1bc9dc5e871043e&_e=ZzABozmwbXHWvaf8IysIkmIgq84bRomu5P6f5jukdRtOwCdKhiR005-lvl1qMs1u6BOYJNbtE2o5k-UsmS8mL2TZLCxa6bOPPZAOK7TpeerRiJxGqrSQBpMyEhzsiw0M4hbGkVVDHLphtwm-2QnlKA-XwEXdlam4r2jc5tKwJmb8wkbg6tKIAe1fgVWQfW9UDcSUePvwevHkyi7rOz_X7HEbI7JmmDi-P965AWVe3tNzNVt1HDd2g6UJg7351vWNGwcm5gznLAYudLOT3d9dzR4BDDfO4f_hAeOEu1-sWIzqEG4wgL3aaUPyyDztApF3-uGoIOOORUkgjbjaMyfO5Csz-JiROpiifZIOyAYg3A5b9EKMGMBAwBJpVs_YR-zKtPaAD8igLUudMLz5aGVCs8ibaAr6iDmEy-n-lO5o861HalopIDKHiXVUrB2D31KwC1kzRWplccB4s_f7OIWUkQ%3D%3D)

Our country is on the brink of destruction as the Biden Administration focuses on “woke” ideologies that threaten the very foundation of this country.
---
_But I know that together we can restore America's greatness as the best this country has to offer is yet to come._
---
By bringing patriotism back into focus and celebrating what it truly means to be an American, we can begin to restore this country to its former glory.
---
_We must never take our freedom and independence for granted and stand up against anyone who threatens the core foundation of this country._
---
With this resolution, we can honor and celebrate this country the way it deserves and I’m counting on your support to make this celebration happen.
---
[**So please, add your name to my official petition to show your support for designating July “American Pride Month” to celebrate America the way it deserves.**](https://links.huntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=62b9e8f0f4af49e7a1bc9dc5e871043e&_e=ZzABozmwbXHWvaf8IysIkmIgq84bRomu5P6f5jukdRtOwCdKhiR005-lvl1qMs1u6BOYJNbtE2o5k-UsmS8mL2TZLCxa6bOPPZAOK7TpeerRiJxGqrSQBpMyEhzsiw0M4hbGkVVDHLphtwm-2QnlKA-XwEXdlam4r2jc5tKwJmb8wkbg6tKIAe1fgVWQfW9UDcSUePvwevHkyi7rOz_X7HEbI7JmmDi-P965AWVe3tNzNVt1HDd2g6UJg7351vWNGwcm5gznLAYudLOT3d9dzR4BDDfO4f_hAeOEu1-sWIzqEG4wgL3aaUPyyDztApF3HEf566qML37jX87Wzj1dhNrs9Qa2jDjNXokvaA6XiEb9_PnLxktZbLCZe6QbpfIoFS-DRBAq0WzY4-WLtgvOXjG37QlJ5P5Leufhz0xF_krrjRBkH06_722bW1bkPwnMeBLtvADXdpbh8B88xR6Bfw%3D%3D)

clean_body: By making a donation today, your money will go straight toward resources that will help elect state Dems who are laser-focused on improving our democracy. | | | | | Your involvement is essential to the progress of our movement. Every single grassroots supporter helps power our mission to elect state Democrats – including you. That's why we’re calling on you to heed this call to action: Here are just a few ways your gift could help expand Democratic power in our statehouses: 1. A gift of $7 could buy 10 new clipboards for organizers 2. A gift of $25 could pay for 1,000 people to see our digital ads 3. A gift of $50 could fund our candidates' phone banks 4. And a gift of$100 could make or break our chances of victory in special elections across the map Every dollar you contribute fuels our efforts to elect state Democrats who will champion fundamental rights like abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, access to affordable health care, and more, paving the way for transformative change in our statehouses. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Remember: The success of our movement depends on every person doing their part. body:

Many Americans are wondering why the White House still has no plans to fix this utter disaster.

body:
And I needed to reach out to tell you what is happening...
| [](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=e707b141b9b44f5085d4b488b1352e6a&_e=8slhDPYSMXFQprf50laNzEbOsbH2X_uFAyXmCG9WPzJiwsbH0cHcNRsK90p4ScyozBHsz8_oLp6ddvlGSfISdlMEBSNHv7neIzkHYG2-sVVVzxprUrfIAC7Va30GlAUZnsz1Euc_xT_MTZbsupKQMpPj3hxAtQq_jys2Ex3ISlIsaFE4qGcwKlljdpwvsy6UkNA13CjdW4b6rEwXiWn7TOGNjS56OxcMeBnjNubTjdoV9l0-tGYcq6sU4VrDquGEvZiGweohvwXpzNS_Gx8RDoJ5qgI-jrk4DtEEyz005VusKOKpQ0vkdBo-4aQk9InNIp226JK33wltmHhknvRWdXXvhEoLOlY0mdDo3DFlwBNn0Uhuu38uGcVe1MUnJFT2W6ssfyxqMb_d6ZYdgHqT8okrRvZr8Zhjcbsv0itd-TK1A-9JGWNKqusxZGMRDc6ruAe6E70pqUks1nmNlmQyQDixsJMylMB0ROa37s-ArxQ%3D)
---
Friend,
---
I just left Atlanta where I am fighting to secure our nation's elections and I wanted to reach out to fill you in.
---
**This meeting was a major step toward advancing election integrity in America’s elections.**
---
In order to improve election integrity in our country, we need to continue highlighting election integrity efforts nationwide– __and during today’s meeting, we did just that._ _
---
I’m working with my colleagues in Congress to pass the most conservative election reform in a generation.
---
But the Democrats have been doing everything in their power to impede our ability to improve the electoral process on the national level, **just as they did a couple of years ago in Georgia.**
---
Back in 2021 when Georgia passed a series of new election security measures, the radical Left made outrageous claims of “ Republican voter suppression” that led to _**the MLB pulling the All-Star game from Atlanta that year.**_
---
_**After these election security measures passed, Georgians shattered voter turnout records in the following midterm election.**_
---
Today, I proudly stood for election integrity. **_I will not back down_.**
---
_**Stand with me as we move to pass the most conservative election reform in a generation.**_
---
**[Please consider making a generous contribution and support our ongoing fight to advance election integrity in America’s elections.](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=e707b141b9b44f5085d4b488b1352e6a&_e=8slhDPYSMXFQprf50laNzEbOsbH2X_uFAyXmCG9WPzJiwsbH0cHcNRsK90p4ScyozBHsz8_oLp6ddvlGSfISdlMEBSNHv7neIzkHYG2-sVVVzxprUrfIAC7Va30GlAUZnsz1Euc_xT_MTZbsupKQMpPj3hxAtQq_jys2Ex3ISlIsaFE4qGcwKlljdpwvsy6UkNA13CjdW4b6rEwXiWn7TOGNjS56OxcMeBnjNubTjdoV9l0-tGYcq6sU4VrDquGEvZiGweohvwXpzNS_Gx8RDoJ5qgI-jrk4DtEEyz005VusKOKpQ0vkdBo-4aQk9InNuo2OI8Sg7IH_k1qKjtMgW3wqdqVpD4G1ri82UnUXamRg-nEFk76t4OCq8k5sv3wnSl59UgyljZKJ8C-MMuGPwl1KXJWJ-tHZL0hCAHpJhwZGk0w28lid3wS7eXMlzhI0PCt1G1cE4YYuqVW8YaLLntqZFfoSxENQh6Faihv_3HA%3D)**

clean_body: And I needed to reach out to tell you what is happening... | Friend, I just left Atlanta where I am fighting to secure our nation's elections and I wanted to reach out to fill you in. This meeting was a major step toward advancing election integrity in America’s elections. In order to improve election integrity in our country, we need to continue highlighting election integrity efforts nationwide– and during today’s meeting, we did just that. I’m working with my colleagues in Congress to pass the most conservative election reform in a generation. But the Democrats have been doing everything in their power to impede our ability to improve the electoral process on the national level, just as they did a couple of years ago in Georgia. Back in 2021 when Georgia passed a series of new election security measures, the radical Left made outrageous claims of “ Republican voter suppression” that led to the MLB pulling the All-Star game from Atlanta that year. After these election security measures passed, Georgians shattered voter turnout records in the following midterm election. Today, I proudly stood for election integrity. I will not back down. Stand with me as we move to pass the most conservative election reform in a generation. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

body:
This week, Senator Bill Eigel celebrated America’s 247th birthday in O’Fallon, Missouri. After participating in O’Fallon’s 4th of July Parade ... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billeigel/email-12613194?e=c00a6982d2)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
# HAPPY BIRTHDAY AMERICA! TEAM EIGEL LOOKING FOR STATEWIDE VOLUNTEERS AS CAMPAIGN HEADS INTO SUMMER
---
| [ ](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=b5a78dec6a&e=c00a6982d2)
---
| [VOLUNTEER](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=3ad4aff939&e=c00a6982d2 "VOLUNTEER")
---
| This week, Senator Bill Eigel celebrated America’s 247th birthday in O’Fallon, Missouri. After participating in O’Fallon’s 4th of July Parade in the morning, Eigel then met with residents and Republican voters at events scheduled in the afternoon.

“Every American birthday is special,” Eigel said. “It’s the time of year when we celebrate our common heritage as Americans. This is day when we are least likely to identify and divide ourselves along racial, gender, or partisan labels in favor of just being proud to have been born in the greatest country on Earth.”

Thousands of St Charles County residents attended the O’Fallon parade—one of several major parades in Missouri’s 3rd most populous county.

“This is the first time I’ve been a part of the O’Fallon parade, and it did not disappoint!” Eigel said with a smile. “Lot’s of flag-waving and energy...and yes, a LOT of candy for the kids as well. What a great day!”

After the 2-mile parade through downtown O’Fallon, Eigel attended an event with concerned residents and spoke about the progress of the Eigel for Governor campaign and his vision of a stronger Missouri.

“We had a great event after the parade—I spoke at length about the two things I see happening in Missouri politics once we elect the right leader to the Governor’s office. First—there is a reckoning coming for the swamp and status quo that consistently derails the biggest Republican initiatives that would prosper our state,” Eigel explained. “The powerful special interests benefitting only themselves—from the out of control spending and ever expanding government in Jefferson City—must be broken.”

“Second, we are going to implement conservative solutions that reduce the size of government, protect our citizens, and dramatically ease the tax burden on citizens and businesses to unleash the Show-Me state economy. Eliminating personal property tax, protecting kids and farmland, cutting spending—these will become the realities that get Missouri competing with Florida and Texas and Tennessee. Let’s Go Missouri!”

The Independence Day events coincided with the end of the calendar year quarter—and that quarter meant new milestone achievements for the Eigel for Governor campaign. By all metrics—polling, signups, and fundraising—the Eigel for Governor movement has never had so much momentum.

“I’m blown away by what our team accomplished in the 2nd quarter. We now have over 27,000 Missouri households signed up to support our campaign,” Eigel went on. “We are polling nearly even with the sitting Lt Governor, and our fundraising....well, we saw a level of investment in this campaign that is going to take a lot of insiders in Jefferson City by surprise.” Eigel said this last sentence with a slight smile, indicating he may be holding back some additional good news to come in the very near future.

“Yes, that is possible,” Eigel confirmed. “Stay tuned!”

Meanwhile, the Eigel for Governor campaign is looking for volunteers for the formal campaign expected to begin in late summer or early fall.

Patriots that are willing to do everything from placing an “Eigel for Governor” sign in their yard to volunteering to knock doors to hosting “Meet and Greet” opportunities in their local areas are needed!

Would you like to get involved with the Eigel for Governor campaign to ensure Missouri has the right leader in 2024?

Go to [www.billeigel.com/volunteer](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=7d8e7d7fe6&e=c00a6982d2) and sign up! We will contact you in the coming weeks as the exploratory phase of the campaign comes to an end and the next phase begins!!!

Let’s Go Missouri!!
---
