name: Susan Swecker
subject: Let’s get with the program!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
At the end of the day, control of the Virginia Legislature comes down to numbers. It has nothing to do with which races get the most press, or which races raise the most money.

|
---
Derek, I’m reaching out today to talk about our new TBTL program! Our Take Back the Legislature (or TBTL) program is designed specifically to use digital targeting to mobilize Virginia voters in the most vulnerable districts in our Commonwealth. At the end of the day, control of the Virginia Legislature comes down to numbers. It has nothing to do with which races get the most press, or which races raise the most money. And in order to capitalize on that fact, we’ve created a program to help us win seats purely on the basis of math. We will need $32k to fully fund the program, and we’re hoping to get started by the end of July. From costs associated with using CRMs for targeting and outreach, to bringing on additional digital support staff, we have some resources we need to raise quickly. [Will you please consider donating today, and helping us fully fund our new Take Back the Legislature program?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66325374/415967873/800907059?refcode=dpva-em-071123&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODU0Y2I2ZC1mNjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGVNvBtKS8zS1UGz4J8n8Pf02THeq5WzAHJkkcxNUGQ=) Susan Swecker, Chairwoman, Democratic Party of Virginia | **************[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66325379/415967886/264155582?refcode=dpva-em-071123&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODU0Y2I2ZC1mNjFmLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGVNvBtKS8zS1UGz4J8n8Pf02THeq5WzAHJkkcxNUGQ=)**************

clean_body: At the end of the day, control of the Virginia Legislature comes down to numbers. It has nothing to do with which races get the most press, or which races raise the most money. | Derek, I’m reaching out today to talk about our new TBTL program! Our Take Back the Legislature (or TBTL) program is designed specifically to use digital targeting to mobilize Virginia voters in the most vulnerable districts in our Commonwealth. At the end of the day, control of the Virginia Legislature comes down to numbers. It has nothing to do with which races get the most press, or which races raise the most money. And in order to capitalize on that fact, we’ve created a program to help us win seats purely on the basis of math. We will need $32k to fully fund the program, and we’re hoping to get started by the end of July. From costs associated with using CRMs for targeting and outreach, to bringing on additional digital support staff, we have some resources we need to raise quickly. = Susan Swecker, Chairwoman, Democratic Party of Virginia | ************=********** **********=********** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. name: Pro Life Update
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2fo9qi382r665nsotusfk7b1tffl7jpq6n38m18_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg60oj4chh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsgoqfa8tg0n2ipt4ohmgjoudpfus6peqt7fgkso_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg60oj4chh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1j2efeajips2en0ek62mvgkhicp5883tbddf9cg_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg60oj4chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjilmnqkhm3vtt1um5efnkufsclt9nfusfct2fag_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg60oj4chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

body:

Kelly and I are so blessed to share with you that we’ve raised more than $500,000 in the past few weeks, and we know it’s because of you and your generous support. Here in the campaign world, we know that there are no days off, and things seldom slow to a stop, but I think it’s incredibly important to stop for a moment to celebrate the wins, big and small – and this is a huge win. | [Unsubscribe](https://click.walker4nc.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_s=0a83ab4310f04447819a8d70a014fe5e&_t=JUMUBi7U6HIwnfids8kI6dLO6qF4sMsOhUWu0pnjxA7NfDdoC9BYhu0ZtT3VRbTpEWPHy3RdSDkWqmXK78N9jzpSy0JLWwW_oo81x1LReMo%3D) | [Mark as Junk](https://click.walker4nc.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_s=0a83ab4310f04447819a8d70a014fe5e&_t=JUMUBi7U6HIwnfids8kI6dLO6qF4sMsOhUWu0pnjxA7NfDdoC9BYhu0ZtT3VRbTpEWPHy3RdSDkWqmXK78N9jzpSy0JLWwW_oo81x1LReMo%3D)

---
Peter,

From the bottom of my heart, I want to extend a huge thank you.

I’m so excited to announce that we have surpassed the fundraising goal that we set at our launch. Kelly and I are so blessed to share with you that we’ve raised more than $550,000 in the past few weeks, **and we know it’s because of you and your generous support.**

Here in the campaign world, we know that there are no days off, and things seldom slow to a stop, but I think it’s incredibly important to stop for a moment to celebrate the wins, big and small – **and this is a huge win.**

Your support is the reason voters across North Carolina are going to help us secure the Governor's mansion in 2024 and bring conservative values back to our great state. I can’t thank you enough.

You’ve done so much to help me already, but if you feel inclined to help us start July off on the right foot, I would appreciate your support again.

Thank you for helping us save North Carolina.

Gratefully,

Mark and Kelly Walker

[** DONATE **](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=0a83ab4310f04447819a8d70a014fe5e&_e=RBP8ty5EMqR9LeU3Hv55kqdUVF6RKG0tcBA6jvDkitalr3i6mrvg3anJGVqMd-4CncJwMgJrNZPRRD2UWir-mGPv3NCJWDHEUx7Ut-wfQp5aE-4aXr-azutapu2dKcJBPp-EMNCogKfkTeeMSge_fApKwgm_ofUsMODsI8rYHRczwX0FzE58XbphecyuuwlcyHvB2EUPO2GAPoL20VlPnN-KOflODQRJaYNG4f1pKw-GmuwJ-Oci_1sS_aNzdDW-M4CqIHOzWPj0xG9p9RZKfyPruHmRdABNZadT0a_-stXpDIKaJU_ST40x3a01YJAc8D0MS3oynChA_vKZw0w-KYDqClEOcqvvnAbIbLaTP5UneM_26vAy2Ig5xRo94atL)

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

* * *

subject: we've got good news AND bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8XXk5UoBB1HkOBhM14A1J2DkRQ8jVE0zdeHjJqbQzBNCbDDuzBBLJOMEHq7it4PkTdYOhmWJ5uu8jmA9-MTbV9z9acgTXrGIY_lcayB_pl0cp43Nl3QkbP3gofm_PFxMSNJlGhd16RRF-TRjPnDvxEWpfkrHJzrf5pLGH3D0mqQioOsBGFcGd9s_Q2YquQc0k9UM3dH0dpVbBe01u7JMlti8tg3QRITYdWqG0CgQ74ZMc5YEsTIcd4_QtSRFTRQXLewxiWhw2L4F4DTLsfUHkROEnGHbB8fN0MSQs9AAVyFp9aITGoqmI8oH59LPpkQyAgiEL-SFJidgZOymWsaEdxw/3xs/26rOFJWFQ1Oa1DFwVRSmpg/h0/QpHZApkuf9zXT9wbwBmSnbsz6utlxU8A2i_wKOW0XnE)
| | _PETER, THERE ARE NO BLACK WOMEN IN THE SENATE!!_ **GOOD NEWS:** There are 3 extremely qualified Black Democratic women running for Senate in 2024!

**BAD NEWS:** These are all open seats and MAGA Republicans are going to fight like hell to try and pick them up in 2024.

**GOOD NEWS:** We’re no strangers to tough races. In 2020 we provided over 70,000 rides to the polls in the Georgia runoffs. In 2022, we contacted 3.1 MILLION Black voters and invested over one MILLION dollars into Black Democratic candidates.

**BAD NEWS:** Doing that work costs money, and we’re already starting to fall behind on our July fundraising goal. If we can’t pick up the pace now, we might not be able to power ANY of our endorsed candidates to victory.

**GOOD NEWS:** [ Grassroots donors like you can make all the difference. Will you chip in $10 or more to help us reach our July fundraising goal? clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | PETER, THERE ARE NO BLACK WOMEN IN THE SENATE!! GOOD NEWS: There are 3 extremely qualified Black Democratic women running for Senate in 2024! BAD NEWS: These are all open seats and MAGA Republicans are going to fight like hell to try and pick them up in 2024. GOOD NEWS: We’re no strangers to tough races. In 2020 we provided over 70,000 rides to the polls in the Georgia runoffs. In 2022, we contacted 3.1 MILLION Black voters and invested over one MILLION dollars into Black Democratic candidates. BAD NEWS: Doing that work costs money, and we’re already starting to fall behind on our July fundraising goal. If we can’t pick up the pace now, we might not be able to power ANY of our endorsed candidates to victory. GOOD NEWS: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Elizabeth Warren HQ
subject: Tax the rich. Have a PRIME day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate

Today — and every day — is a great time to affirm that we must tax the rich, and we’ve gotta campaign for this plan loud and proud with union-printed merch. Who knows, if you wear your new merch in the right place at the right time, you might just make a billionaire cry.

body:
We’re up against MAGA Republicans who will do anything to stop our momentum

---
| Peter,

We’re so excited! Every top Democrat is rallying around gun violence prevention legislation and passing an assault weapons ban → **✅ President Joe Biden
✅ Senator Chris Murphy
✅ Senator Amy Klobuchar
✅ Senator Raphael Warnock
✅ Congresswoman Lucy McBeth!** This is GREAT news! This is the support we need to pass gun safety legislation, Peter.

_But listen, we’re up against MAGA Republicans who will do anything to stop our momentum and crush any gun violence prevention legislation brought to the floor._

That’s why we’re working to do everything in our power to ensure a gun violence prevention majority in the House and Senate in 2024.

Stop Gun Violence PAC is committed to electing gun violence prevention champions at all levels of government, but the NRA is already building a massive war chest ahead of the 2024 elections, so we need your help. name: 2023 Membership Services
subject: We’re giving you one more chance to stay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2a4uo6aga62fsou2h97lq2j0boljaorlko50sk0_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg64o30c3h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbhkg51d0sgtmjq7vunpb6r9uhgih27rfrg2k5ug_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg64o30c3h2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmmctcldn4ketje52u3heajp3e1d8594mc2evugg_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg64o30c3h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zq3til2i38jkeoj7dmghoqalgocmhki6mp68p4r8_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg64o30c3h2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zokci9bal6gidvmg4kk1ervfp1e8v6h4hogkf5b0_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg64o30c3h2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m at my wits’ end

|
---
| | |
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661283%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PmW1JIH4JjzLslnaMa7Ohg&sysid=1 "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661284%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vs4Z1j%2fTqeHvBdpHa0JWFg&sysid=1 "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden’s plan to destroy our nation.

I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661295%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LCs%2f01J8OfzxOBkGjpr6QA&sysid=1 "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661295%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LCs%2f01J8OfzxOBkGjpr6QA&sysid=1 "DONATE TODAY")

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: We need you to know this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
A better future is possible
#

Friends -
People are dying every day in America from preventable gun violence.
It doesn’t have to be this way.
We don’t have to live in a country where we fear for our lives in what should be safe spaces in our communities—our neighborhoods, our grocery stores, our schools, our places of worship.
[**We won’t rest until a future without gun violence is a reality in our country. If you’re with us, will you please contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us keep moving forward in this important fight?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230711-1-15&t=1&akid=6119%2E3935704%2E9GrV0m)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230711-1-15&t=2&akid=6119%2E3935704%2E9GrV0m)**
We understand that there are many hard days in this fight. Sometimes, the challenges may seem insurmountable.
But we need you to know that a better future is possible. As Gabby always says, the fights worth having are rarely easy.
There is no one solution to solve the complex gun violence crisis in our nation. The status quo is not working, but we can change our course. That's why we have to keep up the fight to enact a variety of gun safety laws at the federal level, like universal background checks, extreme risk protection orders (red flag laws), and safe storage laws.
[**So please. Contribute $3 today and help us work towards a future free from gun violence in our nation.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230711-1-15&t=3&akid=6119%2E3935704%2E9GrV0m)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-july23.m2TE3G&refcode=em230711-1-15&t=25&akid=6119%2E3935704%2E9GrV0m)**

Thank you,
The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

FIRST , Colin Allred launched his campaign and shattered Texas fundraising records on day one!

name: Rachel Patterson, Evergreen
subject: Getting federal investments to those who need it most
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
What Justice40 looks like in action
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3139?t=2&akid=13504%2E53494%2ECILTk1)
---
| | Friend, The Inflation Reduction Act is bringing historic funding to the clean energy transition, but it's not enough to just pour billions of dollars into the economy. **We also have to direct that money toward those who need it the most.** That's where **Justice40** comes in—ensuring at least 40 percent of the benefits from federal climate investments go to communities that have been historically underserved and overburdened by pollution.
**Last week, I had the opportunity to sit down and talk with my colleague Dr. Shelley Francis from EVHybridNoire.** Alongside other collaborators, we published a report on one of the first major uses of Justice40 in the U.S., showing how it can work to benefit communities. We shared the dos and don'ts of thoughtful, effective Justice40 implementation, and discussed how states can work with impacted communities to get the most out of federal funding.
---
[CHECK OUT OUR CONVERSATION](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4663?t=4&akid=13504%2E53494%2ECILTk1)
---
Our conversation ranged from addressing environmental justice in the transportation sector to what communities and a box of chocolates have in common! **I learned so much from Dr. Francis, including new ways to think about public engagement and equitable planning, and I'm confident you will too. **
---
[READ NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4683?t=6&akid=13504%2E53494%2ECILTk1)
---
Sincerely, Rachel Patterson Deputy Director of PolicyEvergreen Collaborative
---

That's where Justice40 comes in—ensuring at least 40 percent of the benefits from federal climate investments go to communities that have been historically underserved and overburdened by pollution. body:

Hey, Fellow American,

I know I’ve been reaching out a lot, but it’s been a while since I heard back from you. Is everything okay?

name: CPT Sam Brown
subject: Taking a stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
I shouldn’t be alive, Friend.

| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zujg1f6vmk7h4uk99pl4uv309830k0d5k7djvk20_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg6co76cdh2bs)
---
| | I shouldn't be alive, Friend. When I was serving in Afghanistan, a roadside bomb blew up under the gas tank of my vehicle. I burned alive for what felt like an eternity as I came to terms with my mortality.
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztou4j51tmh01k9cihprk9mag38d1chcoaduevug_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg6co76cdh2bs)
---
I thought it would be the end of me, but by the grace of God, I survived. I got a second chance at life, and there's no way I'm going to waste it by only looking out for myself. [**That 's why I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Nevada**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrugqlkl28v2ns0nn9pkdnefevb05l64vg2ja3n8_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg6co76cdh2bs) -- not because it's easy. But because the reason I'm still alive today _is to serve_. Our nation is in crisis and our so-called "leaders" have gone AWOL. With an economy in shambles, unprecedented threats from our adversaries, a wide open border, and D.C. politicians like NV Sen. Jacky Rosen failing to tackle our challenges head on, our nation is on a collision course with total disaster. **Too often, politicians only work to serve themselves while forgetting about the people they swore to serve. They see a challenge and they run the other way.** Well, Friend, I've survived my fair share of challenges, and I'm willing to take this one head on -- because even though I'm no longer on active duty, I haven't given up on my commitment to service. Our country, our state, and our people deserve a Senator who's proven that they'll put everything on the line for America, just as I have. That's why I want to deploy to Washington D.C. for a new mission with the same goal: [**Serving our great country.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z68eg5k15mbba68t1vkbj4drkc054q0algl34tb0_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg6co76cdh2bs) Friend, can I count on you to have my back on my next mission? [**Chip in ANY AMOUNT >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z69ic54bmc5kk5vck82h3dku991g807te3v7tv9o_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg6co76cdh2bs) This is our country and our fight. I won't back down. Duty First,
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z67om74unbja1n1vsh64vjvuf4h6v2k6cla145co_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg6co76cdh2bs)
---
CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.)
---

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Every person and every place matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It's clear that the Democratic pathway to economic prosperity, freedom, and inclusion is working.
#
Peter,
Democrats have made many sizable, popular accomplishments recently — everything from protecting marriage equality to passing a major gun safety law. But the largest achievement of all is the fundamental shift in economic policy over the past two years.**It's what we call Bidenomics 1.**
**What specifically is Bidenonmics?** It's the fundamental belief that we can rewrite the rules of the economy to make it work for the left-behind, the marginalized, the lost and forgotten, the working people and poor people of every community.
**Peter, Democrats are determined and dedicated to the fight to make our economy work for everyone — not just the privileged few.**[**Chip in today to continue powering our work to smash the status quo and usher in a better quality of life for all Americans and working people.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42686?refcode=em20230711-2690&t=1&akid=2690%2E420207%2EqBPkwi)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42686?refcode=em20230711-2690&t=20&akid=2690%2E420207%2EqBPkwi)**
Bidenomics has created a record 12 million new jobs, lowered the unemployment rate to 3.4%, increased wages for hourly workers, and lowered inflation significantly.
It's clear that the Democratic pathway to economic prosperity, freedom, and inclusion is working. And we must continue to use every tool at our disposal to continue calling for and enacting better and stronger policies for all Americans, no matter your race or ZIP code. **Because every person, and every place matters.**
**Now, in President Biden's words, let's finish the job.**[**Please consider contributing to our movement today so that we can keep the pressure on those with the power to make change, and continue fighting for a stronger, more inclusive future for us all.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42686?refcode=em20230711-2690&t=21&akid=2690%2E420207%2EqBPkwi)
Let's do that,
Pramila Jayapal
* * *
1 - [Bidenomics: Policies that lift up all Americans ](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42677?t=22&akid=2690%2E420207%2EqBPkwi)

Because every person, and every place matters. Now, in President Biden's words, let's finish the job. Let's do that, Pramila Jayapal 1 - | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: New Episode Alert! Culture Wars Rage On, Vacation Adventures, and Is Uncle Joe About To Exit Stage Left?
body:
Dear No Doubt About It Podcast listeners,

We hope you had a great holiday week and are ready for another exciting episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast!

In this episode, we have a special guest joining us - Victory News Anchor Mike Garofalo. Together, we embark on a journey filled with adventure and discovery, as we recount our recent trip to Grand Lake. From unexpected rules to breathtaking landscapes, we share our experiences and, wait for it, we also unravel the infamous McDonald's Coke mystery. Trust us, you don't want to miss it!

→ WATCH HERE: https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=9dc1a5d636&e=567664f14c

But that's just the beginning. Our discussion takes an intriguing turn as we delve into the intense controversy surrounding the film, The Sound of Freedom.

We analyze its media coverage, explore the shocking events during its release, and discuss the supportive reactions from influential figures like UFC president Dana White and actor Mel Gibson while the media tries unsuccessfully to sink the film.

→ WATCH HERE: https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3f2cf32b99&e=567664f14c

We address a truly jaw-dropping moment when a Catholic Church leader questioned the Lord's Prayer. Yes, you read that right.

What follows is a discussion into the complexities of raising faith-based families in today's secular world, the uproar surrounding a trans competitor in a formerly female beauty pageant, and even touch upon some absurd climate change headlines.

And of course, we can't forget to discuss local issues, from wildfires to crime rates.

We also evaluate the current state of the 2024 presidential race and examine the possibility of Joe Biden stepping down.

The media's shifting narrative around his character is something we discuss at length with Mike Garofalo. We invite you to hang in there with us until the end as we wrap up our conversation.

→ YouTube: https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=73a0efbf2f&e=567664f14c

Thank you for your time and unwavering support. We truly appreciate each and every one of you. We hope you thoroughly enjoy this episode and that it sparks meaningful conversations among your circles. Stay tuned for more exciting content in the near future!

- Mark and Krysty

P.S. Check out our website to see ALL the places you can watch or listen and subscribe to the No Doubt About It Podcast: https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b8707cf233&e=567664f14c

→ Forward this email to a friend:
https://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=7ab30c5c08&e=567664f14c

==============================================

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com from this list:
https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=7ab30c5c08

Our mailing address is:
Choose Adventure Media
8908 N Oakland Ct NE
Albuquerque, NM 87122
USA

Our telephone:
5056814159

Update your profile:
https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=7ab30c5c08

name: GA House Democrats
subject: Georgia is a key state in the 2024 elections.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC Georgia House Democratic Caucus
body:
Peter

According to [https://centerforpolitics.org/crystalball/articles/electoral-college-ratings-expect-another-highly-competitive-election/] Sabato’s Crystal Ball , Georgia is one of only four toss-up states in the upcoming 2024 election.

What does that mean? It’s up to us, as Georgians, to keep our state blue and deliver a win for Democrats.

How can you help?

1) Support voter registration efforts.
The GOP is trying to make it hard for Democratic-leaning constituents to vote. Get involved and help get people registered. Ask friends to check their voter registration [https://www.sos.ga.gov/how-to-guide/how-guide-registering-vote] . [https://www.sos.ga.gov/how-to-guide/how-guide-registering-vote]

2) Make your voice heard.
Reach out to your state representatives to say “NO” to the radical Republican agenda that is curtailing our rights. Find your representatives here. [https://www.legis.ga.gov/find-my-legislator]

3) Support the Georgia House Democrats
Your donations help us raise awareness and recruit Democratic candidates to take a Majority in the House.

Chip in $25 today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=230711-GeorgiaKey-button1]

It’s never too early to step up, especially given that we can have such a big impact in 2024. Chip in $25 today to help us deliver a blue Georgia and keep radical Republicans at bay. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=230711-GeorgiaKey-link1]

Onwards,
Georgia House Democrats

The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia. To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. Will you join the movement for a blue Georgia by donating today?

# Help me carry the torch for America First policies
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Friends, The other GOP candidates won’t say, but President Trump is still the leader of our party![**But President Trump will likely NOT be at the debate in Augst (as he’s said before). That’s why I need to make it to the debate stage. I need you to donate $1 or more RIGHT NOW to help me grow my list of donors to qualify.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=d41de8016c&e=0be619cbaa) If Donald Trump doesn’t debate and I can’t qualify, who should carry the torch for America First policies? Chris Christie? Asa Hutchinson? NO CHANCE. These RINOS are only running to hurt Donald Trump and make sure the Democrats win in 2024. **Republicans who want to win must find an America First candidate to champion on the debate stage to ensure the policies of Donald Trump – which are the policies you and I also share – are highlighted in August to the world.** Please don’t misunderstand, I am **not against Donald Trump**. I am for winning in 2024 and if we allow the other candidates to dominate the debate stage, we’ll only hear them run away from America First policies, because like the Democrats, the other candidates don’t like Donald Trump and what he stands for. I am that America First candidate. **You can count on me** to promote policies that grow our economy, strengthen our national security, harness America’s energy resources, tighten our border, cut the bureaucracy, and restore sanity in Washington. Just like President Trump. [**But I need your help. The RNC and the establishment are making it impossible to get me on the debate stage. Can I count on you to join my growing list of supporters by donating any amount today? Your contribution of any size helps me earn a spot on the GOP presidential primary debate stage.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=ef32469d57&e=0be619cbaa)
---
Thank you for your support, **Larry Elder
**America First Candidate for President

name: Michelle Vallejo
subject: I’ll be relentless in this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress
body:
Access to quality healthcare should never be determined by wealth or connections. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03dSz6b59BMPVbOgWchaGu2EeLtW4ciebz2t7pUfxOoNi997ENHuS92zWllhthqX8btudzvmlPDA8gRPlHqMu6ozDPC0I2ssTbcVk3TJwTVwQcyRug8HiAomgU5lNW8jQOGPO6v8N8ePZbc48qJo1_ec5AXWW92F3v55Wt_284b8_4/3xs/UuJKGIUGR4a8EE5qNbLUbw/h0/7Mbome3Yo3VymUpBddYqVS4CaalqbaA_w5NbocQDuAI)
---
One of the biggest issues facing Texas today is the issue of healthcare. Too many Texans are uninsured or underinsured, unable to afford basic healthcare that everyone deserves. Too many of us have stories of being denied care or going into debt to pay for treatments or picking up second jobs to pay exorbitant healthcare bills. Too many folks are rationing insulin and other life-saving medications because the costs are simply too high. **Peter, access to quality healthcare should never be determined by wealth or connections. It's a fundamental right for all, not a privilege reserved for a few.** **[When I’m in Congress, I'll be relentless in my fight to ensure healthcare is accessible and affordable for every American. Will you make a donation of any amount to support this campaign and help me get there so I can fight to make healthcare the human right that it is?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_Es4QOLgPOBWEO0hm3jcIM0VqupB9bNOLa2w5RqJo0sHTZDtOvv_2Kcoy0fkD-x7gWAJyy69Ilq1UknPG8thWOt6TTBO1JAoqHvdSKhxvmaXTY8I2a9mtk9WdlOcekOm5akAf9us_Diwg2fdo_w7LnXc2_ArgjCH-rirmcxXuJjyAc5Bj-w--tO1RVFrmHe3IAWhURvjvp1eBTZlV5B1xT039_Qxkf2Z8NaJKupoHphSK4pYxPnna9nCYvIlC5-sKIZaJDotSISrzLr3GlwMbhNO4xqD3r4v0JeCzECtreq0mtV-YQtiJDZjA4k2OhLOw7b1fmb5WfJoVO5w418M7mA/3xs/UuJKGIUGR4a8EE5qNbLUbw/h1/tt3_bmexo0wJX9vTqSwtgLI8dS_8cfq1MIyk0yrhJ70)** **[Donate](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_Es4QOLgPOBWEO0hm3jcIMyzj1kA9lBDnuvOZ_tzJRq7-qLQ4k_FFmzgPjEbpWPQLm8pSihF-5GY_HBU-1NcP-BpQZuGCtp0sPyVeUMpI8mPFTnI_dcAW4o8qrl9lUsM4iartQJ1gzu2SLHUF4V83v6nSnb0aT647ZxMKfNS88ojEZiX87N6RpKIiEv3D1VRVA4lmRw3VyzZrEaz-Snb1HoGUQuzsOigGNWVcslINnskohR6RIdzjOBQJzsWu5IZav07-gvPFXlpz6glj_BLo62o9tFFr7BssNm-N85apkgwchqw_qaZHWnwZxl7B73y5FZy64euNjLSR06ITEAH3kA/3xs/UuJKGIUGR4a8EE5qNbLUbw/h2/VZVDVC92p5ytscOmbDqQ6CJXtBW3Hn0Z254psbEFWZA)** Who you are, where you’re from, what language you speak best, or how much money you make should NEVER determine your access to quality, affordable healthcare. No one should have to cross a border to get healthcare, and too many folks in South Texas are forced to do just that, crossing state lines and country borders just to get access to the healthcare they need. Whether that care is reproductive care or prescription medications, everyone deserves to have access to high quality, affordable healthcare right where they are. **[When I’m in Congress, we’re going to build a healthcare system that truly serves each and every single one of us. clean_body: Access to quality healthcare should never be determined by wealth or connections. | | | One of the biggest issues facing Texas today is the issue of healthcare. Too many Texans are uninsured or underinsured, unable to afford basic healthcare that everyone deserves. Too many of us have stories of being denied care or going into debt to pay for treatments or picking up second jobs to pay exorbitant healthcare bills. Too many folks are rationing insulin and other life-saving medications because the costs are simply too high. Peter, access to quality healthcare should never be determined by wealth or connections. It's a fundamental right for all, not a privilege reserved for a few. Who you are, where you’re from, what language you speak best, or how much money you make should NEVER determine your access to quality, affordable healthcare. No one should have to cross a border to get healthcare, and too many folks in South Texas are forced to do just that, crossing state lines and country borders just to get access to the healthcare they need. Whether that care is reproductive care or prescription medications, everyone deserves to have access to high quality, affordable healthcare right where they are. Juntos, we can! Michelle Vallejo | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

Donald J. Trump July 11th, 2023
**Bedminster, NJ —** President Donald J. Trump is honored to receive endorsements from the entire Republican Congressional Delegation from Michigan.
In 2016, President Trump became the first Republican in 28 years to win Michigan in a Presidential Election, and he looks forward to working with this team to win Michigan’s 15 Electoral Votes next November.
“We're proud to announce our full endorsement of President Donald J. Trump,” said U.S. Representatives Tim Walberg, Bill Huizenga, John Moolenaar, Jack Bergman, and Lisa McClain.
“Under the Trump presidency, America was prosperous, the economy was strong, the world was a safer place, and Michiganders were better off. President Trump has proven he has the ability to deliver results on Day One and also the ability to win in key battleground states like Michigan, being the only Republican to win a Presidential race here since 1988.”
“Under his leadership, Michigan received increased funding to protect our Great Lakes and a new lock at the Soo Locks, improving one of our most important infrastructure projects in North America. President Trump will rebuild a great American economy, unleash domestic energy, secure our border, and make America safe again.”
U.S. Representative John James added, “President Biden has wrecked our economy, let our position as the sole world power slip, and opened our borders. Biden’s policies have been particularly detrimental to Michigan’s middle-class. Under President Trump on the other hand, inflation was at 2%, the American family was strengthened through the child tax credit and other pro-family policies, and our communities were more secure. In 2024, we need to give hope to Americans who feel like their government is failing them.”
_**Trump 2024 Michigan Federal Leadership Team**_
Congressman Tim Walberg, U.S. Representative from Michigan’s 5th Congressional District
Congressman Bill Huizenga, U.S. Representative from Michigan’s 4th Congressional District
Congressman John Moolenaar, U.S. Representative from Michigan’s 2nd Congressional District
Congressman Jack Bergman, U.S. Representative from Michigan’s 1st Congressional District
Congresswoman Lisa McClain, U.S. Representative from Michigan’s 9th Congressional District
Congressman John James, U.S. Representative from Michigan’s 10th Congressional District

name: LucasKunce.com
subject: Your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
[survey] Lucas isn’t running this campaign like other politicians. He needs your feedback to guide our strategy + message →
#
We’ve seen countless examples of our country’s broken status quo, Peter.
Big Brother attacks on abortion access. Unchecked insider trading. Insulin cartels. Unfettered monopoly power. All while corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley refuse to invest in the people and communities that make our country strong — and use every ounce of their own power to control our lives.
But unlike those politicians, Lucas isn’t taking cues from shady insiders, corporate elites, or mega-donors in this race. He’s building a movement that puts everyday people like you in the driver’s seat. **That’s why we’re reaching out today:**
**[Will you take a moment today to share your thoughts with Lucas by filling out our July 2023 priorities survey? Peter,

I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, _**“why are you doing this?”**_

**Here is what I tell them:** it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. **I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America.**
**
When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track.

It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign on Tuesday. **

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ca9354f2ed684647b11b4417a8b0c596&_e=StAhHRVpNhSPk19e7F3jzbNmx22zLjSx5X8nvU3pgHCIRBCoBmqSIpFhTBEeW8T-T53HCSQUFa75-MVDurbU7P9xRpBsv9gZ1yptxMeI8zmgDhPjp7j1LiIlJWBCYY_AEuxs2FmWgcXhR7lQicnVd0xcNVzZ6bnf7MuznH6654BXZhHrkvCuDNIQcZYAPlB3X65_87MCrqUwJwGRpjS4aMMjJrZslmmkfuscFEeUL4LbCEthxaaekj2OxJK0ZA7eW9hDGKWPPs_HVg8QKPLdi8Qixr7IIRoG2EXrn9F4aqP31fIcsLZyHoSoHvZ7xL3zDAfI15Xl8Sy6fVeo0_8_mBJET3R9ahiVoAIFX9b6eGZrSl7J8lUuR0CsYv7rFEs7jEEHakghqcCS98FG0l4Ua1HKYglQxPgKrdO0QCqUQOw%3D)

**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ca9354f2ed684647b11b4417a8b0c596&_e=StAhHRVpNhSPk19e7F3jzbNmx22zLjSx5X8nvU3pgHCIRBCoBmqSIpFhTBEeW8T-T53HCSQUFa75-MVDurbU7P9xRpBsv9gZ1yptxMeI8zmgDhPjp7j1LiIlJWBCYY_AEuxs2FmWgcXhR7lQicnVd0xcNVzZ6bnf7MuznH6654BXZhHrkvCuDNIQcZYAPlB3X65_87MCrqUwJwGRpjS4aMMjJrZslmmkfuscFEeUL4LbCEthxaaekj2OxJK0ZA7eW9hDGKWPPs_HVg8QKPLdi7sScIJI98euEzA2puexaB_iuUqtLwYhmAXy9oJRRTuHLRc_deltn3tZE7GTHY4ASjWV85WPx39aXYq0mbx_mTVsD5victYO-ioJPWJlng-UwWH9HE2-bBCZCuEMNsUeNQ6KOoebu4peqoQwEZmhf3c%3D)
I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. **[If you’re able to chip in a few dollars](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ca9354f2ed684647b11b4417a8b0c596&_e=StAhHRVpNhSPk19e7F3jzbNmx22zLjSx5X8nvU3pgHCIRBCoBmqSIpFhTBEeW8T-T53HCSQUFa75-MVDurbU7P9xRpBsv9gZ1yptxMeI8zmgDhPjp7j1LiIlJWBCYY_AEuxs2FmWgcXhR7lQicnVd0xcNVzZ6bnf7MuznH6654BXZhHrkvCuDNIQcZYAPlB3X65_87MCrqUwJwGRpjS4aMMjJrZslmmkfuscFEeUL4LbCEthxaaekj2OxJK0ZA7eW9hDGKWPPs_HVg8QKPLdi0EVxBkc5o3_dcncvKaVYzA-vPCbRbt_y4Q60i-e8NBZNGTGKbl_2yHtjblQxUv6KCeGFhT9uzwYuJqIvs-Tcbd43W07uDt5HtME-nfRxuhRQHrDPTeZd_qDtcXAl3hY_GX6i9wPTXcCUrPFJfYsziE%3D)** before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground.

clean_body: Putting oneself at the greatest point of impact is necessary to get things done. | | Peter, I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, “why are you doing this?” Here is what I tell them: it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America. When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track. It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign on Tuesday. I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground. I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. Our campaign is about service, God, and country, not politics as usual. Hooyah, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. body:
Sign the petition RIGHT HERE RIGHT NOW >>

| |

---
| | | **NATIONAL PETITION:
Drop all criminal charges against President Donald J. Trump**
---
| | | [SIGN YOUR NAME](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2aqnqvq4ri00v4l9poipoc0nuic06cp6bkprdro_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg6eob4cdh2bs "SIGN YOUR NAME")
---
Fellow Americans:

President Trump is facing CENTURIES IN PRISON because Biden's Justice Department and Alvin Bragg - the rogue Manhattan DA - are throwing the book at him.

Mark Levin hit the nail on the head: _" President Trump is 76 years old. If the Department of Justice gets its way, he will die in federal prison."_

Let's not beat around the bush. This is a highly political, coordinated hatchet job designed to DESTROY the frontrunner for the Republican nomination for President.

The only way we let them win is FAILING to speak up for the rule of law.

**[That's why we launched our FIRST-EVER nationwide petition calling on these political operatives to drop all criminal charges against President Donald J. Trump. Will you be one of the first signatures?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvtj77ukgpnu5j7p7aq77v8f91h90rn99gjf80hg_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg6eob4cdh2bs "That’s why we launched our FIRST-EVER nationwide petition calling on these political operatives to drop all criminal charges against President Donald J. Trump. Will you be one of the first signatures?")**
---
| | | [SIGN YOUR NAME](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu5828c17ghn2qhu44v3lg9p2auj5ki5c3d8ab70_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg6eob4cdh2bs "SIGN YOUR NAME")
---
We know not everyone is up for this. We know there will be some out there who don't think this is a big deal or don't think they can make a difference...

But we have a hunch there are millions more out there who have the guts to stand up for what's right.

**That 's why we're searching for brave Patriots from every state in America to go on record and call on these partisan prosecutors to DROP ALL CRIMINAL CHARGES against Trump immediately.**

If you consider yourself to be a brave Patriot, we DESPERATELY want to hear from you.

**[Sign the petition now using any of these secure links.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh165hljc06n1qm79qaf49mo0l2dm25di1k6hms8_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg6eob4cdh2bs "Sign the petition now using any of these secure links.")**

Thank you,
House GOP

subject: “Amazon Loophole” could hand you $28,544 in “royalty” payouts
body:
Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole...

| **" Amazon Loophole" could hand you $28,544 in "royalty" payouts** [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91df431a661d4a82b5f6bb7875e9caf4&_e=wQiXuqPpsVD9ZgnuK19p462Qlnt4RvfscDBVla8aspy8QOGmx1E6Q8JI0SFSGpBCdpEEyfiBZ9yobABuBOJkFWMqkrRW7zOYfdUnV93UGBTLYkv-_ekcYhHnH5xL5h0BILTipm6rozHgCz4w8kOwaLtnkSm0FJ9ipSt0W-D1k1j2vUiMfj1Rr1GGhtEUVhZJ1w9U6VRK1zVytz59Z9g_iAtHp-nCzWFDdMioTYaaS1OLyFCUqjuzQlgyX2urv1htc9imfJLhpqSJ2Utlt9YHQRYBhpQ7pqofFfaDx1EyCOo%3D) Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole... Regular Americans can **collect up to $28,544 (or more)** in payouts from what Brad Thomas calls the "Amazon secret royalty program..." And the best part is, there are:
* NO age or income requirements... (It's available to anyone 18+ or older)
* NO employment requirements... (You can be working part-time, full-time, or even be retired)
* And you NEVER have to shop or sell a single product on Amazon... (It only takes 5 minutes to set up!)

See how to collect the next payout before the strict cutoff deadline. **[Watch short video now.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91df431a661d4a82b5f6bb7875e9caf4&_e=wQiXuqPpsVD9ZgnuK19p462Qlnt4RvfscDBVla8aspy8QOGmx1E6Q8JI0SFSGpBCdpEEyfiBZ9yobABuBOJkFWMqkrRW7zOYfdUnV93UGBTLYkv-_ekcYhHnH5xL5h0BILTipm6rozHgCz4w8kOwaOcmOOnvMt9urdpK7W15rHArDbc4m_EazSN9JLjQsqX2O4lJ1SCt9tuwr0iKFhCHX82WzcCP5F3bETDbJwSiganNTBk7AqIC__ueAMO1aQhVpRAnb0z8MRqmn8iITJ3MrHKJ67MLtW4ovVRqP8RgZlU%3D)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20For=20Congress?=
subject: Dave Min Raises Over $400,000 In Second Quarter
body:
Min, Who Is Running To Succeed Katie Porter, With Her Endorsement, Has Raised Nearly $1 Million Since Entering the Race | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2e2b1b95c4f1/dave-min-raises-over-400000-in-second-quarter-15658524?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** July 10, 2023
**Contact:**[**press@davemin.com**](mailto:press@davemin.com) **Dave Min Raises Over $400,000 In Second Quarter**
_Min, Who Is Running To Succeed Katie Porter, With Her Endorsement, Has Raised Nearly $1 Million Since Entering the Race – with NO Self-funding Or Donations From Corporate PACs or Big Oil_
**Impressive Fundraising Haul Comes On The Heels Of Polling Showing Min Beating Likely Republican Nominee** **IRVINE, CA —** Today, State Senator Dave Min reported raising over $400,000 from April 1 to June 30 for his campaign for Congress in California’s 47th Congressional District. This is the second quarter of impressive fundraising for Dave Min, whose coalition of support includes Congresswoman Katie Porter, SEIU California, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, and more than 125 local and state elected officials. California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that is being vacated by Rep. Porter, who is running for U.S. Senate. California’s 47th is being heavily targeted by Republicans–Rep. Richard Hudson, the chair of the NRCC this cycle, has called the district “probably our best pickup opportunity in the country.” The announcement comes a few weeks after a [Public Policy Polling](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=7d7a7f4c3e&e=7017cc100e) poll showed Min with a commanding lead against his likely Republican opponent in the 2024 General Election. “**With Republicans calling their shot, California’s 47th needs a candidate who knows how to run a strong campaign and has a track record of winning here in a tough district** ,” said Orrin Evans, senior advisor to the Dave Min for Congress campaign. “**Working families in Orange County know that Dave Min represents something different than the old tired politics of talking out of both sides of your mouth. Dave Min is a fighter who wins elections and delivers on his promises. We’re so thankful for the tremendous support we’ve received since this campaign kicked off in January, and we’re excited about the grassroots movement we’re building that is going to keep this seat Blue**.” It’s important to consider the source of the funding as well. Notably,**Min’s fundraising to date includes no money from corporate PACs and no loans from the candidate.** Min has also signed the No Fossil Fuel Money Pledge, and his list of donors reflects those commitments. Considering fundraising and endorsements in tandem tells a compelling story about Dave Min’s general election viability. While approaching $1 million raised, he’s also consolidated support from local, state, and national endorsers. In recent weeks, Min has announced endorsements from the Service Employees International Union (SEIU), the California Federation of Teachers (CFT), the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) Local 47, UFCW Local 324, Teamsters Joint Council 42, California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, State Treasurer Fiona Ma, Insurance Commissioner Ricardo Lara, Superintendent of Public Instruction Tony Thurmond, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, more than 50 local Orange County government officials, and more than 60 state legislators. A full endorsement list is available[ here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=af23cac8e4&e=7017cc100e). Dave Min is the Democrats’ most viable candidate in the race, having entered the contest with the endorsement of the outgoing incumbent Katie Porter. Min currently represents over 80% of the 47th Congressional District in the State Senate, and won CA-47 during that election by over 5% in 2020, a tough year for Orange County Democrats. Just after the end of 2023’s first quarter, former Congressman Harley Rouda ended his bid for the 47th, leaving Min as the only Democrat in the race with previous campaign, legislative or federal policy experience. Senator Min, the only Korean-American in the state legislature, serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. Min has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on hate crimes, gun violence prevention, family safety, and women’s reproductive rights. In the wake of the 2021 Huntington Beach Oil Spill, he stood up to the oil industry and led efforts to end offshore drilling. Min serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. He previously chaired the Senate Cybersecurity Select Committee. Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law. He resides with his wife Jane Stoever, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout.
######
_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._
---

body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5qhj2krc1m60pbd1nnd60saqc5435r6qj0v6n1o_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg69oj4cph2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd52jl1b4l2d3j2j5coe7vr4lv22cohv6ol2081g_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg69oj4cph2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo8vejre3fm1i9hj8g8ev6nmno59kjgcacnejj98_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg69oj4cph2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5i4ab7g045ul1rmm1dc2bpsp5m1g5hhdd6hf9to_rp22sh2s8i66o74shg69oj4cph2bs)

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28621%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AHjG%2fAEbLju2e12FwurDMA&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28622%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QMEvHDV7WY4RL7IjKDO91Q&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28623%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W6MxD9viNS1DyTj3Vgfjdw&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28624%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Nau1dxqIBR0leJUAwpt2zw&sysid=1)
---

body:
Last night, the first Republican opponent launched his campaign to unseat Greg and flip OH-01 back to red.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66337846/416008373/-1207523720?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.07.11_b1_lru_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDg0YTNlMC0wZDIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WTifaHRfjJHBw-TrwfxHKVgcX0BBKRQzVuRcEDrNxCY=)

**Last night, the first Republican opponent launched his campaign to unseat Greg and flip OH-01 back to red.** _But we’re not going to let that happen._

This opponent is an anti-choice extremist who is all in on one of the most un-Democratic ballot measures in Ohio’s history. He’s more of the same chaos and extremism that we beat back last year.

subject: Mississippi can't wait. So Greta isn't waiting either.

body:
Greta’s suing our AG to protect voting rights because she doesn’t back down when our freedoms are under attack.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66337913/416008596/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_230710SCOTUS_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTBjYmU4MDgtMGUyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=U5oXUl8SrufQearnT-19Xh3syKYQgO9GLGOSm0aDOOI=) Peter, Greta isn’t waiting until she’s elected as Mississippi’s next Attorney General to step up for folks in every part of our state. Right now, she’s suing our current AG to protect voting rights because Greta doesn’t back down when our freedoms are under attack.

This month, a law that creates enormous obstacles for elderly, sick, and disabled Mississippians to cast their ballots officially went into effect. And instead of devoting her office’s resources to fighting back against voter disenfranchisement, our AG is using taxpayer dollars to enforce it.

Peter, Greta has spent her entire career advocating for Mississippians. From her service as a trial lawyer to protecting disability rights as a litigator, Greta is a proven champion for individuals who need a voice most. She’s already fighting for us every day, but she needs our help to do this work as our Attorney General.

[Mississippi can’t wait, Peter, so we need you to join us today. This month, a law that creates enormous obstacles for elderly, sick, and disabled Mississippians to cast their ballots officially went into effect. And instead of devoting her office’s resources to fighting back against voter disenfranchisement, our AG is using taxpayer dollars to enforce it. Peter, Greta has spent her entire career advocating for Mississippians. From her service as a trial lawyer to protecting disability rights as a litigator, Greta is a proven champion for individuals who need a voice most. She’s already fighting for us every day, but she needs our help to do this work as our Attorney General. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thanks for standing with us, Team Greta Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state. = Paid for by Greta Martin for AG Greta Kemp Martin for Attorney General PO BOX 16402 Jackson, MS 39236 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: American Defense News
subject: “Amazon Loophole” could hand you $28,544 in “royalty” payouts
body:
Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole...

| **“Amazon Loophole” could hand you $28,544 in “royalty” payouts** [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0o7kmp3ur5cnm5i969kckvc4g6fq7n4p836la6o_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi60p36c9h2bs) Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole... Regular Americans can **collect up to $28,544 (or more)** in payouts from what Brad Thomas calls the “Amazon secret royalty program...” And the best part is, there are:
* NO age or income requirements... (It’s available to anyone 18+ or older)
* NO employment requirements... (You can be working part-time, full-time, or even be retired)
* And you NEVER have to shop or sell a single product on Amazon... (It only takes 5 minutes to set up!)

See how to collect the next payout before the strict cutoff deadline._ **[Watch short video now.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn82i3vbud6kpbqkg2flagd4mvk8ko3afdc0unp0_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi60p36c9h2bs)**

body:
Come join us for an exclusive event with Kellyanne Conway. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12613471?e=25844e23a8)
---

---
| | Peter,
---
| I hope this message finds you in great spirits. As the Chairman of the Republican Party of Nebraska, I'm delighted to share some exciting news with you.

We are privileged to welcome Kellyanne Conway, one of the most influential figures in American politics, to our upcoming NEGOP+ Booster Event and State Central Committee Meeting on August 18/19. We are incredibly excited about what will be an enriching and enlightening experience for us all.

**About Our Guest, Kellyanne Conway**
As the campaign manager for President Donald J. Trump in 2016, Kellyanne Conway etched her name in history as the first woman to successfully guide a U.S. presidential campaign to victory. She then served as Counselor to the President from 2017 to 2020, where her sharp political insights and her skills in communication were vital to the administration. We look forward to hearing from this distinguished strategist, pollster, and commentator.

**About the Event**
This event is a part of our ongoing commitment to engage our community in meaningful dialogues about the future of our Republic. To join us at this exclusive gathering, we request a **[minimum membership of NEGOP+ Basic Level If you haven't fulfilled this requirement yet, you can do so here.](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=3a55097b5e&e=25844e23a8)**

Looking forward to your participation in making this event a grand success.

Best Regards,
---
| Eric Underwood
Chairman
Republican Party of Nebraska
**[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=31fbf9cd6a&e=25844e23a8)**

body:

---
| | Friend,

---
Tucker Carlson made a big prediction – and I completely agree with it!

---
_**“I think we're going to see Trump's emergence as the most significant thing that happened in American politics in 100 years, because he reoriented the Republican Party against the wishes of Republican leaders.”
**_
---
But I’m humble enough to know that the TRUE significance of our movement is _YOU_.

---
The reason our movement has such historic significance is because it took power away from the corrupt ruling class and returned it to _**YOU**_ , the American people.

---
As I said at my Inauguration, _“What truly matters is not which party controls our government, but whether our government is controlled by the people.”_

---
**And that’s exactly why the disloyal Republicans known as RINOs are pledging to spend $370 MILLION to try and sabotage us in the GOP primary.**

---
These RINOs hate the idea of YOU being in control of your own government so much that they’d rather see Joe Biden win in 2024 than watch me return to the White House and put America First again.

---
_But in 2024, we’re going to prove Tucker Carlson right and ensure that the MAGA movement goes down in history books as the most significant thing in American politics in 100 YEARS._

---

name: Winsome Sears
subject: Can you complete this assessment before it’s too late?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
**Patriot, this is Winsome Sears, Lieutenant Governor of Virginia.**

I don't normally do this, but _Senate Republicans asked for my help._

Over the past month, Senate Republicans have been reaching out for you to take their **[2024 Senate Battleground Assessment,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62942082:6IAWgoINE:m:1:3299561967:BF1A97533A8967C8CDC82FA80DC873E6:r) **but you haven't responded.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62942082:6IAWgoINE:m:1:3299561967:BF1A97533A8967C8CDC82FA80DC873E6:r)

I cannot stress the importance of completing this assessment.

Republicans cannot possibly prioritize correctly without the input of our most LOYAL patriots. Unfortunately, time is running out. The deadline to complete this assessment is at MIDNIGHT.

Please, can you complete this assessment before it's too late? Here is your unique link:

**[BattlegroundAssessment/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62942082:6IAWgoINE:m:1:3299561967:BF1A97533A8967C8CDC82FA80DC873E6:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62942082:6IAWgoINE:m:1:3299561967:BF1A97533A8967C8CDC82FA80DC873E6:r)

Thank you,

Winsome Sears
