name: Mark and Kelly Walker
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Walker4NC
body:
From the bottom of my heart, I want to extend a huge thank you. I’m so excited to announce that we have surpassed the fundraising goal that we set at our launch. Kelly and I are so blessed to share with you that we’ve raised more than $500,000 in the past few weeks, and we know it’s because of you and your generous support. Here in the campaign world, we know that there are no days off, and things seldom slow to a stop, but I think it’s incredibly important to stop for a moment to celebrate the wins, big and small – and this is a huge win. | [Unsubscribe](https://click.walker4nc.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_s=6449ea63fb1148c5b51669d6f7286f57&_t=6JnG48kRQkDFoIONR3QYyVb1jyjI7c18ji2GNSMkQeLjIq8MO5twTBIFi8oyPLEljLfM6Md-vS471gp_9hSacMAj1XFzfJcxxXOXVv1wcIw%3D) | [Mark as Junk](https://click.walker4nc.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_s=6449ea63fb1148c5b51669d6f7286f57&_t=6JnG48kRQkDFoIONR3QYyVb1jyjI7c18ji2GNSMkQeLjIq8MO5twTBIFi8oyPLEljLfM6Md-vS471gp_9hSacMAj1XFzfJcxxXOXVv1wcIw%3D)

---
Peter,

From the bottom of my heart, I want to extend a huge thank you.

I’m so excited to announce that we have surpassed the fundraising goal that we set at our launch. Kelly and I are so blessed to share with you that we’ve raised more than $550,000 in the past few weeks, **and we know it’s because of you and your generous support.**

Here in the campaign world, we know that there are no days off, and things seldom slow to a stop, but I think it’s incredibly important to stop for a moment to celebrate the wins, big and small – **and this is a huge win.**

Your support is the reason voters across North Carolina are going to help us secure the Governor's mansion in 2024 and bring conservative values back to our great state. I can’t thank you enough.

You’ve done so much to help me already, but if you feel inclined to help us start July off on the right foot, I would appreciate your support again.

Thank you for helping us save North Carolina.

Gratefully,

Mark and Kelly Walker

[** DONATE **](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=6449ea63fb1148c5b51669d6f7286f57&_e=pkMagn0_EyvRSgNYlc-uif-nZDrUqOT7PsEPctiv6kuHll7R5tLXL1feOdTj0ie6lL-uf4ZnNFxD7mjrh2aRzdTO2_EDIBejhZ1jWXHJkEnWSpRRQUsEjFFgWtU66J5ZPBIBOtlNhNRkG-oXjYAkZWm4_13r19nvFKvdhBhRoDgJ77Vc8keemFr6l55sdznRO06-LXjG5T9f3mLKp5CxdWNaP0WKq4JIt4YWziPDHLBZ6xGWKvaW2HyygIvZ3FSnlLhxXqIF7hE4uZEmhUCyA8l4NSSVxGGM_8qY9fXbE_x5HFoKZGA4kulh3Ay8iqD0qG_hLvUBauOSMJTi9y7-N75ryGcj4AhebCQwhYphRx_xBDkt6x9xP3gvBqmYazqR)

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

* * *

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game. Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children. | | See Mark in Action:** ---|--- | Paid For By Walker4NC

| | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=43a1bf98fd7f4a4392f786bfb3827c70&_e=bl6auSMzcod9IT3a4kv2cqbqTk0Wqpk-RyGQW3yIBBZHThTHFNaH_Q82VYOpjeUdCCaCxIKAp1Azzn2dXkIDTVpPUW1bnbcByCRlyHqkpyBzndpc5jdWf0YjkqxiUin4QeM7Y6hu18elTYQ9amGtZv5Hp7dcdfAFqSa_Ntx7tXl8My-EzcfRGLmEVwQRGzCVIJa9yiQJCVbSU7DajBIgMZoeVkottCswZ9iznQbjU3QNSsyb0Jbsifz6bNj0GiTY-mg9zlCBiLl0tJ2TrqFPzg%3D%3D)

| | This is going to be our year. Michigan's 7th Congressional District is now an open seat with the Democrat running for Senate, giving us the best chance in years to win back this seat. _**I plan on taking it back for us.**_ Today I officially announced my candidacy because I know that with your help we can flip this seat red, save our majority in Congress, and take another vote away from Joe Biden and his failed agenda. This will be a tough race, but it is winnable. I know because I barely lost last year in what became the most expensive race in the country. My opponent was Biden's top ally in Michigan and she outspent me by more than 4-to-1, but that won't happen this time. Americans have had enough of Biden's rampant inflation, high gas prices, out-of-control spending, and refusal to secure our southern border. We can -- we must -- do better!
---
[**Help Me Start Strong, Give $7 for District 7!**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=43a1bf98fd7f4a4392f786bfb3827c70&_e=bl6auSMzcod9IT3a4kv2cqbqTk0Wqpk-RyGQW3yIBBZHThTHFNaH_Q82VYOpjeUdCCaCxIKAp1Azzn2dXkIDTVpPUW1bnbcByCRlyHqkpyBDD3tbLShOs64O6lD0QkgnL_c3W5ATI-fSqhrkKWBcstmm1acEud11sy_bSkGgGHyZszPMgNaFWGtF6xTbHEzEEiipQpTkWduGhOt3TI1o-Y3EAf7kdI8uBUh4ldVy_IJBRXQYJf50JqE7dp5w_pVQD7T8QxTT7W0NriXsb8AUlg%3D%3D)
---
_It 's time to secure your future, and that starts with taking it back with my_ _Four Pillars of Security plan:_
1. **National Security** : It's time we take the growing threat China presents seriously. I will ensure that we are taking the right steps to protect the American people from an increasingly hostile Chinese Communist Party.
2. **Border Security** : We must stop the flow of illegal immigrants, drugs and crime coming across the border. I've been there and I've seen the crisis first-hand.
3. **Neighborhood Security** : Years of Democrat anti-police policies has led to the highest crime in decades. It's time to make our streets safe again.
4. **Economic Security** : It's time to rein in inflation, cut government spending, lower taxes, and put America First in our trade policies.

[**Will you help me keep fighting for our future with a donation of just $7 to help get this race off to a strong start?**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=43a1bf98fd7f4a4392f786bfb3827c70&_e=bl6auSMzcod9IT3a4kv2cqbqTk0Wqpk-RyGQW3yIBBZHThTHFNaH_Q82VYOpjeUdCCaCxIKAp1Azzn2dXkIDTVpPUW1bnbcByCRlyHqkpyBJxLxvo_Cs7A0T-9X1uw_FWv-kZt0duUXvuZ0uhZI5319OfgytKMolZcQmB4FXQkKoSHhVpz0sZC3_3_lAgJclk7BzJQfvVQbUPtDDNlH5kH8glXnYZMG4le3T35-eRfnIl_hH6jbYkISP0G5uP5OsiGkTxJgoBDp9NPzvPFqYjQ%3D%3D)
---
[](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=43a1bf98fd7f4a4392f786bfb3827c70&_e=bl6auSMzcod9IT3a4kv2cqbqTk0Wqpk-RyGQW3yIBBZHThTHFNaH_Q82VYOpjeUdCCaCxIKAp1Azzn2dXkIDTVpPUW1bnbcByCRlyHqkpyDteWbLbDObvKHGW7skgXEfpOxRPGCX7ja1wF3F30o-zLnpkjrvpR5JOw5OyT_EajAU7ZW8rrkECp-198kE9zdBMLN8Fy6ZR9xqOv8UNA9W59tulZI9HCZTca_JibCG6u41JAKd5kTvNJCNiGULb0N9G-XHtzPtMmRwLAKiXfdqrA%3D%3D)

Public service isn't something I take lightly. I spent 22 years in the U.S. Army, serving in the Iraq war, Guantanamo Bay, Kuwait and the Korean DMZ. I flew more than 1,000 hours in the cockpit of the most sophisticated helicopters in the world. In the State Senate, I voted to protect taxpayers from having their tax dollars given to Chinese Communist-owned companies, pushed for reinvestment in American energy, and defended our communities from the radical left's woke policies. Biden and his allies know an open seat is our best chance to win and,_mark my words_ , they will do anything they can and spend millions of dollars to keep us from turning District 7 **RED**. Today is my chance to show the nation that Michiganders are tired of the failed leadership they are getting under Biden and Whitmer. [**Can I count on you to help me prove we are ready to fight and WIN this November?**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=43a1bf98fd7f4a4392f786bfb3827c70&_e=bl6auSMzcod9IT3a4kv2cqbqTk0Wqpk-RyGQW3yIBBZHThTHFNaH_Q82VYOpjeUdCCaCxIKAp1Azzn2dXkIDTVpPUW1bnbcByCRlyHqkpyAb38YrS0iGgPwxmSwKxYM5a1AcatS3IZ3XMCHWfaUa5stOXmQk9UE6oFKaYH6ZP_YAC1jfrJb4p0dnhvKcdWefA7lsuv_Cd98NwnEaZnqHXkffJr7rg_oWTypqYofTP57Ssns-wxAw7qnnoT8p0SxV70oGJ3FU4Jw9PMm8RU-Btg%3D%3D) Thank you,

| | | _Breaking_ : Trump's lawyers are trying again to delay justice -- forever. Last night, they [asked the judge](https://default.salsalabs.org/T067422de-e527-432a-af73-c80b099b2384/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) in the documents trial to **delay the trial _indefinitely_.** The goal is clear -- keep pushing back the start until the election, with the hope that Trump wins so he can pardon himself. **Don't let this happen. Don't let Trump escape justice.** [**Add your name, and demand the trial not be delayed, and that Trump****finally**** face justice**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0a4d5e9-ebf6-460a-a37d-97206abdf708/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Iowa Starting Line covers push for abortion ban
body:
Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds has called on the legislature to convene for a special session to ban abortion.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1228%2E120351%2EK7eiFc)
The Iowa legislature begins a special session today, Peter, for one reason and one reason only:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230711?refcode=em20230711&amount=5&refcode2=1228_120351_K7eiFc&akid=1228%2E120351%2EK7eiFc)
After Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds signed a **six-week abortion ban** into law in 2018, the state Supreme Court blocked it. Now she’s called on the legislature to convene for a special session and pass new measures to ban the procedure. **Many experts believe that the special session could ban most abortions in Iowa by Wednesday, an outcome a majority of Iowans don’t support.**
[**Our local newsroom,_Iowa Starting Line_ , has reporters on the ground, ready to cover all the latest developments. But we count on your support to sustain their work. Will you pitch in $5 today to help us keep up this kind of coverage?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230711?refcode=em20230711&amount=5&refcode2=1228_120351_K7eiFc&akid=1228%2E120351%2EK7eiFc)

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Our 'new normal'
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Inaction is no longer an option.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26330%2E3422442%2ECrai1o)
Derek,
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230711-1?refcode=EMAJ11_1_FLD_20230711_V1_F&refcode2=26330_3422442_Crai1o&akid=26330%2E3422442%2ECrai1o)
In the past day, parts of the Northeast have seen upwards of 4 to 8 inches of rain—the equivalent of about two months worth of water under normal conditions. This intensity of flooding has not been seen in the region since 2011.
Whether it's devastating wildfires across California, hazardous air quality, and now historic flooding in New England, it’s clear that these once rare climate events have become our new normal.
As these events become increasingly common, Congress must take **bold action** to address the worsening climate crisis. The cost of inaction is too great for us to be complacent.
Katie has spent her career taking on corporate interests and bringing accountability to polluters once deemed too powerful to take on. In the House, she’s been at the forefront of key spending bills that have made crucial investments to address climate change while saving taxpayer money.
Once in the U.S. Senate, Katie will fight to build on the progress we’ve made to **expand clean energy, protect our natural resources, and continue to hold corporate polluters responsible for their own messes.**
[**If you’re ready to see the bold action we need to address the climate crisis, will you make a $5 contribution today to send a true climate warrior to the Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230711-1?refcode=EMAJ11_1_FLD_20230711_V1_F&refcode2=26330_3422442_Crai1o&akid=26330%2E3422442%2ECrai1o)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230711-1?refcode=EMAJ11_1_FLD_20230711_V1_F&refcode2=26330_3422442_Crai1o&akid=26330%2E3422442%2ECrai1o)**
Thank you so much!!
— KP HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ11_1_FLD_20230711_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=26330_3422442_Crai1o&akid=26330%2E3422442%2ECrai1o)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I’d like to honor your commitment to our movement...
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2umzAQhZ_G7EB4_IcXLO6tlS5Qq-76s4l8x0PiCBsEptF9-4oo6fY7R6PzaXxapjh-9sy8M4BrDBsDYOKNAQzy_dd3PfwcXP3j6x-onVbyfqTwhQGUz4X-V59XGko-Tgc1rgo9YAeIFfVcd7a1RilVXXsupEENwXgiwaUaP7yRHunDKuQthyr20IJoDefcSKWgAYt8tBw7IToerGayvcfchDn7KdzKuqelwTlVU38tZdkek04MThvhvlJzj3mlcDQO5v9S7ROtEX19m2Mu9bjnsPq4xXypcU4plkLE4JRxMu1IpvNAgSMnK5k47SWdE4W4Jybc01cfcJv3FYkJh_Hsnwx9Wny8ZCbcy-mVzLlQLkw4q6xgoM95ioEJN2ozFmfQ4QM-PiLc8o0P1-Ht9rta-7Dc4zTFTRsm28ux4HD7FwAA__-vVIzW)

Friend – THANK YOU!
Thank you for believing in the power of our movement, in American greatness, and that our country’s best days – despite the Democrats’ every effort – are still to come.
It’s because of my incredible supporters like **YOU** that even with the entire weight of Crooked Joe’s corrupt DOJ coming down on me, my resolve to SAVE our country is stronger than ever.
With you at my side, Friend, we are truly UNBREAKABLE.
| [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kU-LpDAQxT9NvClJRRNz8DCzwT3ILsvCsn8uTTopu6sxUTROM99-semZ6-89ivejXFwmGt87pl8ZwJXCxgCYfGEAQ_3657safg-2_PH1H5RWNfX9SOELA8jvC35Wn1cqjI6mg2pbhA58C94X2AnVGm500zTFtVOOC6FGhdzUZsQzCO3GM6hRnbkQvimoAw6SayGErpsGKjBejEb4VspWBKNYze-UqjAnN4VbXve4VH6OxdRdc162x6SeQb-h31es7pRWDEfjYO4NSxdxJe_K20wpl-Oewupoo3Qp_Rwj5YzIoE9-0nxE3TrAILxAUzPZ7zmeIgbaI5P26asOuM376pFJ6-nknsy7uDi6JCbth9NHMqeMKTNpTWMkA3VKEwUm7a_Qu2jh59vwgI-PSLt8E8N1eLn9LdYuLHeaJtqUZjW_HAsOt_8BAAD__38QjM8)
---
And it’s because of your support that our campaign holds leads of more than **30 POINTS** in nearly EVERY early primary state.

Thank you for believing in the power of our movement, in American greatness, and that our country’s best days – despite the Democrats’ every effort – are still to come. It’s because of my incredible supporters like YOU that even with the entire weight of Crooked Joe’s corrupt DOJ coming down on me, my resolve to SAVE our country is stronger than ever. With you at my side, Friend, we are truly UNBREAKABLE. | And it’s because of your support that our campaign holds leads of more than 30 POINTS in nearly EVERY early primary state. Which is why I’d like to honor YOU on our Donor Wall in our First-In-The-Nation Primary Headquarters in New Hampshire! And I don’t mean scribbled on the wall with a crayon, like some other campaigns do... but a heavy, respectable plaque with the names of our great donors finely etched within. | | I’d love to add as many names as possible, but since we will have limited space, I’m asking donors to make a $75 contribution to RESERVE your spot to have your name inscribed in the Wall. But, because I still want to pay tribute to ALL of our donors who made our First-In-The-Nation Headquarters possible, if you contribute ANY AMOUNT, I’ll include YOUR NAME in a beautiful book of donors that will be displayed right beside our Donor Wall Plaque. | Thank you, | Donald J. subject: 2024 is the time to put up or shut up

I will never stop standing up for what I know is right—even when it goes against the grain of public opinion.

Peter, **The time for chirping from the sidelines is over.** Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple: **2024 is the time to put up or shut up**. As a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida, and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership nationwide. I will never stop standing up for what I know is right--even when it goes against the grain of public opinion. The American people deserve a President with a track record of taking action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe Biden has done more to damage our nation than anyone, and Kamala Harris has done nothing at all. I am DONE hearing excuses. If Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the playbook for defeating the woke mob:
* Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING CRT and pornographic content for young kids

* STANDING UP against woke corporations who have tried to force taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda

* DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down the country

I'm tired of seeing Republicans lose. _A_ _ren 't you, __Peter?_ __I promise you, with me as your candidate and President, Republicans will forget this culture of losing once and for all. To make sure we 're able to achieve this, I am asking for your continued support. **[If you can, will you pitch in?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3d6cdadade72430ebf899a64660090e1&_e=y6iUxF7b-c8VHq-YR1umOrhQcRiDFqXZeGN_NPd_R8LusVnD_wOtJb0uxebNw1R27utjBZ8JbuyT9neuA0X9yZK2dD0XZ0Ol1gkpyaqyAwv2ZElwWk01gfwKc7tBBlRGE1XMrUlZGhW4sFpDfQ8xEa5c6atZTxq_dcTMRntghWAqkl0P9AMnsOTKksXrKVL5sARKNt-oaqvLouBmSnXQQlE4iudtMKa5JhKae0ZAgGEkBtsdPako_1b0RSWqG3tiwAsCerlkH7tEOpRM0jVQxDCcBrzYrIqBevBM5Fz5qBjiJkPsefcJ0fhwGq9dPHGPpEecWs2YydcZMDz4p6WtODQmoyJTkyjpdHitVkTNvEjviS_NeW4rj-joItKwRQbvNnQwU2_nifdLI3AsWy0bMQ%3D%3D "If you can, will you pitch in?")**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6337dd028354fff8a620ee7e9efb549&_e=fPeXd4HSQ61sa5Ig--vK0rHREiLKq7VJhmYK6K-P1HprVoxg7Kk7BMZKJcg4ldjfRQhlmJ9oiFTlZMYHqhZJFw-ZFN9eqQgllc0cSmJzvTeD_tvjCR-URQrFDUKLj2ePhvDo_D6gFh39PusO0niQM0TYOMXQ12cJ7p85-8mIYArYWgzhVNJoueTOJBUUFr1ie3Yxsvr3cNTdP1F9Ipre91TxQ9P58roMVAU8JR32ES3mf81ObCpvlC529k_rYbCScx9TFWLB602pWWjH-JISSk11HGdzxY9qlXF44YnwZz7lXyfQfYNns7FrBeTTjdPhFVOR9dxPAu7qdv6n8LCJB__Uo3SwOQfEugpOdT2rzRSBYsYfv8QQFg5bW7Fj6zi8ibrJhhAnhTC0k40mbXesWalQDZ7WNsOl-Y728_IlTH0%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Ted Cruz
subject: 19 Damning Facts [MUST-READ]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._kZJVu1jdDjyFbG7XxHTA)
---
Fellow Conservative, Joe Biden has called allegations of his family’s corruption “a bunch of malarky.”

The evidence says otherwise. It’s truly staggering. **Here’s what you need to know, based on a detailed 19-point timeline included in a great article published on July 1st by Breitbart:**
---
1\. Ten years ago, Hunter and Joe Biden few to China aboard Air Force Two. During this trip, Hunter introduced VP Biden to his business partner, the CEO of a company with links to CCP intelligence. Ten days after this visit, Hunter secured a 10% interest in a CCP-backed investment fund co-founded with this same business partner.
2\. Photos reveal that in 2014, Joe Biden met with Hunter’s Mexican business associates in the vice president’s office.
3\. Two years later, Joe and Hunter Biden took a trip to Mexico via Air Force Two. During that trip Jeff Cooper, who ran a large litigation firm, invested $1 million in Hunter and James Biden’s hedge fund.
4\. A photo taken in 2014 shows Joe Biden golfing with Hunter and Devon Archer, one of Hunter’s fellow board members at Burisma in Ukraine. Archer is now in talks to comply with the House Oversight Committee’s subpoena to learn what information he has on the Biden family’s alleged $10 million “bribe” and other business transactions.
5\. In 2015, Burisma was suspected of money laundering and corruption. Joe Biden threatened to withhold $1 billion in aid from Ukraine if the prosecutor in charge of the investigation was not fired – he was terminated shortly thereafter, and Joe Biden later bragged about it.
6\. House Oversight Committee Republicans have told reporters that an FBI informant has two pieces of evidence that show Joe Biden received $5 million after threatening to withhold this $1 billion in aid to Ukraine.
7\. In 2015, one day after Joe and Hunter Biden with some of Hunter’s foreign business partners at Cafe Milano, one of these individuals (an adviser to the board of Burisma) emailed Hunter to thank him for the “opportunity to meet your father.” An earlier email, from 2014, shows that his same individual had asked Hunter for “advice on how you could use your influence” on Burisma’s behalf.
8\. A source familiar with the FBI’s informant document has confirmed that Joe and Hunter Biden “coerced” a Burisma executive into paying them $10 million in bribes – and kept 17 audio recordings as an “insurance policy.”
9\. Photos reveal that in 2015, Joe and Hunter Biden met with associates from Ukraine, Russia, and Kazakhstan at a Washington, D.C. restaurant.
10\. In 2017, Joe Biden wrote a college recommendation letter for a child of Hunter’s Chinese business partner – the same one he was introduced to in China in 2013.
11\. Also in 2017, after Joe Biden left the vice president’s office, Hunter stated in an email that his father was one of his “new office mates” after they went into business on a Chinese energy deal – in which they had negotiated that Joe Biden would receive a 10% equity stake in the joint venture.
12\. Whistleblower Tony Bobulinski, one of Hunter’s business partners, met twice with Joe Biden to discuss a business deal in China in 2017.
13\. Eric Schwerin, president of the infamous investment fund Rosemont Seneca Partners, met with then-Vice President Joe Biden at the White House 19 times between 2009 and 2019, according to visitor logs.
14\. Hunter Biden demanded payment from a CCP-linked businessman in 2017, while Joe Biden was “sitting next to” him as revealed by a WhatsApp message provided by an IRS whistleblower.
15\. Days later, in another WhatsApp text, Hunter asked another Chinese business associate for $10 million, noting that the Biden family is best at “doing exactly what the chairman wants.”
16\. In 2018, two years after Joe and Hunter’s Mexico trip, Hunter texted Jeff Cooper about a deal he had in the works with a business partner named Slim, declaring that he spoke with his dad about Slim’s ask.
17\. Joe Biden called Hunter and left a voicemail in 2018 regarding their Chinese energy deal, revealing family concerns about sensitive information that was revealed in a New York Times article.
18\. In 2019, Hunter let his daughter know that his father had collected “half [my] salary” for 30 years – much of that money reportedly obtained from selling access to Joe Biden.
19\. Earlier this year, former Obama White House stenographer Mike McCormick alleged that the FBI has ignored Joe Biden’s role in his family’s influence peddling in Ukraine.
---
Where there’s smoke, there’s fire – and there’s a whole lot of smoke engulfing Joe and Hunter Biden and their shady business dealings.

[_**Step up to help EXPOSE THE BIDEN FAMILY’S CORRUPTION and hold them accountable.**_](http://trk.tedcruz.-Q) For Liberty,
---
[ ](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Ted Cruz
---
[**RUSH YOUR SUPPORT**](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---

| | Peter,

Last month marked the first anniversary of the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn years of precedent by reversing Roe v. Wade. The decision dismantled the legal protection of reproductive rights for women nationwide, and since then, 14 states have banned most abortions, leaving millions of women and girls with nowhere to turn for the care they need.

In order to preserve the right to reproductive health care, Congress must immediately codify Roe v. This fight is just beginning. **As a first course of action, we must take action to legislate reproductive rights.[Add your name now to tell Congress to codify Roe.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66339208/416013133/-1397077846?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20230711_PT_RoevWade_0_ID_MikeThompson_NA_NA_RoevWade&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTdiNGFkYy0xMzIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WCsPbdCbsfSpgFKlsp5Z6M2BeZJxHlfGRcD39ev5LTM=&emci=cef103de-2615-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3e7b4adc-1320-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, Last month marked the first anniversary of the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn years of precedent by reversing Roe v. Wade. The decision dismantled the legal protection of reproductive rights for women nationwide, and since then, 14 states have banned most abortions, leaving millions of women and girls with nowhere to turn for the care they need. In order to preserve the right to reproductive health care, Congress must immediately codify Roe v. Wade into law. | | Peter, with the reversal of Roe v. Wade, all of our privacy-based rights, such as marriage equality and the right to birth control, are on the chopping block by a radical Supreme Court. This fight is just beginning. As a first course of action, we must take action to legislate reproductive rights. In solidarity, Mike Thompson | Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress Mike Thompson for Congress PO Box 10541 Napa, CA 94581 United States

New Hampshire’s school choice law will expand Education Freedom Accounts to more families across the state. This is a significant milestone, **but we are not done yet.** With your support, we can continue to bring the transformative power of school choice to more states and students across the country. name: CPT Sam Brown Digital Team
subject: “Top recruit,” “One of Republicans’ best pickup opportunities”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
See what people are saying about Sam Brown’s campaign!

| | |
---
_[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28644%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wpz4twNEC5bcGqp4L9kV1A&sysid=1)_Did you hear the news, Friend? “[**Top Recruit**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28755%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Us%2bI2SjDJ8QovpBeKGJWXw&sysid=1)” - Politico “[**One of Republicans’ best pickup opportunities**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28756%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0HT6KumWLCS8%2fu45balmtw&sysid=1)” \- The Hill “[**Front runner for the Republican nomination**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28757%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=74Au%2fFPtMc5tjq5eAAax7g&sysid=1)” - Fox News Retired Army Captain Sam Brown has **OFFICIALLY** declared his run as the Republican candidate for United States Senate in Nevada. Nevada has narrowly gone for Democrats for the last decade. Last year, a Democrat Senator won the state by **LESS THAN ONE POINT.**
---
[**Send an Army Captain to the Senate!**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28758%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ifee2dIQ4Wo25AQmiWGt3g&sysid=1)
---
**Let me tell you why I chose to work on Captain Brown’s campaign.** Candidates like Sam don’t come around often. In a world of selfish, spineless politicians, Sam has been putting service before self for his entire life. From serving in the Army, to helping veterans get access to critical medications, Sam knows that serving and sacrificing for our country is one of the greatest honors on earth. [**That’s why it’s my honor to manage his campaign from DAY ONE.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28759%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f0tjKxUwpIIT6v3TjvCzHg&sysid=1) But, this isn’t going to be a cakewalk, Friend. [**We’re going to have to give this everything we have if we want to win.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28750%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b2u4yHPxm%2bsewyZ0gRqapQ&sysid=1) Sam and I can’t do this alone. We need support from every patriot we can get. That’s why we’re reaching out to you, Friend. [**Can you chip in any amount to send Captain Sam Brown to the Senate?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28751%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bbaVkct9n1EsNEAzyy6G3A&sysid=1) Your support means everything to us. Sincerely, CPT Sam Brown Digital Team
---

name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: Peter, will you help us win one of the most important races of 2024?
body:
We can take this House seat
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te0d48476-9e17-42ab-8c88-d5a8fce151fc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a7f0dc4-c358-432e-b459-6159c65586fc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hey, it’s Al Franken. [I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Blue Amp Action and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T880c611e-f5f3-4ca5-8b92-1585e41a72db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too! Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence. In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law. Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that funded the police! Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations. [Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ae01bd3-aba7-42bd-a1f4-b3623665c93f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d8c6103-a633-44b1-8ef4-cb07d8b72599/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them. Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know. And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation. [So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td666cf60-093a-4642-9fd2-b3eba8edc678/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This is important to me. And to our nation. Thanks, Al [P.S. I always add a P.S to these letters to make another ask. It’s a cheap tactic but for some reason it works! DONATE HERE.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T57f363a7-1414-4294-9576-633f4f9434b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

clean_body: We can take this House seat | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can . | | | | | | | | Hey, it’s Al Franken. Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too! Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence. In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law. Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that funded the police! Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations. | | | | | | | | Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them. Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know. And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation. This is important to me. And to our nation. Thanks, Al | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | or

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Announcement - Kevin Dellicker for Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
I'm excited to announce that I am officially |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,

**I’m excited to announce that I am officially a candidate for United States Congress! ** Last year, I was honored to have the support of so many hardworking Pennsylvanians in my campaign, which is why I wanted to make sure that you were one of the first people that I shared this important decision.

During the last two years, as I have traveled throughout Pennsylvania’s 7th District, I’ve had the opportunity to speak with Pennsylvanians from every walk of life who go to work every day, provide a safe home for their family, educate their children, and look forward to realizing the American Dream.

What I have found has been disappointing. **_The ability to pursue the American Dream is vanishing, along with people’s faith in our government and our leaders. _**

It’s no secret that Washington is broken. And that America is headed in the wrong direction.

Until we stop inflation, fix our economy, secure the southern border, and provide safe communities, we’re never going to get our country back on the right track.

**I’m not a politician. I’m not looking for a new career in Washington or to ascend the political ladder. I’m running for Congress to take back our country.**

My life experiences as a husband, father, veteran, and small business owner have given me the right experience, skill set, and leadership to represent our community and provide real change - where we once again value hard work, law and order and respect personal freedom.

**_If you believe that our government taxes too much, needs to secure our borders and encroaches on our constitutional rights and liberties, then I need your help!_**

**_[Can I count on you to stand with me to help save America?](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=bf4ebd3f0f&e=1090c5c412)_**

Our work is only beginning, so I need you to help me keep fighting to stop the reckless spending and get our economy back on track.
---
| [DONATE](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=72297a3fd7&e=1090c5c412 "DONATE")
---
| Again, thank you for all your help and support!

Sincerely,

Kevin

---
| | PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
---
| Military information and photos of Kevin in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, Air Force, Army, or National Guard.
---

Kevin Dellicker for Congress1400 N Providence Rd Ste 1040Media, PA 19063-2079

You can [update your preferences](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d572757edc&e=1090c5c412&c=8cbace0e25) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d572757edc&e=1090c5c412&c=8cbace0e25).

name: CPT Sam Brown
subject: Sen. Jacky Rosen & Hillary’s VP pick are coming after me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
They know that patriots like you and I could change the D.C. power structure for good.

| | |
---
Friend, **My opponent just teamed up with Hillary’s 2016 VP candidate to smear me and drag my name through the mud.** Monday morning, before I even finished formally announcing my candidacy, an email from Liberal Democrat Sen. Jacky Rosen hit the inboxes of millions of democrat activists. Her plan is to build an unstoppable war chest to end my candidacy before it even begins. [**Friend, I need your help to make sure her plan fails. Can you chip in $10, $15, or even $25 RIGHT AWAY to ensure that our team has the resources necessary to fend off these absurd attacks?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkdmig3j0ocba7nhl91okfba6kkr32qr36fhscsg_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi64o76c5h2bs)
---
[**STAND WITH ME**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zarshalljqsaolgq17oka1i8fr52apj8uq9ku058_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi64o76c5h2bs)
---
In her shameless attack message**she claimed that I’m an extremist**. In reality - Sen. Rosen is the true extremist. She’s received resounding endorsements from radical pro-abortion groups like NARAL and Planned Parenthood. She’s rubber stamped Joe Biden’s reckless $6.2 Trillion spending spree. And she’s done everything in her power to help create the ongoing crisis at our southern border. Friend, Nevada deserves better than Sen. Jacky Rosen. America deserves better. YOU deserve better. [**Please, join me in the fight to win in Nevada and help Republicans take back control of the U.S. Senate! >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu2rq5h2ate3rqteojb81lsopmq4qs3h76inag6o_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi64o76c5h2bs) Duty First, CPT Sam Brown, U.S Army (Ret.)

name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: We are ditching the Republican losing culture
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I will never stop standing up for what I know is right--even when it goes against the grain of public opinion.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=790444be48cf401c918fcf6e162ff24f&_e=LhemCGPCkYLB_BzJz4eLFYvG05jIxArweM8yI5GP2TLvTkVw2Btai4uR1ZbJf9LJjKN45GFMFuNpL86gAejMuNn96axvI_TFwnY0vbwrfHhr2C6_KhKBwpjiFwM49Y6rF-vPmxNIokT0LuY6TcVqxaw0n-t_GDn8wLOrDxgheD4N8ZA461aoH5OcoVGkQUX8nbuYawOLsgZDXZjmXDiB667PF4gPdZnY8caaclRB8t-w82r3RAS2aO5gqvFiHTld4B87CN1yv15HUZ6XlP8EI1ili2VNIkMR2DWR1Xer6uYVvRZsQD1aV1JT34IuK3Whp4XodIZtSPwp4yKGJ7ojkjHyMmlM3vA-7M4Aa4DjqRjbrYHx2sbcJ6kKkUcg6A47SxY6hqYwctWsosxjbLXZdeqJ7PqvXO3Q-Bk0-cmwrHI%3D)
---
Friend, **The time for chirping from the sidelines is over.** Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple: **2024 is the time to put up or shut up**. As a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida, and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership nationwide. I will never stop standing up for what I know is right--even when it goes against the grain of public opinion. The American people deserve a President with a track record of taking action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe Biden has done more to damage our nation than anyone, and Kamala Harris has done nothing at all. I am DONE hearing excuses. If Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the playbook for defeating the woke mob:
* Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING CRT and pornographic content for young kids

* STANDING UP against woke corporations who have tried to force taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda

* DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down the country

I'm tired of seeing Republicans lose. _A_ _ren 't you, Friend_ _?_ I promise you, with me as your candidate and President, Republicans will forget this culture of losing once and for all. To make sure we're able to achieve this, I am asking for your continued support. **[If you can, will you pitch in?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=790444be48cf401c918fcf6e162ff24f&_e=LhemCGPCkYLB_BzJz4eLFYvG05jIxArweM8yI5GP2TLvTkVw2Btai4uR1ZbJf9LJjKN45GFMFuNpL86gAejMuNn96axvI_TFwnY0vbwrfHhr2C6_KhKBwpjiFwM49Y6rF-vPmxNIokT0LuY6TcVqxaw0n-t_GDn8wLOrDxgheD4N8ZA461aoH5OcoVGkQUX8nbuYawOLsgZDXZjmXDiB667PF4gPdZnY8caaclRB8t-w82r3RAS2aO5gqvFiHTld4B87CN1yv15HUZ6XlP8EI97CX8RycWihfFilBAX6I8g6tyvl2REJDIIQ25oucrblOMMxmCoInhlaNHN0XvSJO35ig9WXqk2Jw9ogKJpdBUK2Yi1lIbCEgswOy3c8yVGB0r3PJsaNmzLyuXAwH_rFmATYpy6PZAFCiv2g2FqimOw%3D "If you can, will you pitch in?")**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: 7 ways FEE stops socialism. (#4 might surprise you)
body:
Since 1946, the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) has worked to stop socialism’s influence on the world.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbe5r6et63liqbqturrove2o7askmcq2mciicpe8_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi6cpr4c9h2bs)

Friend,

Since 1946, the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) has worked to stop socialism's influence on the world.

And while times have changed, our mission has not. In fact, we've learned to adapt and reach the next generation everywhere they get their information.

Let me introduce myself. I am President Emeritus of FEE, Lawrence Reed. FEE is teaching Gen Z about free market economics, the horrors of communism, and individual liberty. And we've found at least 7 effective ways to stop socialism.

[FEE is working to make the ideas of liberty compelling to the next generation. Please help us to raise $50,000 online to reach more young people with our message. Can you send a generous gift of $10, $35, $100, or any amount today?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu6f7fpla3j0jvj4lvhj4j85t9nvvi07opd67f9g_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi6cpr4c9h2bs)
**Here are the 7 ways FEE is stopping socialism with Gen Z.**

**1\. FEE in the Classroom**

Our flagship program, FEE in the Classroom, makes the ideas of liberty familiar, credible, and compelling to students.

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

Students learn how these core principles apply to their daily lives, communities, their futures, and the future of the country.

FEE in the Classroom recently taught over 60,000 students!

**2\. YouTube shows**

Our YouTube videos introduce freedom as a life philosophy to the next generation. We created several popular shows, like _**Undoctrination**_ , _**Common Sense Soapbox**_ , _**Revolution of One**_ , and many others, to deliver a steady stream of educational material for Gen Z.

Our videos alone received over 23 MILLION views and over 1.8 MILLION shares.

**3\. Social media content**

Our pro-liberty, educational, social media content reaches over 1 million 16- to 24-year-olds each month.

Here is the BIG problem with politics on social media... It's almost ALL socialist propaganda. _This is why it is CRITICAL you and I reach young people on social media with our message of liberty, free markets, and entrepreneurship_.

We gained nearly 70,000 followers across social media platforms. We reached over 2 MILLION young people in just seven months on TikTok!

In 2022, FEE reached over 146 MILLION Gen Z online in total. **FEE even broke the world record for the largest online economics lecture!**

[Click here to donate to FEE and support our efforts.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z571gd8p73779c9fj6tj4sv9un3jhia4ohu4fs3o_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi6cpr4c9h2bs)

**4\. Revolution of One**

Through FEE's Revolution of One initiative, we teach students that
entrepreneurship and limited government can radically improve their lives and communities.

At Revolution of One workshops, students engage with entrepreneurs, artists, and influencers who bring a rich background of expertise to the classroom while demonstrating that voluntary economic opportunity and fewer barriers to entry are the keys to prosperity.

[Donate >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfqe1ufvvh45k036o2hvdmt0dk7iq017r4541ngg_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi6cpr4c9h2bs)

**5\. FEE Stories and online articles**

Our online articles provide information about topics that concern Gen Z and teach them how free market solutions, rather than socialism, can improve the world around us.

In 2020, FEE.org was accessed over 25 million times by students of all ages seeking to learn more about the ideas of liberty during a year of a global pandemic.

**6\. Teacher Training**

FEE's Learning Center provides teacher training on important economic subjects, free markets, individual liberty, and limited government. We work directly with state governments to provide this training as a partner organization. These highly trained educators are able to better teach our free market curriculum to schools.

In 2022, FEE trained 2,568 teachers, which impacted over 256,800 students!

**7\. Books**

FEE started using books back in 1946 to combat the rise of socialism, and we still do so today. We produce great books and articles from F.A. Hayek, Ludwig von Mises, Milton Friedman, Leonard Read, and other pro-liberty authors.

These are timeless lessons that all students should learn but rarely encounter in schools.

If you and I want to teach young Americans about the values of free markets, liberty, and personal responsibility, we have to reach them where they get their information.

**Your support helps FEE reach more of the next generation with the ideas of freedom. As a personal favor, can you donate any amount today and help us reach our goal of $50,000 online?**
[Donate $10 >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqmh9hplnk447n613i54fco3d01fbabrie6rtshg_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi6cpr4c9h2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn9s9f26ak3g66pevs0fi888cjj1jdvtvhp5p68g_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi6cpr4c9h2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmal20gr3bo0o7aegcg7sru280f6pf7vv4cilbo0_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi6cpr4c9h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0448fth61mihau8s0rolcq80ae5ds5a6mr3s2po_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi6cpr4c9h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z93dd8uu786r245t4dn0quje2rc25addfjhnh070_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi6cpr4c9h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpbkl1jj9uonj45mpbf0cil7adjlc69om3n9ido0_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi6cpr4c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvrgr18esu5imjolrlg2kedrtch858pksivtp7ag_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi6cpr4c9h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgieq858cnj7vnr4ni699j1bfgsoe4flt9cbn6b8_rp22sh2s8i66o74shi6cpr4c9h2bs)
Thank you for supporting FEE,

Lawrence W. Reed
President Emeritus

_FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._

clean_body: Since 1946, the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) has worked to stop socialism’s influence on the world. Friend, Since 1946, the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) has worked to stop socialism's influence on the world. And while times have changed, our mission has not. In fact, we've learned to adapt and reach the next generation everywhere they get their information. Let me introduce myself. I am President Emeritus of FEE, Lawrence Reed. FEE is teaching Gen Z about free market economics, the horrors of communism, and individual liberty. And we've found at least 7 effective ways to stop socialism. Here are the 7 ways FEE is stopping socialism with Gen Z. 1\. FEE in the Classroom Our flagship program, FEE in the Classroom, makes the ideas of liberty familiar, credible, and compelling to students. It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government. Students learn how these core principles apply to their daily lives, communities, their futures, and the future of the country. FEE in the Classroom recently taught over 60,000 students! 2\. YouTube shows Our YouTube videos introduce freedom as a life philosophy to the next generation. We created several popular shows, like Undoctrination , Common Sense Soapbox , Revolution of One , and many others, to deliver a steady stream of educational material for Gen Z. Our videos alone received over 23 MILLION views and over 1.8 MILLION shares. 3\. Social media content Our pro-liberty, educational, social media content reaches over 1 million 16- to 24-year-olds each month. Here is the BIG problem with politics on social media... It's almost ALL socialist propaganda. This is why it is CRITICAL you and I reach young people on social media with our message of liberty, free markets, and entrepreneurship. We gained nearly 70,000 followers across social media platforms. We reached over 2 MILLION young people in just seven months on TikTok! In 2022, FEE reached over 146 MILLION Gen Z online in total. FEE even broke the world record for the largest online economics lecture! 4\. Revolution of One Through FEE's Revolution of One initiative, we teach students that entrepreneurship and limited government can radically improve their lives and communities. At Revolution of One workshops, students engage with entrepreneurs, artists, and influencers who bring a rich background of expertise to the classroom while demonstrating that voluntary economic opportunity and fewer barriers to entry are the keys to prosperity. 5\. FEE Stories and online articles Our online articles provide information about topics that concern Gen Z and teach them how free market solutions, rather than socialism, can improve the world around us. In 2020, FEE.org was accessed over 25 million times by students of all ages seeking to learn more about the ideas of liberty during a year of a global pandemic. 6\. Teacher Training FEE's Learning Center provides teacher training on important economic subjects, free markets, individual liberty, and limited government. We work directly with state governments to provide this training as a partner organization. These highly trained educators are able to better teach our free market curriculum to schools. In 2022, FEE trained 2,568 teachers, which impacted over 256,800 students! 7\. Books FEE started using books back in 1946 to combat the rise of socialism, and we still do so today. We produce great books and articles from F.A. Hayek, Ludwig von Mises, Milton Friedman, Leonard Read, and other pro-liberty authors. These are timeless lessons that all students should learn but rarely encounter in schools. If you and I want to teach young Americans about the values of free markets, liberty, and personal responsibility, we have to reach them where they get their information. Your support helps FEE reach more of the next generation with the ideas of freedom. As a personal favor, can you donate any amount today and help us reach our goal of $50,000 online? Thank you for supporting FEE, Lawrence W. Reed President Emeritus FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law. American Defense News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Peter,

We suspected this was true, but a new report from the _Associated Press_ just confirmed it: **The path to the House majority in 2024 will run through California’s competitive swing districts like CA-27.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66341097/416019291/-1766409733?refcode=em-7.11.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDExYjM1NS0xNzIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aqDzVeterkCXek62LzG2tzteMIoIFq4VWmF2MKOFcUI=)

**In fact, George is running in the ONLY tossup district in Southern California currently held by a Republican. With just 5 seats needed to swing the majority, a win here could literally tip the scales.**

The truth is that George's campaign is now a direct threat to McCarthy's Speakership. They spent _millions_ boosting Garcia last year, and we only expect more this time around. Early fundraising will be key in getting us on track to win this race.

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: 10,000 strong
body:
Defeating Jim Jordan is worthy of your time and investment.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66341528/416021124/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmE1Y2FjOTQtMTkyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cA-AtXq4iGJbOYbu1mS4pXhTGCCQHKRJlOIGpIpt6x4=)
---
| | Friend, When I launched this campaign to take on the corrupt Jim Jordan, I knew that my team and I would be going up against one of the most ruthless people in Congress—someone focused entirely on making headlines and being the center of attention no matter the cost.
**But I also know that when you stand up to a bully, you have to be ready to take what is thrown at you and deliver it right back. **

Jim Jordan doesn’t accomplish anything; he clearly doesn’t want to do the job for which he was elected. The only thing that matters to Jim Jordan is Jim Jordan, and anyone who gets hurt along the way is expendable, mere collateral damage.

I happen to believe that this isn’t how anyone should treat others, much less someone elected by the people to serve and represent their interests in Congress. **And I am prepared to stand up to bullies like Jim Jordan—especially alongside thousands of like minded Americans standing with me.**

To date, my campaign boasts the support of nearly 8,000 individual donors—7,934 to be exact. **I would like to see us take the fight to Jim Jordan over 10,000 strong._[Can I count on you to stand with me and the thousands of supporters who are ready to tell Jim Jordan that we’ve had enough of his petty bullying?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66341529/416021125/1649708063?refcode=10000-strong&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmE1Y2FjOTQtMTkyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cA-AtXq4iGJbOYbu1mS4pXhTGCCQHKRJlOIGpIpt6x4=)_**

clean_body: Defeating Jim Jordan is worthy of your time and investment.| | | = | | Friend, When I launched this campaign to take on the corrupt Jim Jordan, I knew that my team and I would be going up against one of the most ruthless people in Congress—someone focused entirely on making headlines and being the center of attention no matter the cost. But I also know that when you stand up to a bully, you have to be ready to take what is thrown at you and deliver it right back. Jim Jordan doesn’t accomplish anything; he clearly doesn’t want to do the job for which he was elected. The only thing that matters to Jim Jordan is Jim Jordan, and anyone who gets hurt along the way is expendable, mere collateral damage. I happen to believe that this isn’t how anyone should treat others, much less someone elected by the people to serve and represent their interests in Congress. And I am prepared to stand up to bullies like Jim Jordan—especially alongside thousands of like minded Americans standing with me. To date, my campaign boasts the support of nearly 8,000 individual donors—7,934 to be exact. I would like to see us take the fight to Jim Jordan over 10,000 strong.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = = | = = | | Donate= I am proud to stand with you for our values and for our democracy. This fight is so important, and I am filled with gratitude to have so many people with us now and in the future. Sincerely, -Tamie | = To contribute via check, please address to: 273 SARATOGA ST. name: Elissa Slotkin
