body:
To be upfront: Winning this race is going to take a lot of resources.

| Peter —

My name is Elissa Slotkin, and I am running for the United States Senate in Michigan.

I’m going to lay out more on why I’m running, but if you’re ready to join our campaign to win this open seat in Michigan and protect the Senate majority to our campaign right away, you can use this link: **[_actblue.com/slotkin_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66341704/416021627/-1581227472?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230711-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzI0OGYzNy0xOTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CQM7Hqf5Hq_IGLqsvxCFo0UJ2mhVIGctzz-z6fm2Kb4=)**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66341705/416021628/-1581227472?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230711-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzI0OGYzNy0xOTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CQM7Hqf5Hq_IGLqsvxCFo0UJ2mhVIGctzz-z6fm2Kb4=)
---
Service is how I’ve spent my life: I spent my career protecting our homeland. After 9/11, I was recruited into the CIA and served three tours in Iraq alongside the U.S. military. I went on to serve under Presidents of both parties in the White House, and then at the Pentagon.

But what motivated me to first run for elected office was my mom. She was diagnosed with stage IV ovarian cancer in 2009 – and she didn’t have health insurance. She had let it lapse after the insurance companies had gouged her for years because she happened to have a pre-existing condition. She passed away in 2011, but that experience – of desperately trying to get her care and then the same moment we were filling out bankruptcy paperwork, forever changed me.

These experiences have shaped my time, my priorities, my approach to my four years in the U.S. House, and continue to serve as my motivation to run for Senate.

My experience in public service impacts how I’ve run my campaigns. Before my first run in 2018, I made a decision not to accept any donations from corporate PACs, because I never wanted my constituents to question why I vote the way I do.

My campaign for the U.S. Senate will also refuse money from corporate PACs. Not a dime.

Some people might see it as a disadvantage, especially since Senate campaigns are notoriously expensive. But I know that we can win when we’re powered by real people, contributing what they can, when they can.

**To be upfront: Winning this race is going to take a lot of resources.** A crazy amount. When you’re running to win a seat in a swing state like Michigan, you can’t take anything for granted. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll be moved to support this campaign today.

[_**I would be honored if you would join me and Susan Wild today by splitting a contribution of $10 today. Every dollar really does add up.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66341706/416021629/-1581227472?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230711-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzI0OGYzNy0xOTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CQM7Hqf5Hq_IGLqsvxCFo0UJ2mhVIGctzz-z6fm2Kb4=)

name: Eric Sorensen HQ
subject: A shocking but not surprising SCOTUS ruling→
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66341779/416021928/2043242937?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjFhNzU3OC0xYTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F3XbGnunC2OHsWOvBdK-LscjustgdWe9Qipw-3AOKQo=)
Peter,

At the end of its latest term, the Supreme Court decided several cases that gained national media attention, including one striking down affirmative action in college admissions. But it also ruled that a Colorado wedding website designer can deny service to gay couples, _a decision that will allow businesses to discriminate against the LGBTQ+ community_.

**Given this court’s recent history, the ruling was shocking, but not surprising.**

As the first openly gay member of Congress from Illinois, Rep. Eric Sorensen is passionate about defending – and expanding – the rights of LGBTQ+ Americans. Eric understands that in the face of attacks by the Supreme Court, the LGBTQ+ community needs to be protected by federal law. That’s why he introduced the Equality Act alongside several of his colleagues, even before the Supreme Court ruling came down.

The Equality Act would explicitly outlaw discrimination based on sexual orientation or gender identity in employment, education, and more – and the court’s recent ruling shows this legislation is more vital than ever.

**[We need to show that the public is behind the Equality Act, so we’re asking you to add your name to the petition below. Will you show your support for LGBTQ+ rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66341780/416021929/1107780023?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjFhNzU3OC0xYTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F3XbGnunC2OHsWOvBdK-LscjustgdWe9Qipw-3AOKQo=&emci=ae1a7578-1a20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=af1a7578-1a20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=18052858)**

clean_body: | = Peter, At the end of its latest term, the Supreme Court decided several cases that gained national media attention, including one striking down affirmative action in college admissions. But it also ruled that a Colorado wedding website designer can deny service to gay couples, a decision that will allow businesses to discriminate against the LGBTQ+ community. Given this court’s recent history, the ruling was shocking, but not surprising. As the first openly gay member of Congress from Illinois, Rep. Eric Sorensen is passionate about defending – and expanding – the rights of LGBTQ+ Americans. Eric understands that in the face of attacks by the Supreme Court, the LGBTQ+ community needs to be protected by federal law. That’s why he introduced the Equality Act alongside several of his colleagues, even before the Supreme Court ruling came down. The Equality Act would explicitly outlaw discrimination based on sexual orientation or gender identity in employment, education, and more – and the court’s recent ruling shows this legislation is more vital than ever. | Thank you, Team Sorensen | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. name: Granite Solutions Press
subject: Joyce Craig Wants To Be Governor. Imagine That?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions
body:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

| | | | |
---
| | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:**
July 11, 2023
---
| | **CONTACT:** Rep. Joe Sweeneyinfo@GraniteSolutions.org
---
| **Joyce Craig Wants To Be Governor. Imagine That?**
---
**Salem, NH -** State** ** Representative Joe Sweeney, Founder of Granite Solutions, issued the following statement regarding failing Mayor Joyce Craig's decision to run for Governor:

"Joyce Craig's track record as Mayor of Manchester speaks volumes about the kind of Governor she would be. Her [recent push](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nhpr.org%2Fnh-news%2F2023-06-15%2Fnew-hampshire-mayors-police-chiefs-undocumented-immigrants-drivers-licenses-ids/1/010001894652d4cc-6cc9f7e1-9c24-43da-af73-1944d68392a4-000000/968PHRRbZPgeqYSfAvjS43nywMc=330) for driver's licenses for illegal immigrants and her desire to dismantle Educational Freedom Accounts demonstrate a clear disconnect from the values of our state. At Granite Solutions, we believe in policies that strengthen our communities and prioritize the needs of New Hampshire citizens. We believe in low taxes, preserving our freedoms, and improving education - not through limiting choice, but by expanding it.

Let me be clear: We will vigorously oppose Joyce Craig's and Cinde Warmington's bids for Governor. We'll fight tirelessly to protect the freedoms and values that make New Hampshire great and to ensure our state doesn't fall into the hands of someone who doesn't share these values."

###
---
| | Paid for by Granite Solutions. Joe Sweeney, Chairman., www.GraniteSolutions.org

You received this email because you subscribed to our list. You can [unsubscribe](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fberrima.eomail1.com%2Funsubscribe%3Fep=1%26l=345da996-87c1-11ed-909d-f1da49c32334%26lc=06b1829e-cf31-11ed-896a-873e60e08f9a%26p=ff30713c-201c-11ee-b847-b762ce138755%26pt=campaign%26pv=4%26spa=1689101965%26t=1689101980%26s=7e0e462f50d98455ebb07c0cbbdaa76635d7a651268ecea07b07f68d5233aee2/1/010001894652d4cc-6cc9f7e1-9c24-43da-af73-1944d68392a4-000000/JGrpvHnh3mvY-duAlMSPQfSIN7Q=330) at any time.

name: Councillor Keith Potts
subject: What people are saying about my launch for US Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230711_em_fr_b1_KP_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230711_em_fr_b1_KP_initial]
Friend, I can't thank you enough. When I decided to run for Senate, I never could have imagined the kindness and support we've received.
We aren't the only people talking about my campaign. Some of it has been kind, supportive, and encouraging – people are excited to see a young Democrat throwing their hat into the ring.
But not everyone believes that our people-first message can make it to the Senate –
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230711_em_fr_b1_KP_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230711_em_fr_b1_KP_initial]
Friend, I'm confident we can prove these people wrong. But if we're going to build on the momentum of my launch, and let people know about my passion for choice, freedom, and safety, it's going to take a lot more than just me and my team.
Which is why I'm reaching out for your help. We're relying on a strong coalition of grassroots supporters to order campaign materials and meet as many residents as possible. Will you join our team and donate today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230711_em_fr_b1_KP_initial]
JOIN OUR TEAM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230711_em_fr_b1_KP_initial]
Thank you,
Keith Potts
Keith Potts was first elected in 2019 to represent District 2 on the Indianapolis City-County Council.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230711_em_fr_b1_KP_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230711_em_fr_b1_KP_initial]
Keith’s political work has been centered on issue-based campaigns and progressive candidates, with a particular focus on protecting women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the environment.
He is an arts advocate, having graduated in 2012 from the Boston Conservatory of Music with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree. He works with local non-profit arts organizations, teaching after-school music classes, directing, and performing with organizations like the Phoenix Theatre, Indy Shakes, Indianapolis Chamber Orchestra, Actors Theatre of Indiana, and Civic Theatre. Keith currently lives on the north side of Indianapolis with his husband, Dr. Bryan Dodd, and their rescue dog, Mak.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to
Keith Potts for Senate

Indianapolis, IN 46260

clean_body: [] Friend, I can't thank you enough. When I decided to run for Senate, I never could have imagined the kindness and support we've received. We aren't the only people talking about my campaign. Some of it has been kind, supportive, and encouraging – people are excited to see a young Democrat throwing their hat into the ring. But not everyone believes that our people-first message can make it to the Senate – [] Friend, I'm confident we can prove these people wrong. But if we're going to build on the momentum of my launch, and let people know about my passion for choice, freedom, and safety, it's going to take a lot more than just me and my team. Which is why I'm reaching out for your help. We're relying on a strong coalition of grassroots supporters to order campaign materials and meet as many residents as possible. Will you join our team and donate today? [] JOIN OUR TEAM [] Thank you, Keith Potts Keith Potts was first elected in 2019 to represent District 2 on the Indianapolis City-County Council. [] Keith’s political work has been centered on issue-based campaigns and progressive candidates, with a particular focus on protecting women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the environment. He is an arts advocate, having graduated in 2012 from the Boston Conservatory of Music with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree. He works with local non-profit arts organizations, teaching after-school music classes, directing, and performing with organizations like the Phoenix Theatre, Indy Shakes, Indianapolis Chamber Orchestra, Actors Theatre of Indiana, and Civic Theatre. Keith currently lives on the north side of Indianapolis with his husband, Dr. Bryan Dodd, and their rescue dog, Mak. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to Keith Potts for Senate PO Box 90103 Indianapolis, IN 46260 SUPPORT KEITH [] [] Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate Keith for Senate PO Box 90103 Indianapolis, IN 46260 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Tomorrow I'll be playing in the 15th Annual Congressional Women's Softball Game, Peter!

The Congressional softball game is a great chance to connect with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle while supporting a great cause.

This game, and all the 7 am practices leading up to it, is one of my favorite parts of serving in Congress. I've been bringing my glove home every weekend to practice with Sam and David, and got a little extra help this year from “Coach Andy,” who has coached girls softball for decades! I’m looking to make them all proud tomorrow. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66343322/416025925/419922522?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmMxZjgyMi0xZDIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ud9GZfQ7-3SsGqLW64ZFCwnDKint4SXuMg_g0uHinW0=&emci=05df7da2-0220-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b6c1f822-1d20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66343323/416025926/419922522?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmMxZjgyMi0xZDIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ud9GZfQ7-3SsGqLW64ZFCwnDKint4SXuMg_g0uHinW0=&emci=05df7da2-0220-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b6c1f822-1d20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---|---|---

**Our bipartisan team will play against the DC Press Corps to fundraise for the**Young Survival Coalition**. This important charity offers resources, connections and outreach to young women diagnosed with breast cancer. **

This year, I’m playing as a tribute to my dear friend Tracy Dobmeier who remains cancer free to this day after a 2017 breast cancer diagnosis. Here we are, as preschool friends: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66343324/416025927/419922522?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmMxZjgyMi0xZDIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ud9GZfQ7-3SsGqLW64ZFCwnDKint4SXuMg_g0uHinW0=&emci=05df7da2-0220-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b6c1f822-1d20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---

Since 2009, the Congressional Women’s Softball Game has raised more than $3.1M to support the Young Survival Coalition! **To support the Young Survival Coalition, visit their website and make a contribution here:** **[https://youngsurvival.org/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66343325/416025928/419922522?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmMxZjgyMi0xZDIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ud9GZfQ7-3SsGqLW64ZFCwnDKint4SXuMg_g0uHinW0=&emci=05df7da2-0220-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b6c1f822-1d20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)**

Thank you, and let's beat the press tomorrow!

Kim

name: Sean Feucht
subject: Historic Flooding In Vermont
body:
Saturday's Revival In Jeopardy | | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=91afcfc566604561bb5cb1faa4024b2e&_e=Jx-G7-4gW0FXGOotFcJWDJUAk5u2vVbTJtcvpVYJjhRvoYuu46EYD-R1MlTDpaFtXDSUg-F_mm7nuay0FekeSfy9GV2rsR-irdxbP-nayEqHOM0BNnFv-6pMqKHlkkAm1dF1jnG5L0y26sDAU7j3cg5kpTfYsR2kUdDPsiXjsjlzR00VwfJ5_8t06dgLfZOqFmXNDbJXs6adjnZGy6dBNkb72ol7MRIH7eWo-Djnfrw2CA277Oj6qS6niKQjtqFoSbsfLtNXOd-B_N3My3bka6fHCtBDFgMdfpEDe8YQmcZvStZHXDqDMTuWq-CbqKS4)
---
Dear Friend,
---
This week, the Kingdom to the Capitol Tour is rolling through the heart of New England--Rhode Island, New Hampshire, and Vermont! But Sunday's revival is in jeopardy. Montpelier is experiencing historic levels of flooding, and as of this morning, some parts of the state are being deluged with over 9 inches of rain! Homes and businesses are flooded, and people's livelihoods are threatened! It's too early to tell how our revival will be impacted, but our first concern is with the people of Vermont!
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=91afcfc566604561bb5cb1faa4024b2e&_e=Jx-G7-4gW0FXGOotFcJWDJUAk5u2vVbTJtcvpVYJjhRvoYuu46EYD-R1MlTDpaFtXDSUg-F_mm7nuay0FekeSfy9GV2rsR-irdxbP-nayEqHOM0BNnFv-6pMqKHlkkAm1dF1jnG5L0y26sDAU7j3cg5kpTfYsR2kUdDPsiXjsjk61G2UVCi9gxlO2xWYFO-od4TE6DEC0Pc93Xp3TnapqQqAiaGF5SqbDXOBwdNPZpGJfmAvAQ4_cVjuTmlUHF8DjCMiudGL2Z2Rsef15orahmunhZAH4EA1AQEaZxVas3jFLsuro6rAzwg3qXfGZg18)
---
Over the past three years, we've seen natural disasters disrupt events, our fair share of venue cancellations, and even threats from local governments. But through it all, we've been faithful to bring worship and praise no matter the circumstances, and God has been faithful to show up in power every time! No matter what happens this weekend, I can say with _CERTAINTY_ , God will be praised, and we will be faithful!
---
[**DONATE TO LET US WORSHIP >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=91afcfc566604561bb5cb1faa4024b2e&_e=Jx-G7-4gW0FXGOotFcJWDJUAk5u2vVbTJtcvpVYJjhRvoYuu46EYD-R1MlTDpaFtXDSUg-F_mm7nuay0FekeSfy9GV2rsR-irdxbP-nayEqHOM0BNnFv-6pMqKHlkkAm1dF1jnG5L0y26sDAU7j3cg5kpTfYsR2kUdDPsiXjsjlCMUP2XaCbRGOOOyzR8CrWy-gdY72uDJ7zTRa5FOatd_TIwIioDLndgkVSEPVmAa11YPOfXiG-i_CERKgyaev2CjuJJelMJoAK126jlLWA5bmgV0OLCOGoDiwMeuu0FqycykeHefKR0YAFU1qjhm1N)
---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean

I'm tired of seeing Republicans...
---

Friend, **The time for chirping from the sidelines is over.** Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple: **2024 is the time to put up or shut up**. As a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida, and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership nationwide. I will never stop standing up for what I know is right--even when it goes against the grain of public opinion. The American people deserve a President with a track record of taking action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe Biden has done more to damage our nation than anyone, and Kamala Harris has done nothing at all. I am DONE hearing excuses. If Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the playbook for defeating the woke mob:
* Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING CRT and pornographic content for young kids

* STANDING UP against woke corporations who have tried to force taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda

* DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down the country

I'm tired of seeing Republicans lose. _A_ _ren 't you, Friend?_ I promise you, with me as your candidate and President, Republicans will forget this culture of losing once and for all. To make sure we're able to achieve this, I am asking for your continued support. **[If you can, will you pitch in?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=fc3e8ded0b0647de9403e9de7a7eb908&_e=eUJ0U-mTNApdOCTUdA4a5Weeys2RJHuCfdcja7IDjyYjVsnUFIfj27S6k7j_VG5qcZXzBPpPEAYu-dH2_bKF4y_iSUDqaVR-3xECRJ0JKflaltzXqQY5Fl4ZqZ1_2gseIu_rcU_S2c_YXMRC7_bNweCo_QRiPKNKzv2E4RnW_ttHWzU5KMSP_wqMYMSHwiFUVLJa0I8IyE4GEQ4mc9AiMep9ZWgzjWSRwi3nGGMjXa6PjfWC9MZRmcGErq6VyFKVVYdq63Xu-G6yJV5CGcoHKcDXlx_dhHgTQsw7M8PJLyqGn3XMfQPYe7i_fzM33uKieXOLvSekl3n_vawmyveAmrgyoHhytBTP2bUHGEEDXJCP5jE0NJKd03PoeQ5j4HKecVo-VNr19XNvHAAzfj60q_m5eC1T4T3v9BGKGU0_SAUf1wLqOICcOsxLs5IaG7cA "If you can, will you pitch in?")**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. clean_body: I'm tired of seeing Republicans... | | | | | | | | | | Friend, The time for chirping from the sidelines is over. Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple: 2024 is the time to put up or shut up. As a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida, and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership nationwide. I will never stop standing up for what I know is right--even when it goes against the grain of public opinion. The American people deserve a President with a track record of taking action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe Biden has done more to damage our nation than anyone, and Kamala Harris has done nothing at all. I am DONE hearing excuses. If Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the playbook for defeating the woke mob: Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING CRT and pornographic content for young kids STANDING UP against woke corporations who have tried to force taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down the country I'm tired of seeing Republicans lose. A ren 't you, Friend? I promise you, with me as your candidate and President, Republicans will forget this culture of losing once and for all. To make sure we're able to achieve this, I am asking for your continued support. "If you can, will you pitch in?" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | The time to act is now. The time for leadership is now. 2024 is going to be the year that our Great American Comeback takes shape. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. We will fight back and WIN. I am humbly asking for your support today. Join me, and we will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the Republican party. We will keep the woke indoctrination away from kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in schools, and the consumer choices we make. | | Our Great American Comeback is attainable as long as we're willing to fight for it. In Freedom, | Ron DeSantis | | - | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. subject: Taking a stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
I burned alive for what felt like an eternity as I came to terms with my mortality.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c3249fa972844e069b2a64180f790978&_e=r34UCNVrzgCQw_2s46tJ0E4Xx6IJ-I3qRYIZ17a1Iu_ai1cgn14Nh4jnCKCPQh7rNQImXYIQ6s7CPUsOYpb8hxkXv2l7PTJfSjA1pMB_OXSMkXuccL_rDRmKSWdCuUJFZo0IISFUZNCHlElrbw82wSYs00A-XETlHQ3ezTh5dsewZ7U0sA6TRhoA0unLHsGH2GyPA-arZXD58wp5H9EueDnzf6DifBybn-Oo4ZjEMKkQD4RuulDgLSldjkMI69xVjkvmoy34HiF2HZrzvoohNmN_YHiBFKoiS5JfLB-YnIIpIB_57G7HQVeOpb-Z56l2_B4K9p6Qz-6nElnzUegaLMsSOmHAwx1EgWq6qnNkyWz5Ys8daodzYawfr94GkPhSErGHNBE_DKTrTjFvZfwJ4qWcX9u1nXE2l1mjtxyx1SuwoDtBu3o5kSRBSJcgPPee6XMdrFfbl7ID3w3H2d_INw4iIzkMgbzPbn6siJbCfCC7ZFFczA9m1yCBc-UW9sVRQOIy-OziDX6YuyYmEqI283cAcHdz3jrIyl2n6SFR_VOuf_tA2zi4v9kFZOZHxMTsx9OkppqssIUu5a8mA9eAeg%3D%3D)
---
| | I shouldn't be alive, Friend. When I was serving in Afghanistan, a roadside bomb blew up under the gas tank of my vehicle. I burned alive for what felt like an eternity as I came to terms with my mortality.
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c3249fa972844e069b2a64180f790978&_e=r34UCNVrzgCQw_2s46tJ0E4Xx6IJ-I3qRYIZ17a1Iu_ai1cgn14Nh4jnCKCPQh7rNQImXYIQ6s7CPUsOYpb8hxkXv2l7PTJfSjA1pMB_OXSMkXuccL_rDRmKSWdCuUJFZo0IISFUZNCHlElrbw82wSYs00A-XETlHQ3ezTh5dsewZ7U0sA6TRhoA0unLHsGH2GyPA-arZXD58wp5H9EueDnzf6DifBybn-Oo4ZjEMKkQD4RuulDgLSldjkMI69xVjkvmoy34HiF2HZrzvoohNmN_YHiBFKoiS5JfLB-YnIIpIB_57G7HQVeOpb-Z56l2_B4K9p6Qz-6nElnzUegaLMsSOmHAwx1EgWq6qnNkyWz5Ys8daodzYawfr94GkPhSErGHNBE_DKTrTjFvZfwJ4qWcX9u1nXE2l1mjtxyx1SuwoDtBu3o5kSRBSJcgPPeeX9VB-6xxzF6fclgos5ZKAdjwC4s79LiMD6O-NJbOk9bcYfpaT3otbHRUl_AcRc0Ax322cuggiNC116gEiaEho6tpHso4if3kq6KRUE5Fw8nzR7gYN6JMd4Qu1P65Gvzn2AISPS_B1cVMsQE0vs7xlg%3D%3D)
---
I thought it would be the end of me, but by the grace of God, I survived. I got a second chance at life, and there's no way I'm going to waste it by only looking out for myself. [**That 's why I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Nevada**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c3249fa972844e069b2a64180f790978&_e=r34UCNVrzgCQw_2s46tJ0E4Xx6IJ-I3qRYIZ17a1Iu_ai1cgn14Nh4jnCKCPQh7rNQImXYIQ6s7CPUsOYpb8hxkXv2l7PTJfSjA1pMB_OXSMkXuccL_rDRmKSWdCuUJFZo0IISFUZNCHlElrbw82wSYs00A-XETlHQ3ezTh5dsewZ7U0sA6TRhoA0unLHsGH2GyPA-arZXD58wp5H9EueDnzf6DifBybn-Oo4ZjEMKkQD4RuulDgLSldjkMI69xVjkvmoy34HiF2HZrzvoohNmN_YHiBFKoiS5JfLB-YnIIpIB_57G7HQVeOpb-Z56l2_B4K9p6Qz-6nElnzUegaLMsSOmHAwx1EgWq6qnNkyWz5Ys8daodzYawfr94GkPhSErGHNBE_DKTrTjFvZfwJ4qWcX9u1nXE2l1mjtxyx1SuwoDtBu3o5kSRBSJcgPPeetPw5r8wp3zIeGBXN9A-MkQ8o5tFDF570j5_4xMM1DScbPA7le4kTv_3jzqUnXqNIjmcuzGT6-9_m34XWV5gXf9aF0OieGYQvaeNRTyhnQMLMedlcfPABoYK0LBHJaHLxDGMrY04PR9A6iTRRxnLpbw%3D%3D) -- not because it's easy. But because the reason I'm still alive today _is to serve_. Our nation is in crisis and our so-called "leaders" have gone AWOL. With an economy in shambles, unprecedented threats from our adversaries, a wide open border, and D.C. politicians like NV Sen. Jacky Rosen failing to tackle our challenges head on, our nation is on a collision course with total disaster. **Too often, politicians only work to serve themselves while forgetting about the people they swore to serve. They see a challenge and they run the other way.** Well, Friend, I've survived my fair share of challenges, and I'm willing to take this one head on -- because even though I'm no longer on active duty, I haven't given up on my commitment to service. Our country, our state, and our people deserve a Senator who's proven that they'll put everything on the line for America, just as I have. That's why I want to deploy to Washington D.C. for a new mission with the same goal: [**Serving our great country.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c3249fa972844e069b2a64180f790978&_e=r34UCNVrzgCQw_2s46tJ0E4Xx6IJ-I3qRYIZ17a1Iu_ai1cgn14Nh4jnCKCPQh7rNQImXYIQ6s7CPUsOYpb8hxkXv2l7PTJfSjA1pMB_OXSMkXuccL_rDRmKSWdCuUJFZo0IISFUZNCHlElrbw82wSYs00A-XETlHQ3ezTh5dsewZ7U0sA6TRhoA0unLHsGH2GyPA-arZXD58wp5H9EueDnzf6DifBybn-Oo4ZjEMKkQD4RuulDgLSldjkMI69xVjkvmoy34HiF2HZrzvoohNmN_YHiBFKoiS5JfLB-YnIIpIB_57G7HQVeOpb-Z56l2_B4K9p6Qz-6nElnzUegaLMsSOmHAwx1EgWq6qnNkyWz5Ys8daodzYawfr94GkPhSErGHNBE_DKTrTjFvZfwJ4qWcX9u1nXE2l1mjtxyx1SuwoDtBu3o5kSRBSJcgPPee2PUHg0ENhlXwxLIfSY4UtbTxd8FlSt5d2a8d3l-z7Y69KbqPVhu2YEo96hG9kjoEkQDotf19o3k02Y1QEo_nI-8kyrflZfTkxngjvNaEWjo3DbKBV35YkN17Po6U1muDTcDvBbRLXvHUhzXoHGr2HA%3D%3D) Friend, can I count on you to have my back on my next mission? [**Chip in ANY AMOUNT >>**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c3249fa972844e069b2a64180f790978&_e=r34UCNVrzgCQw_2s46tJ0E4Xx6IJ-I3qRYIZ17a1Iu_ai1cgn14Nh4jnCKCPQh7rNQImXYIQ6s7CPUsOYpb8hxkXv2l7PTJfSjA1pMB_OXSMkXuccL_rDRmKSWdCuUJFZo0IISFUZNCHlElrbw82wSYs00A-XETlHQ3ezTh5dsewZ7U0sA6TRhoA0unLHsGH2GyPA-arZXD58wp5H9EueDnzf6DifBybn-Oo4ZjEMKkQD4RuulDgLSldjkMI69xVjkvmoy34HiF2HZrzvoohNmN_YHiBFKoiS5JfLB-YnIIpIB_57G7HQVeOpb-Z56l2_B4K9p6Qz-6nElnzUegaLMsSOmHAwx1EgWq6qnNkyWz5Ys8daodzYawfr94GkPhSErGHNBE_DKTrTjFvZfwJ4qWcX9u1nXE2l1mjtxyx1SuwoDtBu3o5kSRBSJcgPPeeTZcFHL7rn4nL2FYcLuyVYZMKEH6yrhItwq5TaVyj6g3N0FU5iTRKZyORO_vVin--jj1oNrbYHRGI12oeVLzyCdslCte56I5Ae-NoacfCTahMRc4CMMXZuEiyLrh4_tOfUvpCyhEBZyQ_rS4Ggs050g%3D%3D) This is our country and our fight. I won't back down. Duty First,
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c3249fa972844e069b2a64180f790978&_e=r34UCNVrzgCQw_2s46tJ0E4Xx6IJ-I3qRYIZ17a1Iu_ai1cgn14Nh4jnCKCPQh7rNQImXYIQ6s7CPUsOYpb8hxkXv2l7PTJfSjA1pMB_OXSMkXuccL_rDRmKSWdCuUJFZo0IISFUZNCHlElrbw82wSYs00A-XETlHQ3ezTh5dsewZ7U0sA6TRhoA0unLHsGH2GyPA-arZXD58wp5H9EueDnzf6DifBybn-Oo4ZjEMKkQD4RuulDgLSldjkMI69xVjkvmoy34HiF2HZrzvoohNmN_YHiBFKoiS5JfLB-YnIIpIB_57G7HQVeOpb-Z56l2_B4K9p6Qz-6nElnzUegaLMsSOmHAwx1EgWq6qnNkyWz5Ys8daodzYawfr94GkPhSErGHNBE_DKTrTjFvZfwJ4qWcX9u1nXE2l1mjtxyx1SuwoDtBu3o5kSRBSJcgPPeeuIJ6Q6zXisdy0WAXUTdN9qrmqJEO875viKwmq4aQ6LqI_0NdGK56-CqxgtI8sMfvtlmK0lbtyxf49mMTru0Cc8WTqN2lzOhTkAs4eNOUTfdGuwxKHQgPtKbFHCV8o8WqMDLL7rR3Iixled1nEUbcjA%3D%3D)

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I simply cannot compete
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I needed to reach out directly, Peter: GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=548%2E35263%2EhRjVnt)
I needed to reach out directly, Peter: **GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada.** Mitch McConnell handpicked him because he knows Brown will be his rubber stamp in the Senate, voting for anything including a **national abortion ban.** I’m fighting as hard as I can to defend my seat from a GOP takeover, but I can’t do it alone. **[Will you chip in $5 or more now to split between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin’s to help me keep Nevada blue?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-rosen.SC53au&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230711_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=548%2E35263%2EhRjVnt)** With experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ saying that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, McConnell and his GOP allies are coming after me as a top target. Now, _The Washington Post_ reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country – **and a recent poll shows me 2 points down.** **This is the most pivotal moment of our campaign so far, Peter.** I simply cannot compete with the GOP’s massive war chest unless supporters like you chip in. **In a race this close, every dollar could mean the difference between winning and losing – so please, I’m humbly asking:** **[Will you chip in $5, $10, or as much as you can spare to split between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin’s? [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66347643/416030781/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjEyMDI2Yi0yMjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ezh9xIXX_if7bDDwcUCGnYABUUeV1y1IGg76VDYPDjo=&emci=6a96ba8f-1b1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b212026b-2220-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Did you know that a record number of anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced this year? At least 417 in state legislatures across America – a new record. Frankly, it’s disturbing to see more states pass these regressive and outdated laws that infringe on the rights and liberties of LGBTQ+ Americans. That’s why I couldn’t be more proud to re-introduce our _Equality Act_ , comprehensive legislation that would protect LGBTQ+ Americans from discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity in housing, employment, education, jury service, federal funding, and more. **No person should face discrimination based on who they are or who they love.** _****[Derek, will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of my _Equality Act_ now so we can make that a reality?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66347644/416030782/-88935816?refcode=mw_em_230711_1_a&ms=mw_em_230711_1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjEyMDI2Yi0yMjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ezh9xIXX_if7bDDwcUCGnYABUUeV1y1IGg76VDYPDjo=&emci=6a96ba8f-1b1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b212026b-2220-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)****_ We have the chance to take historic action in Congress by passing the _Equality Act_. Let’s not squander it. _**[Add your name now to call on Congress to pass my legislation and enshrine protections for LGBTQ+ Americans into law>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66347645/416030785/-88935816?refcode=mw_em_230711_1_a&ms=mw_em_230711_1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjEyMDI2Yi0yMjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ezh9xIXX_if7bDDwcUCGnYABUUeV1y1IGg76VDYPDjo=&emci=6a96ba8f-1b1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b212026b-2220-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)**_ Thank you, Mark Warner ********[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66347646/416030786/-88935816?refcode=mw_em_230711_1_a&ms=mw_em_230711_1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjEyMDI2Yi0yMjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ezh9xIXX_if7bDDwcUCGnYABUUeV1y1IGg76VDYPDjo=&emci=6a96ba8f-1b1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b212026b-2220-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)********

clean_body: Peter, The only way to ensure that the America First agenda is enshrined into the history books is to have a Republican Senate. Republicans MUST take back the Senate in 2024 because I'll need a red Senate to restore the Make America Great Again movement when I'm back in the White House. You might be watching the Left destroy our great country, day after day, and wonder what you can do to stop them right now. Well Peter, you can step up now and ensure that Republican Senate candidates take back the Senate in 2024. Making sure that there is a red Senate is the best thing you can do for the America First agenda right now. Imagine the greatness we could achieve if we have a Republican majority in the House and Senate while I’m in the White House. Thank you, Donald J. name: Judicial Watch NewsLink
subject: Air Force Academy Instructional Materials Include Presentations on Critical Race Theory, White Privilege, and Black Lives Matter
body: Background on complaint filed against Air Force General Charles Brown [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64109&L=29848&F=T&&hash=937b91d9a6374173730084d1f38716f63c315b32fa13a760cf563e7c2e0e0b98] Watchdog files complaint over concerns on top Air Force Gen. Brown's diversity hire priorities [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64109&L=29848&F=T&&hash=937b91d9a6374173730084d1f38716f63c315b32fa13a760cf563e7c2e0e0b98] Source: Just the News [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64109&L=29848&F=T&&hash=937b91d9a6374173730084d1f38716f63c315b32fa13a760cf563e7c2e0e0b98] Air Force chief of staff Gen. Charles Q. Brown is making hiring decisions based on race and ideology, in possible violation of the U.S. Constitution, according to a complaint filed by the American Accountability Foundation. President Biden is expected to nominate Brown as the next Joint Chiefs of Staff chairman to replace Gen. Mark Milley. Bishop Garrison is a senior advisor to Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin who worked as a defense official under Obama and a foreign policy advisor on Hillary Clinton’s presidential campaign. clean_body: Background on complaint filed against Air Force General Charles Brown [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [] Watchdog files complaint over concerns on top Air Force Gen. Brown's diversity hire priorities [] Source: Just the News [] Air Force chief of staff Gen. Charles Q. Brown is making hiring decisions based on race and ideology, in possible violation of the U.S. Constitution, according to a complaint filed by the American Accountability Foundation. President Biden is expected to nominate Brown as the next Joint Chiefs of Staff chairman to replace Gen. Mark Milley. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] 2022-02-15 Sr. DOD Advisor: Military Needs Minorities to Retain Competitive Edge, Achieve Critical Missions [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Pushing a Department of Defense initiative to recruit and promote minorities, a senior Pentagon official proclaimed that diversity, equity and inclusion will help the U.S. military achieve critical missions and make forces more lethal. Bishop Garrison is a senior advisor to Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin who worked as a defense official under Obama and a foreign policy advisor on Hillary Clinton’s presidential campaign. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] 2023-07-07 Air Force Academy Instructional Materials Include Presentations on Critical Race Theory, White Privilege, and Black Lives Matter [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch received 478 pages of records from the United States Air Force Academy that include instructional materials and emails that address topics such as Critical Race Theory, “white privilege,” and Black Lives Matter. Various slides promote BLM, including one depicting a white police officer holding a sign pointing to a black man, asking, “Is his life worth less than mine?” [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] 2022-09-29 Judicial Watch Sues on Behalf of Military Group for Air Force Academy Critical Race Theory Records [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit on behalf of Stand Together Against Racism and Radicalism in the Services, Inc. (STARRS) for U.S. Air Force Academy records regarding “systemic racism,” as well as records of critical race theory at the Academy. **MEET MIKE:** | A CHAMPION FOR PRINCIPLED LEADERSHIP
Mike learned his love for the Constitution around the family dinner table. Mike’s father, Rex Lee, served as Solicitor General under President Ronald Reagan and later as President of Brigham Young University. As a child, Mike attended his father’s arguments before the U.S. Supreme Court, giving him a unique understanding of the government from an early age. As an attorney he developed a more complete understanding of why the Constitution is essential to the protection of life, liberty, and property.

After graduating from law school in 1997, he served as a law clerk to Judge Dee Benson of the U.S. District Court for the District of Utah. He then clerked for Judge Samuel A. Alito, Jr., who was serving at that time on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Third Circuit Court in Newark, New Jersey. After his second clerkship, he joined the Washington, D.C. office of Sidley & Austin, where he specialized in appellate and Supreme Court litigation. Several years later, Mike was invited to serve as an Assistant U.S. Attorney in Salt Lake City, preparing briefs and arguing cases before the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Tenth Circuit. He served as Governor Huntsman’s General Counsel and then went to Washington for a one-year clerkship with Justice Alito at the U.S. Supreme Court.

Following his clerkship, Mike joined the Salt Lake office of the Washington, D.C.-based law firm of Howrey LLP. Mike has earned a reputation as an outstanding lawyer based on his sound judgment, writing and courtroom advocacy skills, and thorough understanding of the Constitution. Mike and Sharon have three children and live in Provo, Utah.

Peter, Brandon knows a thing or two about struggling Mississippians. He grew up in a dirt-poor household, where his mom worked her fingers to the bone to provide for their family.

These experiences shaped him into the leader he is today.

Brandon has dedicated his career to helping working people and families just like him. Now, he’s ready to roll up his sleeves and continue delivering results as governor.

And that’s exactly what our new TV ad is all about.

**Here’s the thing: TV ads are crucial for getting our message out to voters, but they cost a _fortune_. We need your help now more than ever to keep our ad on the airwaves and spread Brandon’s message across Mississippi.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
Peter,

After inciting an insurrection, trying to overturn our election, and stealing classified documents once he left office, justice is finally being served against Donald Trump.

But I want to warn you that Trump and his allies are still a clear and present danger to our democracy. Not only is Trump still leading almost every Republican poll for 2024, but his allies in Congress like Speaker Kevin McCarthy and Chairman Jim Jordan are weaponizing their House majority and our committees to do Trump’s bidding.

We have to stand up to these extremists and take back the House next year. So, I’m asking you to please split a donation between me and Future Forum PAC today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-July2023-FR-StaceyPlaskett?&refcode=E3316-20230711-StaceyPlaskett-SL-Surrogate&amount=25]

Donald Trump says he has already raised nearly $7 million since he was indicted. That means we have to mount our defenses and make sure that if Republicans can’t defeat him in a primary, we have the resources to defeat Trump in 2024.

I won’t stop fighting to protect our democracy from these extremists, but we seriously cannot stop them without your support.

Can you please donate as much as you can between me and Future Forum PAC today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-July2023-FR-StaceyPlaskett?&refcode=E3316-20230711-StaceyPlaskett-SL-Surrogate&amount=25]

We can never let Trump become President again.

- Stacey Plaskett

name: Team Swalwell
subject: it's like flunking out of clown college 🤡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
the Chaos Caucus is crumbling in real time |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _

| **Final stage before digital money** [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9dc130ad5a4649f7a130406016529399&_e=5jCXDw8yoKrnwOIPncvKPxQDQ0snCCHEkaXOQm3J80_6ueeZh1mP2wc_3ToNW08v_qYZ0mzKhVqbUK76L6a_5kGlJ7g-FcsTZNIvKXY7oBDuNYgYMb1PgpEduLm6xB93yU2-3Z_pVBO52hkBb42G4ERZvmgN9VK4nHHwsoM_DfbRf7PzSJNuBlaKYTSqhrP0Op7IoqpO9O4DqtGCpcjbPc6VfmH7Xqa-j0b-L1AVg1GGDxTlvE6_L3bBQHjp5FNbcADRBKzf999rlEcMEDUnBDcnaMPp9rwSmN_u1eAgZFE%3D) The end is near... My GOP opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman, and all Michigan Republican Representatives have just endorsed Donald Trump for president, aligning themselves with the extreme ideologies that have held our Nation back.
The Nation is watching Michigan. Let us show them that we are up to the challenge and will fight harder, longer, and wiser to defeat Trump and Bergman.
We cannot let this go unanswered, and I need your support now more than ever. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Trump lost the state in 2020 to Joe Biden by more than 154,000 votes, and is still harming our democracy by claiming fraud.
In November, Trump’s slate of endorsed 2022 GOP candidates for statewide office — governor, attorney general, and secretary of state, all election deniers — were defeated. Democrats won majorities in the state House and Senate for the first time in nearly 40 years.
If we can flip the state, let’s now show who we are and reclaim more Congressional seats.
The twice-impeached Trump is under indictment on more than 70 felony counts in separate state and federal investigations.
As your candidate for Congress, I am committed to reversing Bergman and Trump’s damage, and implementing policies that foster economic growth, create sustainable jobs, and uplift every American.
We deserve leaders who prioritize the health and well-being of our citizens and who rely on science and expertise to guide their decisions. I pledge always to put people first and work tirelessly to ensure our country moves forward, not backward.
Our campaign is rooted in unity, progress, and inclusivity , and we reject the politics of division and culture wars that have plagued our Nation for far too long.
We can build bridges, find common ground, and ensure every voice is heard and valued. This strategy is the path to a more robust, more vibrant democracy.
With your unwavering support, we can show the Nation how to work together. Our campaign is fueled by the energy and dedication of people like you who believe in a brighter future for our rural communities and our country.
Together, we can bring about the positive change we so desperately need.
Your generous contribution [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] will allow us to amplify our message, reach more voters, and build a strong grassroots movement that cannot be ignored. Every dollar counts and makes a real difference in our pursuit of progress.
Adding your name to our list of contributors will help us send a strong message condemning extremism and display that thousands of us are committed to creating a prosperous future for all.
Thank you for being a vital part of our campaign. With your continued support, we will rise above division and work towards a brighter, more inclusive future for Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula.
Warm regards,
Dr. Bob Lorinser
Candidate for U.S. Congress

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Bees are on the BRINK of extinction
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1870722?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell the EPA to prioritize pollinator health above Big Ag’s corporate greed!** The EPA plans to approve bee-killing pesticides called neonics for another 15 years -- _**at a time when wild bee populations are PLUMMETING. **_ Neonics have already made U.S. agriculture nearly 48 TIMES more toxic to bees in the past two decades. That impacts species **like the Western Bumblebee, which has declined by 93%.** Now, scientists have identified **40% of insect pollinators,** including many species of bees, that are on the _**BRINK OF EXTINCTION**_. And bee-killing neonics are pushing these vulnerable species closer to demise. If we let the EPA bend to pressure from the pesticide corporations perpetuating the widespread use of neonics for profit,_** we could soon lose these precious pollinators forever. **_[**Take action now to STOP these toxic pesticides from wiping out wild bees >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1870723?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1870724?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The EPA already knows that the negative effects of neonics are far-reaching. They have even cited **“ecological risks of concern, particularly to pollinators”** and acknowledge **_“the importance of pollinators for healthy ecosystems and a sustainable food supply.”_**
We rely on bees and other pollinators for **1 in 3 bites of food that we eat,** and these little helpers are responsible for **75% of our most nutritious food crops** like fruits, veggies, and nuts. In fact, without bees, __**almonds wouldn’t even EXIST!**__
The EU has prohibited the worst neonics, and states like Connecticut and New Jersey have restricted them, too. **Now, it’s time for the EPA to step up and END the widespread national use of these bee-killing pesticides _ immediately._ **[**Add your name now to DEMAND that the EPA takes federal action to BAN neonics -- before our ecosystems face the DISASTROUS CONSEQUENCES >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1870725?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1870724?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for taking urgent action to protect pollinators!
Friends of the Earth**
|

| | We need Democratic pro-choice women in local office now more than ever [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66353669/416043010/228261731?sourceid=1050440&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTA4MDY5My0yYzIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Il3sd2cr7XT3-N1odpCGzabIT9l_6El_K-IQnTnfWZo=&emci=a3876c8b-2c20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=8a080693-2c20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Over the last few months, we've rolled out an inspiring slate of Democratic pro-choice endorsements for state and local elections this cycle. The most exciting part of this work? Getting to share the stories of these inspiring leaders with this community of pro-choice activists and voters like you! Today we're writing to tell you about mayoral candidates and pro-choice champions **Sheila Jackson Lee (Houston, TX)** and Mayor **Regina Romero (Tucson, AZ)**. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66353671/416043012/228261731?sourceid=1050440&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTA4MDY5My0yYzIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Il3sd2cr7XT3-N1odpCGzabIT9l_6El_K-IQnTnfWZo=&emci=a3876c8b-2c20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=8a080693-2c20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter, in case you don't know Sheila and Regina yet, here are just a few reasons EMILYs List is proud to support them:
* Rep. **Sheila Jackson Lee** is facing a tough road ahead as she enters the Houston, TX mayoral race. With a congressional career focused on championing families, abortion access, and civil rights, Sheila is ready to bring her decades of experience to her Houston community — _and we can help her do it!_

* In swing state Arizona, Mayor of Tucson **Regina Romero** has been a proud defender of abortion access and civil rights since her 2019 election. While in office, improving economic opportunities and fighting racial disparities in Tucson have been central to her work — _and her Aug. 1 primary is just around the corner!_

**We can't overstress the importance of local elections like these, which is why we wanted to ask directly: Will you step up to support Democratic pro-choice women like Sheila and Regina running in key local races? Donate now:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-Women-This-July](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66353680/416043023/228261731?sourceid=1050440&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTA4MDY5My0yYzIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Il3sd2cr7XT3-N1odpCGzabIT9l_6El_K-IQnTnfWZo=&emci=a3876c8b-2c20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=8a080693-2c20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Thank you,

[**July 11, 1804:** Founding father and first Secretary of the Treasury Alexander Hamilton was mortally wounded by Vice President Aaron Burr during a duel in Weehawken, New Jersey. The longtime political rivals were unable to resolve their dispute amicably, leading to the pair meeting on the dueling ground. Alexander Hamilton died the following day, and Aaron Burr, charged with two counts of murder, would never hold political office again. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1866d48ed561411aac9c721b5206be8e&_e=MWpoeAeB4sYicySl_N82pBZWKGnsAQ3jpyPnRzDqhvRwdijKNi_JDnb2k_1WU5ZzujkNTLon3qMbkmBQR1uirNksRBJ9_UbkEaiwtLQKW7XqICw4iEOZq-mofAJz015kVFqmrnPUpPaS8C45o3w9dB7MINWJEgyANYVWb0fMbWgV_w3CCWKviNVylaS-e-6Egz4xfRGXpBTnufqWPiSs7rMyvUAcQw2XyfkTN-EdISs%3D) **Source -[pbs.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1866d48ed561411aac9c721b5206be8e&_e=MWpoeAeB4sYicySl_N82pBZWKGnsAQ3jpyPnRzDqhvRwdijKNi_JDnb2k_1WU5ZzujkNTLon3qMbkmBQR1uirAUprTT1KWBcVxcGj4FNn4gRT4KzE2EiDODu_1zQbe48hlUXnaWvDe6LiJ4w3A25VTjc2gp8wU8VwV1QDjoLQ3Nuazj_iokimFvFgAJ1zoILsIiAB2qZY0aXTI--2IFSLXu8OJPsoClEGRdYu13MJaI%3D)**

[**July 11, 1914:** After throwing a no-hitter in a semi pro game, Babe Ruth was signed by the Baltimore Orioles owner-manager Jack Dunn. After a stellar spring showcase with the Orioles, Dunn sold Ruth, along with two other players, to the Boston Red Sox for $30,000. Babe Ruth started for the Red Sox the day after he arrived in a game against the Cleveland Naps. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1866d48ed561411aac9c721b5206be8e&_e=MWpoeAeB4sYicySl_N82pBZWKGnsAQ3jpyPnRzDqhvRATDzd9YXKyrM4gKZMpCfNAmEKvHgAYWmDIai9pS5NWxJJWS3gfcPWrnOZrO5CkczQUV9LEz2Y5F-fXbxCy5P-Xr6AnTeVrw32eLHkMs0jxg7610OTE4pXAuyG4eNvw5pzWZdJ0i2betU3c73i_sngKzpsgJ5iSBHYLN-kMyYPp159O_D1ZvLsWdj8CzRczDaRUIgU0w_d2dE-z9or7-wWaNyDqfmgZC-fcBfLEHH27w%3D%3D) **Source -[sabr.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1866d48ed561411aac9c721b5206be8e&_e=MWpoeAeB4sYicySl_N82pBZWKGnsAQ3jpyPnRzDqhvRATDzd9YXKyrM4gKZMpCfNAmEKvHgAYWmDIai9pS5NWxJJWS3gfcPWrnOZrO5CkcxsqzZK2CtrYiXgKl2fGTeSWUAs9ZUMldq8C3C5tzGqOWinyoUY9FyOtr-asz_oS97HYi5eacanIPSt7Cjx7MSQG0QAYimTfAJXlKzjMD9e7gkIcFZPvMilp0IDZoxb0PzA1Fran_T-xzS4hwGbRYDnC4Vmp3PzcSxnoxhiSwTUBg%3D%3D)**

[**July 11, 2007:** Former Second Lady and First Lady of the United States, Claudia Alta “Lady Bird” Johnson, passed away in West Lake Hills, Texas, at the age of 94 after a series of health problems. Lady Bird Johnson served as Second Lady from 1961 to 1963 and as First Lady from 1963 to 1969. She is remembered for her beautification work and has consistently ranked as one of the most popular First Ladies throughout American history.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1866d48ed561411aac9c721b5206be8e&_e=MWpoeAeB4sYicySl_N82pBZWKGnsAQ3jpyPnRzDqhvQfpSWOXW1mLxHhbhXTh_WW5bKDa5Cb9zLL8WJR3HmtOqwogM8AMf8MBRwYvtimHhgmBI7fb51jEsZx2WKAZiahoTi1jq5dNOi6K6RrOy67-UiyU1x0GLrWgryiX-vsx_mZGl2bp1MxzCbPHmSRkVW6_q5dcz0_ggth9T81lTfpBvWKS-geANjD8wB6GGKhoDQJ2JdCHYSwK1DHWswKkJFZqT34HgjRDAJ7wgoljGNzDQ%3D%3D) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1866d48ed561411aac9c721b5206be8e&_e=MWpoeAeB4sYicySl_N82pBZWKGnsAQ3jpyPnRzDqhvQfpSWOXW1mLxHhbhXTh_WW5bKDa5Cb9zLL8WJR3HmtOqwogM8AMf8MBRwYvtimHhiz4ZlurcBDaI_0YLtdfVq-iM565Munx-4oGyLmb650JvN8T1EHbtXcu0eO8kZtl3jNNC8Glyra49Xf96M5ryXeYw2AGfAMxH5XDbDrysLRM0wj_NpCL7bp5P9_5mlDX2eeNxXmLTtLDcJZGJU8yzMQG1tZvw4Eyqus1oP_TT9aXQ%3D%3D)**

subject: Dan is fighting for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| | **_[Fill Dan in on which initiatives he’s spearheaded that have the biggest impact on you and your family right now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66353912/416044344/-533696402?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230711_SV_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_Local&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmM2MTJlNi0yZDIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DihWho-O60aCaiPcWPhv8fIpABFCk1Il9mZ_fm76hRg=&emci=688be8d5-0720-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=fbc612e6-2d20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**
---

Dan is fighting for mid-Michigan every day — working to support job creation, cut costs for working families and lower the cost of prescription drugs.

While many in Congress are constantly distracted by petty politics and partisanship, Dan serves in Congress to lower the temperature in our political discourse and get _results_ for Michiganders.

**Here’s just some of what he’s working on right now:**
| → July marks the first month Dan’s insulin price caps law fully went into effect, lowering the cost of insulin to a $35/month maximum for seniors under Medicare.

→ Dan just announced $31 million to support early childhood education in mid-Michigan.

→ He’s introduced bipartisan legislation to provide health care for veterans exposed to toxic PFAS chemicals.

→ The House advanced his community project initiatives that would set aside $4.5 million for flood prevention, clean drinking water, and health care.

→ Dan stood up for workers, introducing a bill to make health care more affordable for workers impacted by bad trade deals.

→ He’s introduced a bipartisan bill that will create more manufacturing jobs here in MI-08.

→ He’s announced several new federal grants for local colleges and universities, as well as to support mental health care services in Genesee County.

→ He announced a bill to expand labor rights for public safety officers.

→ He’s continuing to defend Social Security, Medicare, and other essential programs from those who want to undercut them.

---

**Now it’s critical that he hears from you directly about what is impacting you and your family.

_[What kitchen table issues are you and your family focused on right now? We need 2,500 people to take Dan’s community survey and fill us in→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66353913/416044346/-533696402?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230711_SV_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_Local&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmM2MTJlNi0yZDIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DihWho-O60aCaiPcWPhv8fIpABFCk1Il9mZ_fm76hRg=&emci=688be8d5-0720-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=fbc612e6-2d20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66353914/416044347/-533696402?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230711_SV_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_Local&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmM2MTJlNi0yZDIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DihWho-O60aCaiPcWPhv8fIpABFCk1Il9mZ_fm76hRg=&emci=688be8d5-0720-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=fbc612e6-2d20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)**
Thanks,
Team Kildee

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! clean_body: | | Dan is fighting for mid-Michigan every day — working to support job creation, cut costs for working families and lower the cost of prescription drugs. While many in Congress are constantly distracted by petty politics and partisanship, Dan serves in Congress to lower the temperature in our political discourse and get results for Michiganders. Here’s just some of what he’s working on right now: | → July marks the first month Dan’s insulin price caps law fully went into effect, lowering the cost of insulin to a $35/month maximum for seniors under Medicare. → Dan just announced $31 million to support early childhood education in mid-Michigan. → He’s introduced bipartisan legislation to provide health care for veterans exposed to toxic PFAS chemicals. → The House advanced his community project initiatives that would set aside $4.5 million for flood prevention, clean drinking water, and health care. → Dan stood up for workers, introducing a bill to make health care more affordable for workers impacted by bad trade deals. → He’s introduced a bipartisan bill that will create more manufacturing jobs here in MI-08. → He’s announced several new federal grants for local colleges and universities, as well as to support mental health care services in Genesee County. → He announced a bill to expand labor rights for public safety officers. → He’s continuing to defend Social Security, Medicare, and other essential programs from those who want to undercut them. Now it’s critical that he hears from you directly about what is impacting you and your family. Thanks, Team Kildee Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States **

| Peter, Winning Back the Senate this November is crucial, and we need your help to make sure it happens by securing votes early. For years now, Democrats have been blowing us out of the water with Early Voting. We need to take a stand and beat them at their own game. **I am asking you to secure your vote Early this year.** Visit [**_SecureYourVoteVirginia.com_**](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecureyourvotevirginia.com%2F/1/0100018946c1d7e7-d98f3bdf-5b73-42cb-a424-2955b586813c-000000/skDtTBHzz83Biby56_zXmHtkKa8=330) , where you can easily register in under five minutes. Here you can find out how to:
* Join the Permanent Absentee List So Your Ballot is Automatically Mailed To You
* Make a Plan to Vote Early
* Apply to Vote Early by Mail
* Track the Status of Your Application and Your Ballot

Early voting starts on September 22nd and Election Day is November 7th. I encourage you to listen to the message below from Governor Youngkin, highlighting why [**_SecureYourVoteVirginia.com_**](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecureyourvotevirginia.com%2F/2/0100018946c1d7e7-d98f3bdf-5b73-42cb-a424-2955b586813c-000000/9y5OBeu6OF7-wylrh2ikbqNpBDk=330) is vital to our victory in November.

subject: It’s about service
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA

We have some serious challenges. We need serious people to solve them. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=7f5ddb087c594f7a950c88ace9064bef&_t=0rSoHLF5upECKPfC2RxqkcQXHhgbVlgZ3NuNgPRbijwNzgiVxdhBuo90Hx1aF-0U0xT3LLNItmYsCi3zNxmIrkJ-_JYFFztwqAZk1zQVWXI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=7f5ddb087c594f7a950c88ace9064bef&_t=0rSoHLF5upECKPfC2RxqkcQXHhgbVlgZ3NuNgPRbijwNzgiVxdhBuo90Hx1aF-0U0xT3LLNItmYsCi3zNxmIrkJ-_JYFFztwqAZk1zQVWXI%3D)
