Fellow Conservative,

I'm grateful for the opportunities that our nation has given me. With hard work, I was able to start my own business, employ other veterans just like me, and live the American dream with my family.

But I felt the pull to serve again - this time in the United States Senate. **That's why I am running. **

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7f5ddb087c594f7a950c88ace9064bef&_e=ap49E5iFosmNj9OtCGrXIV46xlXZAoQHwRn9vaUZnxvFiqVoRDTNh2vsUCd3jtxb1nBu9pybSHXdfh6J0AUs4nG4NILKEN5MsxdHnMJJ6nOMz9eXvE5_CvHuaJoG03_zPKRKY1C9c1pxILhCTEer7FfQjgDhy7OoXNn6ksmzHi-ukZzR8_iDugXhlbeuDzOtV6IFrGfforHLUsS5ddCOFWMvQBolNoNWMq9xeS-JbiPL40iOE9kafwsPaOts0n1tIXaiq_C61vfT2UAREG7XV4Aa6aHg-uR1PIzgqpFB1f68oKEyMExawYRii9e9yvjg9EhKLIKUsW5UAIo7AGulL4DMBMCzIqXL5W-6a3VEIwxcDJ0_iQDa1VvZqxF2E4DLJk56RxM2fBOYLjQVTCLbYQ%3D%3D)
[** WATCH NOW **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7f5ddb087c594f7a950c88ace9064bef&_e=ap49E5iFosmNj9OtCGrXIV46xlXZAoQHwRn9vaUZnxvFiqVoRDTNh2vsUCd3jtxb1nBu9pybSHXdfh6J0AUs4nG4NILKEN5MsxdHnMJJ6nOMz9eXvE5_CvHuaJoG03_zPKRKY1C9c1pxILhCTEer7FfQjgDhy7OoXNn6ksmzHi-ukZzR8_iDugXhlbeuDzOtV6IFrGfforHLUsS5ddCOFWMvQBolNoNWMq9xeS-JbiPL40iOE9kafwsPaOts0n1tN4BhmlFEQY2UGmmFUq6gMxhJ9pa2M8PmC13p5QsxIzsc5rtUn0OLqjCP8_zFm6dwLvG_Qi_YbJx1qC2TPTzIgwiDP8q6TbPAN1s4W7IWIeS6uWrbujtTYG2CyQ0zMCIL058k6DXSYpqMj-5SWBS7JQ%3D%3D)
As a leader on the field of battle, you need to think about the greatest impact you can make. During my military career, it was defending and protecting our great nation. **Now, I want to represent YOU in the United States Senate.**

[** JOIN THE MISSION **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7f5ddb087c594f7a950c88ace9064bef&_e=ap49E5iFosmNj9OtCGrXIV46xlXZAoQHwRn9vaUZnxvFiqVoRDTNh2vsUCd3jtxb1nBu9pybSHXdfh6J0AUs4nG4NILKEN5MsxdHnMJJ6nOMz9eXvE5_CvHuaJoG03_zPKRKY1C9c1pxILhCTEer7FfQjgDhy7OoXNn6ksmzHi-ukZzR8_iDugXhlbeuDzOtV6IFrGfforHLUsS5ddCOFWMvQBolNoNWMq9xeS-JbiPL40iOE9kafwsPaOts0n1tqEXLBqesDmsxleF7kT4JYF4zpCoR4xIa7chqadqfwLCnOLXsY-1et7V2g_s4FqSJsozXuw4iJzy5nsufovIBZ9z5-_DquvK54481mCsIu2hJPs_7LAwlR-Cp9D4QJlkGF52tKnfQeUpa4ufwg0MEGw%3D%3D)
American citizens are facing tough decisions right now. We're dealing with a crisis at our border, inflation has a stranglehold on our families, and we must fix our education system.

**We have some serious challenges facing our nation. We need serious people to solve them.**

When I was asked to serve - it was a serious decision to do so - **but when your country calls and needs you, you MUST answer. **

Fellow Conservative,**[now I ask you to join this fight with me.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7f5ddb087c594f7a950c88ace9064bef&_e=ap49E5iFosmNj9OtCGrXIV46xlXZAoQHwRn9vaUZnxvFiqVoRDTNh2vsUCd3jtxb1nBu9pybSHXdfh6J0AUs4nG4NILKEN5MsxdHnMJJ6nOMz9eXvE5_CvHuaJoG03_zPKRKY1C9c1pxILhCTEer7FfQjgDhy7OoXNn6ksmzHi-ukZzR8_iDugXhlbeuDzOtV6IFrGfforHLUsS5ddCOFWMvQBolNoNWMq9xeS-JbiPL40iOE9kafwsPaOts0n1tog0AEAJBquqn9G3zkxhYYtWePJkGOIN-nb8qz4E7vG9FbSJCZ7BgAEIJIqBOtypuRcktzegUiFeI5kBq6uFeKKcU2_zIYi0sd6IMYEbEANV7jUMgSkXNCHYopio5oI3na9U6PLZKgRKckNaOP6MULA%3D%3D) **

Hooyah,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**SEND IN THE SEAL
CHIP IN TODAY**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7f5ddb087c594f7a950c88ace9064bef&_e=ap49E5iFosmNj9OtCGrXIV46xlXZAoQHwRn9vaUZnxvFiqVoRDTNh2vsUCd3jtxb1nBu9pybSHXdfh6J0AUs4nG4NILKEN5MsxdHnMJJ6nOMz9eXvE5_CvHuaJoG03_zPKRKY1C9c1pxILhCTEer7FfQjgDhy7OoXNn6ksmzHi-ukZzR8_iDugXhlbeuDzOtV6IFrGfforHLUsS5ddCOFWMvQBolNoNWMq9xeS-JbiPL40iOE9kafwsPaOts0n1tUBTGT36MB_o7WLUGuD1q3IDdDKIOUv4Rttbj8bljhsbvapeCpIclp6XagP3S-jDqoXpuIsil-GmVF2aHmLIboX_x4mcCt4g39xlgsLTv9cnSwBcDdZtMY-jyNGaRb3vSybLjuzQY6MieMOFw1P7siQ%3D%3D)

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7f5ddb087c594f7a950c88ace9064bef&_e=ap49E5iFosmNj9OtCGrXIV46xlXZAoQHwRn9vaUZnxvFiqVoRDTNh2vsUCd3jtxb1nBu9pybSHXdfh6J0AUs4nG4NILKEN5MsxdHnMJJ6nOMz9eXvE5_CvHuaJoG03_zPKRKY1C9c1pxILhCTEer7FfQjgDhy7OoXNn6ksmzHi-ukZzR8_iDugXhlbeuDzOtV6IFrGfforHLUsS5ddCOFWMvQBolNoNWMq9xeS-JbiPL40iOE9kafwsPaOts0n1tUbR0Xf7fEaF2Rpg_T4X2nzyIfyf3r2UjDNncY5dSSj5TmymZ36sbGWlAzluCxQkQaN3BY7TzUXPwuAQfiYm6RGk3xna_rq1qgSOiMfTZLWj5Ix_i4M1Zv0UmFg63xAz8vaxARvqZE8SI-JLx--JWzg%3D%3D)

Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
clean_body: We have some serious challenges. We need serious people to solve them. | | Fellow Conservative, I'm grateful for the opportunities that our nation has given me. With hard work, I was able to start my own business, employ other veterans just like me, and live the American dream with my family. But I felt the pull to serve again - this time in the United States Senate. That's why I am running. As a leader on the field of battle, you need to think about the greatest impact you can make. During my military career, it was defending and protecting our great nation. Now, I want to represent YOU in the United States Senate. American citizens are facing tough decisions right now. We're dealing with a crisis at our border, inflation has a stranglehold on our families, and we must fix our education system. We have some serious challenges facing our nation. We need serious people to solve them. When I was asked to serve - it was a serious decision to do so - but when your country calls and needs you, you MUST answer. Fellow Conservative, Hooyah, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

clean_body: | | | | I need your help | Your opinion has been formally requested, Friend. Chris Christie is running for President of the United States because he thinks the American people deserve better than a Trump vs. Biden re-match. Simply put, he’s doing this for YOU. But in order for us to best serve the Country, we need your direct input. That is why we launched our latest initiative for you to share your thoughts directly with us. You will immediately be asked for YOUR unique input. | | Thank you, Brian Executive Director Tell It Like It Is PAC | Why Chris Christie: Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America. | [PAID FOR BY TELL IT LIKE IT IS PAC. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66354342/416045512/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2JiM2IzOTgtMmUyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dZqFHGN7VU1dIIdfqEqi3IKGEzoyxCH1v2qYh2KmcBM=&emci=5327b165-0420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7bb3b398-2e20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Since Day One in office, Derek has taken our concerns directly to the House. Every day, he's fighting to get our economy back on track, to protect and expand Social Security and Medicare, to reform and modernize Congress so that it works for the people, and to codify the right to reproductive freedom for _all_ Americans.

He's working directly for **you.** And surveys like this are _crucial_ to ensuring Derek understands how to keep fighting for your interests in Congress.

name: John Fetterman
subject: The Pennsylvania Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Let’s talk about Dan McCaffery.
#
Derek,
Right now, GOP extremists are hell-bent on rolling back our fundamental rights. That’s true at the federal level, but unfortunately, **we have to fight back right here in PA too.**
Buuuuuut, the reality is that we're experiencing a summer slump. Typically fundraising goes down during this time, and we can't leave anything on the table.
Judge Daniel McCaffery is the Democratic nominee for PA Supreme Court Justice, and he needs our help. We must elect Judge McCaffery in November to protect abortion rights and civil liberties from far-right extremists who want to rip them away.
**[Derek, I’m asking: Can you chip in any amount to Daniel McCaffery’s campaign today? In an off-year election like this every dollar counts.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49710?t=1&akid=8454%2E434096%2ECghH13)**
**[Donate »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49710?t=2&akid=8454%2E434096%2ECghH13)**
This team made huge waves when we flipped PA blue last year 🔵 so let’s keep up our momentum.
Derek, THANK YOUUU!!
John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230711-8454-footer&t=3&refcode2=8454_434096_CghH13&akid=8454%2E434096%2ECghH13)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=8454%2E434096%2ECghH13)

Friend,

You might recall that a few months ago, anti-choice extremists tried to use the judicial system to ban mifepristone (a widely-used abortion drug that’s been available for over _two decades_) across the country — including in states like Virginia where abortion is legal.

They have not let up their efforts. In fact, right now, they are leaning on their allies in Congress to insert bans on mifepristone into budget bills. **Republicans are hoping to game the standard legislative process and sneak through restrictions on the reproductive freedom that millions of Americans still have.**

Jennifer and pro-choice Democrats in Congress want to make it crystal clear: _any budget bill containing abortion restrictions will be met with strong opposition._ But they need your help to do that.

[**So please, will you add your name right now to stand firmly against Republican efforts to pass anti-choice budget bills? We need at least 7,500 signatures this week to make our voices heard.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66354419/416045854/1048250687?ms=EM_PET_230711CH_N_AYN_FULL_9_NG_A_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230711CH_N_AYN_FULL_9_NG_A_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWIzYjM5OC0yZTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sv1_l8fY8XOIW-lCtrcyJObuRviT2gcsO1hjtQxzyAs=&emci=00d9141c-2320-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7eb3b398-2e20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66354420/416045857/1048250687?ms=EM_PET_230711CH_N_AYN_FULL_9_NG_A_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230711CH_N_AYN_FULL_9_NG_A_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWIzYjM5OC0yZTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sv1_l8fY8XOIW-lCtrcyJObuRviT2gcsO1hjtQxzyAs=&emci=00d9141c-2320-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7eb3b398-2e20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) For years, Republicans cloaked their opposition to _Roe v. Wade_ as a "state's rights" issue. **They were lying.**

Since _Roe_ was overturned, they've proposed a 15-week national abortion ban in the U.S. Senate. They've encouraged states with abortion bans to restrict people from traveling to states where the right to choose remains legal.

And now, they're inserting anti-choice provisions into unrelated budget bills to try and hold hostage the government funding process.

Together, we’re going to expose their disgusting tactics to the American people – and make it clear that Democrats will hold firm against _any_ legislative effort to restrict reproductive rights.

[**Please join us and add your name today. Every signature sends a message that those in Congress trying to ban mifepristone will face the wrath of voters at the ballot box next year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66354421/416045858/1048250687?ms=EM_PET_230711CH_N_AYN_FULL_9_NG_A_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230711CH_N_AYN_FULL_9_NG_A_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWIzYjM5OC0yZTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sv1_l8fY8XOIW-lCtrcyJObuRviT2gcsO1hjtQxzyAs=&emci=00d9141c-2320-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7eb3b398-2e20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)

Thanks so much,

Team Wexton | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66354422/416045859/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230711CH_N_AYN_FULL_9_NG_A_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWIzYjM5OC0yZTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sv1_l8fY8XOIW-lCtrcyJObuRviT2gcsO1hjtQxzyAs=)****

| There are three things you need to know ASAP about our fight to save our Senate majority:

1️⃣ **We’re defending 23 Senate seats** – and if we lose a single one, our Senate majority will collapse!

2️⃣ **Senator Bob Casey is one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for re-election.** _If he starts slipping in the polls, it’s GAME OVER!_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49349?t=6&akid=9103%2E878179%2ETuU_5L) 3️⃣ **We’re launching our SWING STATE SENATE FUND** to defend Democrats like Bob Casey and keep the Senate out of MAGA Mitch McConnell’s hands!

[States like Pennsylvania are critical to saving our Senate majority – and if we fall behind now, the MAGA machine will run right over us. | | This seems off to me, my friend. The Republican National Committee wants me to sign a pledge saying that I will support WHOEVER the Republican nominee is in order to have a shot at the debate stage. _**I'm not going to do that. I refuse to lie to the American people in order to get a microphone. **_ Let me just go on record again and say, I will not support Donald Trump as our nominee. But I intend to fulfill all other requirements. _**This is not about me supporting the Republican nominee... this is about me refusing to support a process that tries to rig the election for Donald Trump.** _ **I've made one oath:**_To the Constitution_**I do one pledge:** _To the flag_**I've made one vow:**_To my amazing wife_ I refuse to allow the RNC to strong-arm support for a candidate I believe to be toxic and wrong for the United States of America. That's why I need your help. I need to make sure that I hit 40,000 donors to help show the RNC that Americans want other options. [_**And I'm asking you to be one of them with your first $1 donation today.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=3da749ae624d4e828d3095904cbdf65d&_e=AZZynbQqjYTL1OGa7mQW60Rhul91HBoju_fV6Dk42ykt-O0-QVrUSin3kWLplyZsdxdR-6VIcuAIYR8Ob4uMNwpqNow38ouT69qmcdgQCRDRzoM50ge41j6eirZ-LWswbdV5xX2RjxHCgNcBlqTxM4XCC4zYk6k3TdfjK1B0I4M2fdC0fKA2tsM9oeRn1uqdkyhaAWOmup6VqS_SIZqeNB1PzkUPJubMhLiyFhQFS2dRSoIIL50MNOD2mpj01F_ogMbMGWtz9RKtn_WdrLaVhpMKlnJO0-LboS8qyOhQGFiFr8Y1yCyp2a5bcW_vIHosCTyto9n7eqZJnyAmg4q7jsMeO0Kqnx2YW62Tm0sliNRrvEiXJGK-Vr1mAob7evcX)

name: Zak Malamed
subject: It’s time for the next generation of leadership in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
I want to tell you a little bit about what it is like to run for Congress as a millennial.
#
I want to tell you a little bit about what it is like to run for Congress as a millennial.
[**But if you do not have the time to read this and would rather make a quick donation to help me defeat George Santos and usher in the next generation of leadership in Congress, you can do that by clicking here.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230711?refcode=em20230711&amount=5&refcode2=159_8507_vBlLSs&akid=159%2E8507%2EvBlLSs)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230711?refcode=em20230711&amount=5&refcode2=159_8507_vBlLSs&akid=159%2E8507%2EvBlLSs)**
I grew up in NY-03 in the wake of 9/11, and at the time it was very easy to have your politics governed by fear. But I had the chance to intern for my assemblywoman, Michelle Schimel, who was ahead of her time when it came to fighting for issues like gun safety. It was then that I learned what it was like to fight for something.
**Little did I know that gun safety would become a very personal issue for me.** I was terrified when one of my sisters went through a lockdown when a gunman entered her campus. And later, in 2020, I was devastated when I lost a good friend to gun violence.
This issue is not abstract to me. I am 29 years old, and the issues and fears young people face across the country today are the issues I have been facing as well.
I have watched politicians do nothing while my peers **lose their lives** to gun violence in and outside of school. And in recent years I have come to see personally just how **punishing** the increasing cost of living is for the next generation just starting their careers.
**I am running to defeat George Santos not just because we need to put an end to the MAGA Madness, but also because the next generation can bring fresh perspectives and more effective leadership for everyone in Congress.**
But I cannot do this alone. As someone who spends a third of my paycheck (and sometimes more) on housing, I am definitely the only person in this race who cannot use personal wealth to fund their campaign.
**That makes grassroots contributions all the more important. When hundreds of supporters chip in $5 or $15, it has just as great an impact as one max-out donation.**
[**So can I count on you to pitch in $5 today to help me defeat George Santos and bring a new generation of leadership to Congress?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230711?refcode=em20230711&amount=5&refcode2=159_8507_vBlLSs&akid=159%2E8507%2EvBlLSs)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230711?amount=5&refcode=em20230711&refcode2=159_8507_vBlLSs&akid=159%2E8507%2EvBlLSs)**
Thank you,
Zak Malamed
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=159%2E8507%2EvBlLSs)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=159%2E8507%2EvBlLSs)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Need a summer cocktail idea?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria has a few tips. 🍹
#
AOC was a bartender before she ran for Congress, and recently she shared some tips for making easy summer cocktails at home:
The GOP loves to troll Alexandria for being ‘just’ a bartender.
But it turns out that working-class experience is exactly what lets her be a different kind of politician: **one that’s actually connected to the communities she’s fighting for.** No glitzy fundraisers, no lunches with lobbyists, no trading favors with billionaires or corporations — just a fight for real change in the lives of everyday people.
[Will you make a contribution today to support Alexandria’s new kind of governance? Every donation you make fuels our campaign for progress.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230711.GgJtvK&refcode=em20230711-4617-P_FND_EGR_TWT&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4617%2E2526796%2EEMCkE2)

Thank you for standing with our movement.
Happy summer,
Team AOC

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: re: McConnell’s handpicked candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
I needed to reach out directly, Peter: GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada.

| I needed to reach out directly, Peter: **GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada.**

Mitch McConnell handpicked him because he knows Brown will be his _rubber stamp_ in the Senate, voting for anything **including a national abortion ban.** I’m fighting as hard as I can to defend my seat from a GOP takeover, but I can’t do it alone. Republicans have already started spending big in frontline races like Susan Wild and Angie Craig’s — and it’s no accident. They know as well as we do that those elections are going to be **close. ** We’re used to close elections. Jahana Hayes won her most recent election by just 1,961 votes — **a margin of less than 1 percentage point. ** When races are that close, we win in the margins. Every single thing we do (or don’t do) can sway the results one way or the other. That’s why we fight our _asses_ off for all of our frontline candidates, year-round. There is no off-season for us. It’s so critical to build up our resources **now** to defend these at-risk seats next year. Early money wins elections, and to be honest, we’re going to need a lot of it to win back the House from Kevin McCarthy. [_**Every dollar you give today will go straight toward supporting our candidates in close elections. Can you help us out with a donation of any amount today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66354840/416047573/-605873117?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230711_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQzM2EyMjYtMzEyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tzITw9ErFjYH6W6_CYAw1emuAwUixYDVSSNj4NBDVFc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66354841/416047574/-605873117?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230711_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQzM2EyMjYtMzEyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tzITw9ErFjYH6W6_CYAw1emuAwUixYDVSSNj4NBDVFc=)

Fellow Conservative,

I'm grateful for the opportunities that our nation has given me. With hard work, I was able to start my own business, employ other veterans just like me, and live the American dream with my family.

But I felt the pull to serve again - this time in the United States Senate. **That's why I am running. **

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4aba5188f7734d31b0f506d82a7d4849&_e=bhGb2zeOJJGEIhhGqmJ2ws2xROnaEeqNeV9ew0-TQ8_UgnaAKBswH1wtGjimQz0xVJGZ6vKftHE65TaQpdLWPLZXIfiQb0L4gKtAWq4EB19LF5gakVAYEcjbuIqsGvMgL2D5_gyO44uvX8WAYYf3VABS98-Vi1KB8FM9VTwqhw983Y1f5fdzB72wjWrg51oqDq_sIV3z8dusaEqV95PL3HU6qHOhdq_C-doMVUk7rs870yb-tDdIYVg_LOJuBXpzcySdSfS3-A4QkzehJwqM_ewQ0M_ckDxRlRZwczIwe6bQoqxsKLykV7dlSI7MNEHFDQULiWD58u5tzry-BzZz9vDouZRaeFJ4gWvJSlRq1vXfnDpBRZr58nlOVZsvz12pSl47RZwQQpf4oE4nWG_66g%3D%3D)
[** WATCH NOW **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4aba5188f7734d31b0f506d82a7d4849&_e=bhGb2zeOJJGEIhhGqmJ2ws2xROnaEeqNeV9ew0-TQ8_UgnaAKBswH1wtGjimQz0xVJGZ6vKftHE65TaQpdLWPLZXIfiQb0L4gKtAWq4EB19LF5gakVAYEcjbuIqsGvMgL2D5_gyO44uvX8WAYYf3VABS98-Vi1KB8FM9VTwqhw983Y1f5fdzB72wjWrg51oqDq_sIV3z8dusaEqV95PL3HU6qHOhdq_C-doMVUk7rs870yb-tDdIYVg_LOJuBXpzFZAs-VhERTV1_dXieIF6CmYsGX0snTGOSxCUKLUA89FlX0Zq9PxunMlFdC6-2LXQG-YWZsNBk-CriuJKzQccrRtAR4yHF-XSyKzap721RTIOG9MwI9uWZYyQaG4diDB-R6o20aDPS4B7u4mGmQ-bAQ%3D%3D)
As a leader on the field of battle, you need to think about the greatest impact you can make. During my military career, it was defending and protecting our great nation. **Now, I want to represent YOU in the United States Senate.**

[** JOIN THE MISSION **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4aba5188f7734d31b0f506d82a7d4849&_e=bhGb2zeOJJGEIhhGqmJ2ws2xROnaEeqNeV9ew0-TQ8_UgnaAKBswH1wtGjimQz0xVJGZ6vKftHE65TaQpdLWPLZXIfiQb0L4gKtAWq4EB19LF5gakVAYEcjbuIqsGvMgL2D5_gyO44uvX8WAYYf3VABS98-Vi1KB8FM9VTwqhw983Y1f5fdzB72wjWrg51oqDq_sIV3z8dusaEqV95PL3HU6qHOhdq_C-doMVUk7rs870yb-tDdIYVg_LOJuBXpzLjC-BXWQB4Ou7BSTVdjva3zoxarDvcny2cMNKu2VYvEaf33hX9CBdkGP-oldtUncf4n9sq0BchyHwLkMwX1mYJHFscf_7tXm7P6tQJa7Zzi7QToNxAPj_14faTtRX0nHmU28v0Blw_9Npp3lhZMheA%3D%3D)
American citizens are facing tough decisions right now. We're dealing with a crisis at our border, inflation has a stranglehold on our families, and we must fix our education system.

**We have some serious challenges facing our nation. We need serious people to solve them.**

When I was asked to serve - it was a serious decision to do so - **but when your country calls and needs you, you MUST answer. **

Fellow Conservative,**[now I ask you to join this fight with me.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4aba5188f7734d31b0f506d82a7d4849&_e=bhGb2zeOJJGEIhhGqmJ2ws2xROnaEeqNeV9ew0-TQ8_UgnaAKBswH1wtGjimQz0xVJGZ6vKftHE65TaQpdLWPLZXIfiQb0L4gKtAWq4EB19LF5gakVAYEcjbuIqsGvMgL2D5_gyO44uvX8WAYYf3VABS98-Vi1KB8FM9VTwqhw983Y1f5fdzB72wjWrg51oqDq_sIV3z8dusaEqV95PL3HU6qHOhdq_C-doMVUk7rs870yb-tDdIYVg_LOJuBXpziRQTZe24b3P6jgOWqqc2NQNGZ7ouFSjzKtbX7A05o06cJ98NcGfNtCtNjBuGn43cEJc0l5KQ-mdM9nLIDV8Yv3Ns1D2Ebdg4FAMLAutE8F2O8Uif2R2oyQnoF_QRhnPVahgLupvZ2muZlpkeaqWmaQ%3D%3D) **

Hooyah,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**SEND IN THE SEAL
CHIP IN TODAY**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4aba5188f7734d31b0f506d82a7d4849&_e=bhGb2zeOJJGEIhhGqmJ2ws2xROnaEeqNeV9ew0-TQ8_UgnaAKBswH1wtGjimQz0xVJGZ6vKftHE65TaQpdLWPLZXIfiQb0L4gKtAWq4EB19LF5gakVAYEcjbuIqsGvMgL2D5_gyO44uvX8WAYYf3VABS98-Vi1KB8FM9VTwqhw983Y1f5fdzB72wjWrg51oqDq_sIV3z8dusaEqV95PL3HU6qHOhdq_C-doMVUk7rs870yb-tDdIYVg_LOJuBXpzJGDGPHTIiZsLXadXAUjyCw0Hok7sKSKrTuc56t-meILBehOkgruaJc1TodSSKAvBwV9u73b9U_HGWHCgVbghEmvMUxjZFPBusPVMGW4I3znXMPXgcMmUET-8ZQjqLfen4Su4UaEP-ciJ-JjlllNxXQ%3D%3D)

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

clean_body: We have some serious challenges. We need serious people to solve them. | | Fellow Conservative, I'm grateful for the opportunities that our nation has given me. With hard work, I was able to start my own business, employ other veterans just like me, and live the American dream with my family. But I felt the pull to serve again - this time in the United States Senate. That's why I am running. As a leader on the field of battle, you need to think about the greatest impact you can make. During my military career, it was defending and protecting our great nation. Now, I want to represent YOU in the United States Senate. American citizens are facing tough decisions right now. We're dealing with a crisis at our border, inflation has a stranglehold on our families, and we must fix our education system. We have some serious challenges facing our nation. We need serious people to solve them. When I was asked to serve - it was a serious decision to do so - but when your country calls and needs you, you MUST answer. Fellow Conservative, Hooyah, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: =?utf-8?Q?CPT=20Sam=20Brown?=
subject: I shouldn’t be alive.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
But since I am, I’m fighting for my country.

https://secure.winred.com/sam-brown/life-shouldntbe-em-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230710_e000030-sb_life-shouldntbe_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=

Friend,

My name is Sam Brown — I am a retired U.S. Army Captain, a businessman, a husband, a father, a Purple Heart recipient, and Nevada’s next Senator.

While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb exploded beneath me, leaving me with over 30% of my body permanently scarred. I remember coming to terms with the fact that this was it — I would burn to death.

But, by the grace of God, I survived.

I’m not special. I’m neither a victim nor a hero in my own life story. I believe that I was simply doing my Duty to serve my country. Real heroes may wear a uniform, but it isn’t required. Heroes are the people – like my soldiers, my mother, and my wife – who come to the aid of those in need, despite overwhelming personal suffering and sacrifice.

The fact that I survived means that the life I live is not my own.

My life belongs to my God and my country and I’m more than prepared to give my life to defend her.

Which is why I’m running to be Nevada’s next Senator. (https://secure.winred.com/sam-brown/life-shouldntbe-em-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230710_e000030-sb_life-shouldntbe_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=)

I know that what Nevadans need is someone who is willing to stand up and lead them. They need someone to show them that the American Dream is attainable.

I promise to always be there for Nevada. I will not be a leader that's boxed in - I am ready to deploy to D.C. and serve our country and our state once more.

This won’t be easy. Far-left Democrats are ready to unleash every attack they’ve got to make sure they can hold this seat.

BUT I’M NOT SCARED, friend. (https://secure.winred.com/sam-brown/life-shouldntbe-em-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230710_e000030-sb_life-shouldntbe_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=)

If I can handle a roadside bomb blast and three long years of recovery, I can take on anything the Washington Swamp has to throw at me — but I can’t do this alone.

I hate asking for money, but the reality is that this will be one of the most intense and expensive Senate races of the year. Can you chip in ANY AMOUNT (https://secure.winred.com/sam-brown/life-shouldntbe-em-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230710_e000030-sb_life-shouldntbe_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=) to help me deploy to Washington?

Duty First,
https://secure.winred.com/sam-brown/life-shouldntbe-em-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230710_e000030-sb_life-shouldntbe_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=

CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.)

Republican U.S. Senate Candidate

Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement of the United States Army or the Department of Defense.

The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is working with Lead Locally – an organization committed to electing leaders at the local and state level who pledge to fight back against the fossil fuel industry.

[_**If you know someone who would be a great fit to fight for climate action, nominate them today to sign up for Lead Locally’s virtual Run for Climate leadership training!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66355214/416048834/-1353106203?referrer=jfcp-woa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEyZGI4MTVlLTMyMjAtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=298Ogqjp2p_GOvZl32T5KI5FzV5fmtd4gJaBb7JwjA8=&emci=78d1e7cf-2420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=12db815e-3220-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)

* * *

Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I’m reaching out with an important question: _**Do you know a climate champion who should run for local office?**_

The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is working with Lead Locally – an organization committed to electing leaders at the local and state level who pledge to fight back against the fossil fuel industry.

If you know someone who should consider running for office, nominate them to join Lead Locally’s new virtual training program this summer.

[_**Nominate a friend or someone you know today to sign up for Lead Locally’s virtual Run for Climate leadership training!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66355216/416048836/-1353106203?referrer=jfcp-woa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEyZGI4MTVlLTMyMjAtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=298Ogqjp2p_GOvZl32T5KI5FzV5fmtd4gJaBb7JwjA8=&emci=78d1e7cf-2420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=12db815e-3220-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)
| [NOMINATE TODAY! ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66355217/416048837/-1353106203?referrer=jfcp-woa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEyZGI4MTVlLTMyMjAtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=298Ogqjp2p_GOvZl32T5KI5FzV5fmtd4gJaBb7JwjA8=&emci=78d1e7cf-2420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=12db815e-3220-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)

Every year, there are crucial elections across the country that will determine the future of the fight against the climate crisis. And local elections play a crucial role in setting the stage for the fight against the fossil fuel industry as we race against time to protect our planet.

Leaders at the local level including our mayors, city councilors, county supervisors, commissioners, district attorneys, controllers, and every other elected or appointed office has the best opportunity to stop new fossil fuel projects in your neighborhood. That’s why we need as many climate champions at every level to pass effective climate legislation. [_**Nominate someone you know to secure their spot for Lead Locally’s virtual training!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66355218/416048838/-1353106203?referrer=jfcp-woa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEyZGI4MTVlLTMyMjAtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=298Ogqjp2p_GOvZl32T5KI5FzV5fmtd4gJaBb7JwjA8=&emci=78d1e7cf-2420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=12db815e-3220-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)

clean_body: Sign up for Lead Locally’s virtual Run for Climate leadership training! | | We wanted to make sure you didn’t miss Jane's important message from last week. The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is working with Lead Locally – an organization committed to electing leaders at the local and state level who pledge to fight back against the fossil fuel industry. | Read more from Jane here: Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I’m reaching out with an important question: Do you know a climate champion who should run for local office? The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is working with Lead Locally – an organization committed to electing leaders at the local and state level who pledge to fight back against the fossil fuel industry. If you know someone who should consider running for office, nominate them to join Lead Locally’s new virtual training program this summer. | Every year, there are crucial elections across the country that will determine the future of the fight against the climate crisis. And local elections play a crucial role in setting the stage for the fight against the fossil fuel industry as we race against time to protect our planet. Leaders at the local level including our mayors, city councilors, county supervisors, commissioners, district attorneys, controllers, and every other elected or appointed office has the best opportunity to stop new fossil fuel projects in your neighborhood. That’s why we need as many climate champions at every level to pass effective climate legislation. | Let’s fight like hell together to protect our planet, Jane Fonda | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f11dafd2abb943f58095448440a0059c&_e=Vv4YcPpuYyYYtMQtw-kPoqPkSpN0BcQsycoapGba8drdvV2iHUjFyU-cv1p-Kf_OgydsRrQawA5x0NCd0oYQYDlf85gKeyPSn8gIcige0jcjH5PQUdcNyIIUURHGmhkozcra48a5hIuIep_zpUpFS27sqMO7jZXKpmhfGUesSDtADaVdRqm4e8XhWnWKuruPalK8O49sL6WkzoPHRwL3qWs0iD4yZPyXFvgQQCNCy7YkvWgySGpWRz5F3ORfV6xst963W2EuP4aABtiZDfRehMoRULMi6XJdnLs268JnSNWF79cLUpZY5RUYrsIxKcOhYMr5t3Aa-ftW4fEBoviGRuTwSyFhg6ZJN9z3dNzt9qiXTna_Dg0M-fjQdFpbb27uXPb1_4Hl3NsN0Hr4BO5ASQM63YAaNduvVho7Nsek2tDTHIBdLjR4vlWH8XHYh3qz "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f11dafd2abb943f58095448440a0059c&_e=Vv4YcPpuYyYYtMQtw-kPoqPkSpN0BcQsycoapGba8drdvV2iHUjFyU-cv1p-Kf_OgydsRrQawA5x0NCd0oYQYDlf85gKeyPSn8gIcige0jcjH5PQUdcNyIIUURHGmhkozcra48a5hIuIep_zpUpFS27sqMO7jZXKpmhfGUesSDtADaVdRqm4e8XhWnWKuruPalK8O49sL6WkzoPHRwL3qWs0iD4yZPyXFvgQQCNCy7YkvWgySGpWRz5F3ORfV6xst963W2EuP4aABtiZDfRehMoRULMi6XJdnLs268JnSNUpKXDNUH5HJ93a5bcEiJ9h8Uxpd0NhSFtw7dLoDP879zboEdeQytPfIQxtN21bduVP_eFrdZEAqjn9FlsmoBZK0BctHJn8038Xh2QppiEqoYlnu1r19KY2DutaNtgPPbzFPVP82BGvuSi_-py_P54J "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f11dafd2abb943f58095448440a0059c&_e=Vv4YcPpuYyYYtMQtw-kPoqPkSpN0BcQsycoapGba8drdvV2iHUjFyU-cv1p-Kf_OgydsRrQawA5x0NCd0oYQYDlf85gKeyPSn8gIcige0jcjH5PQUdcNyIIUURHGmhkozcra48a5hIuIep_zpUpFS27sqMO7jZXKpmhfGUesSDtADaVdRqm4e8XhWnWKuruPalK8O49sL6WkzoPHRwL3qWs0iD4yZPyXFvgQQCNCy7YkvWgySGpWRz5F3ORfV6xst963W2EuP4aABtiZDfRehMoRULMi6XJdnLs268JnSNXUTtlc6S_UNPgb8zUkYkgj0X4cexyIFHnW0Z-hWfw3A4yxUEIfOcsQ4Z0Ru2u7VXZH2Jge0uNY9TOQ5jC3lUY_TvyieqqGMFvoogSsJ3TocyS-CETTNR9jYMQzbtHM7sLr1x84i6YQEjIC_FaSUa5i "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f11dafd2abb943f58095448440a0059c&_e=Vv4YcPpuYyYYtMQtw-kPoqPkSpN0BcQsycoapGba8drdvV2iHUjFyU-cv1p-Kf_OgydsRrQawA5x0NCd0oYQYDlf85gKeyPSn8gIcige0jcjH5PQUdcNyIIUURHGmhkozcra48a5hIuIep_zpUpFS27sqMO7jZXKpmhfGUesSDtADaVdRqm4e8XhWnWKuruPalK8O49sL6WkzoPHRwL3qWs0iD4yZPyXFvgQQCNCy7YkvWgySGpWRz5F3ORfV6xst963W2EuP4aABtiZDfRehMoRULMi6XJdnLs268JnSNUoKELrQvUg00vXyu4ztE9wbrecX2TsqGxlg5W2D77gmOTztsY21aP2X2nvQ04RJPzR2W7BUU-PlXZyOFfho-669oigRiaIV8_MZBcaDTMWJhkP-5TrcINVpAJHEQ_T9jSMjDB3RC15TYvYNXDUqjVg "Renew your membership before it’s too late >>>")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f11dafd2abb943f58095448440a0059c&_e=Vv4YcPpuYyYYtMQtw-kPoqPkSpN0BcQsycoapGba8drdvV2iHUjFyU-cv1p-Kf_OgydsRrQawA5x0NCd0oYQYDlf85gKeyPSn8gIcige0jcjH5PQUdcNyIIUURHGmhkozcra48a5hIuIep_zpUpFS27sqMO7jZXKpmhfGUesSDtADaVdRqm4e8XhWnWKuruPalK8O49sL6WkzoPHRwL3qWs0iD4yZPyXFvgQQCNCy7YkvWgySGpWRz5F3ORfV6xst963W2EuP4aABtiZDfRehMoRULMi6XJdnLs268JnSNXcscFQOjiWum5oF1we1my-GlKwiTFuXn5_dHk7021e00y1KVAOLGR4ZYNzuO48JY84JijAieNUmIxZWOKwd6KvQMPm86syiwmx2G62QJRjELy8l5mm2N9U_4GK7wJ8pp1XUAjjfHJnZTwIrD0yoiXM "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f11dafd2abb943f58095448440a0059c&_e=Vv4YcPpuYyYYtMQtw-kPoqPkSpN0BcQsycoapGba8drdvV2iHUjFyU-cv1p-Kf_OgydsRrQawA5x0NCd0oYQYDlf85gKeyPSn8gIcige0jcjH5PQUdcNyIIUURHGmhkozcra48a5hIuIep_zpUpFS27sqMO7jZXKpmhfGUesSDtADaVdRqm4e8XhWnWKuruPalK8O49sL6WkzoPHRwL3qWs0iD4yZPyXFvgQQCNCy7YkvWgySGpWRz5F3ORfV6xst963W2EuP4aABtiZDfRehMoRULMi6XJdnLs268JnSNUaprw_BfuAUK_KKdoBegssDhGbDPg82pft5kUQlneb8IL_X9jGk4PkyqtSyP7Amvf4g1Ki1uWQpUn-fDwfIc1fvQrh-0naW8qQBYhcHmYKPPTN0DLXBVYXzY4jTHSfXuGNYy0fQ3xo9m3xWpeg5eKs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f11dafd2abb943f58095448440a0059c&_e=Vv4YcPpuYyYYtMQtw-kPoqPkSpN0BcQsycoapGba8drdvV2iHUjFyU-cv1p-Kf_OgydsRrQawA5x0NCd0oYQYDlf85gKeyPSn8gIcige0jcjH5PQUdcNyIIUURHGmhkozcra48a5hIuIep_zpUpFS27sqMO7jZXKpmhfGUesSDtADaVdRqm4e8XhWnWKuruPalK8O49sL6WkzoPHRwL3qWs0iD4yZPyXFvgQQCNCy7YkvWgySGpWRz5F3ORfV6xst963W2EuP4aABtiZDfRehMoRULMi6XJdnLs268JnSNUNfVCAHTYez0sDF5cnLpeG-JLLCCJ1Qm_rPNYs8ptJc5UN8hF09HYIJf8cEt9NLRrfsZviBDNaw_3G9mxK1qaFD_-z-U4BwrGLM3kDpJkxyAP_PVindy5ehuP3OJttKThOsm-Q8Hq4ROwb9c3YPG3c "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")

| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f11dafd2abb943f58095448440a0059c&_e=Vv4YcPpuYyYYtMQtw-kPoqPkSpN0BcQsycoapGba8drdvV2iHUjFyU-cv1p-Kf_OgydsRrQawA5x0NCd0oYQYDlf85gKeyPSn8gIcige0jcjH5PQUdcNyIIUURHGmhkozcra48a5hIuIep_zpUpFS27sqMO7jZXKpmhfGUesSDtADaVdRqm4e8XhWnWKuruPalK8O49sL6WkzoPHRwL3qWs0iD4yZPyXFvgQQCNCy7YkvWgySGpWRz5F3ORfV6xst963W2EuP4aABtiZDfRehMoRULMi6XJdnLs268JnSNWKqvHr1AHsI2i9lIlqn2G2yAc_Hxd4qYzQQIJDEldAPUw3vXhU6cxkJkz2BQxa3vtqF3zCS6w45jsrgLceEWK9z3DUTZFPcStrpnnwOsXqLsWrBLKntNMpfeBRRO_FrK1M5HjrSUJ5cV8GqNLmD7QS "ORDER NOW")

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f11dafd2abb943f58095448440a0059c&_e=Vv4YcPpuYyYYtMQtw-kPoqPkSpN0BcQsycoapGba8drdvV2iHUjFyU-cv1p-Kf_OgydsRrQawA5x0NCd0oYQYDlf85gKeyPSn8gIcige0jcjH5PQUdcNyIIUURHGmhkozcra48a5hIuIep_zpUpFS27sqMO7jZXKpmhfGUesSDtADaVdRqm4e8XhWnWKuruPalK8O49sL6WkzoPHRwL3qWs0iD4yZPyXFvgQQCNCy7YkvWgySGpWRz5F3ORfV6xst963W2EuP4aABtiZDfRehMoRULMi6XJdnLs268JnSNVBKlZ4oWi9PssmWHz70XIaAx27dBc5PYGqNF6Blj0FKIOh0iiLwvcLULBYnDAI9p8EVt9rt1izOwjtGWZzsT69SJmISuOjRShmXoeleKDswjYS-BZVW40fGw7aghOzoQPnGuu-A_JIWLCiu-VHJ4td "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f11dafd2abb943f58095448440a0059c&_e=Vv4YcPpuYyYYtMQtw-kPoqPkSpN0BcQsycoapGba8drdvV2iHUjFyU-cv1p-Kf_OgydsRrQawA5x0NCd0oYQYDlf85gKeyPSn8gIcige0jcjH5PQUdcNyIIUURHGmhkozcra48a5hIuIep_zpUpFS27sqMO7jZXKpmhfGUesSDtADaVdRqm4e8XhWnWKuruPalK8O49sL6WkzoPHRwL3qWs0iD4yZPyXFvgQQCNCy7YkvWgySGpWRz5F3ORfV6xst963W2EuP4aABtiZDfRehMoRULMi6XJdnLs268JnSNXicYnAJ4jWbonCTN8Ubqf8d7OKnJDa4LKQpEnI5nSgMyIVjcMgCYvLBHfunuSnYKi6flwuLa-jJaRXqMpc58gyO3AJf1TgEoFcbxMyNuT1TklgNhl7M-Z2RbB14O0WSkaJaA2eVceltCvJWX8B96ZK "Renew before it’s too late >>>")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

clean_body: Your 3 year membership streak is at risk. | | | | | Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email? | | | "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP" The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen, but the worst has yet to come. The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team, "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership." | | | "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP" You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year. We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. "Renew your membership before it’s too late >>>" \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services Subject: We hate to see you go. Friend, for the last 3 years , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,but we have bad news for you. It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak. There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to "11:59 PM TONIGHT." "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?" | | | "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP" | "ORDER NOW" We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side. You only have until "11:59 PM" to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. "Renew before it’s too late >>>" Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down. **Race-Based****Prison**** Sentences** A Democrat-backed bill **[would require judges in the state to consider a convicted criminal's race ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acilg-trhiujldw-u/)**when determining how long to sentence them to prison. **Raising Concerns** Seven Republican AGs are **[accusing Target of violating child protection laws](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acilg-trhiujldw-o/)** with their Pride collection of clothing. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-acilg-trhiujldw-x/)!**

body:

| |
---
| |
For Immediate Release
July 11, 2023
Contact: Tim Rosales | 916.475.4900
**Navy Veteran & Valley Businessman Michael Maher Has Impressive Fundraising Quarter**
Fresno, CA - Republican Congressional candidate, Navy Veteran, and Central Valley businessman Michael Maher raised an impressive $232,000 in the 2nd Quarter of 2023. Maher is running for Congress in California’s 21st Congressional District, currently held by Democrat Jim Costa.

“The local support I am receiving from Republicans, Democrats, and Independents has been inspiring and motivating. People want representation that will deliver for the changing needs of the 21st century and move us forward to where we should be.”

Former Congresswoman Connie Conway, State Senator Shannon Grove, and the Fresno and Tulare County Republican Parties have endorsed Michael Maher.

The most current 2nd quarter fundraising report will be available online.
---
|
---
| _**Background** : Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and US Navy Veteran who was raised in the Central Valley. Michael and his wife, Ann, are raising their young family in Fresno County, and he owns and operates an aviation business. Michael was the 2022 nominee for California's 21st Congressional District._

| | Friend My GOP opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman, and all Michigan Republican Representatives have just endorsed Donald Trump for president, aligning themselves with the extreme ideologies that have held our Nation back. The Nation is watching Michigan. Let us show them that we are up to the challenge and will fight harder, longer, and wiser to defeat Trump and Bergman. We cannot let this go unanswered, and [I need your support now more than ever.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/3eOb6zEG6/c?w=F7oxP77h9vtx2GXk7I0t-I_9n6V393ZffwyEX4V1oF4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2Fib3V0LWJvYiIsInIiOiI5ZjE2ZmZkYi1iYTlhLTQ4ODktYWMxOC1jN2RmN2IyM2YyMWMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ) Trump lost the state in 2020 to Joe Biden by more than 154,000 votes, and is still harming our democracy by claiming fraud. In November, Trump’s slate of endorsed 2022 GOP candidates for statewide office — governor, attorney general, and secretary of state, all election deniers — were defeated. Democrats won majorities in the state House and Senate for the first time in nearly 40 years. If we can flip the state, let’s now show who we are and reclaim more Congressional seats. The twice-impeached Trump is under indictment on more than 70 felony counts in separate state and federal investigations. As your candidate for Congress, I am committed to reversing Bergman and Trump’s damage, and implementing policies that foster economic growth, create sustainable jobs, and uplift every American. We deserve leaders who prioritize the health and well-being of our citizens and who rely on science and expertise to guide their decisions. I pledge always to put people first and work tirelessly to ensure our country moves forward, not backward. Our campaign is rooted in unity, progress, and inclusivity, and we reject the politics of division and culture wars that have plagued our Nation for far too long. We can build bridges, find common ground, and ensure every voice is heard and valued. This strategy is the path to a more robust, more vibrant democracy. With your unwavering support, we can show the Nation how to work together. Our campaign is fueled by the energy and dedication of people like you who believe in a brighter future for our rural communities and our country. Together, we can bring about the positive change we so desperately need. [Your generous contribution](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/3eOb6zEG6/c?w=F7oxP77h9vtx2GXk7I0t-I_9n6V393ZffwyEX4V1oF4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2Fib3V0LWJvYiIsInIiOiI5ZjE2ZmZkYi1iYTlhLTQ4ODktYWMxOC1jN2RmN2IyM2YyMWMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ) will allow us to amplify our message, reach more voters, and build a strong grassroots movement that cannot be ignored. Every dollar counts and makes a real difference in our pursuit of progress. Adding your name to our list of contributors will help us send a strong message condemning extremism and display that thousands of us are committed to creating a prosperous future for all. Thank you for being a vital part of our campaign. With your continued support, we will rise above division and work towards a brighter, more inclusive future for Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. Warm regards, -Dr. Bob Dr. Bob LorinserDemocratic Candidate for U.S. CongressNorthern Michigan and the UP, MI01

body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/5239a5d73485/everything-you-need-to-know-from-durhams-testimony-11195463?e=f6564bbe3b)
Logo

** Samuel Alito becomes the most conservative Justice...
------------------------------------------------------------

Check out my latest YouTube video:
https://youtu.be/LTKsk8pgkBs?mc_cid=b3372102c7&mc_eid=UNIQID

Don’t forget to subscribe to make sure you see all of my upcoming content.

** Latest episode of Beyond the Briefing...
------------------------------------------------------------

I dropped a brand new episode of my podcast, Beyond the Briefing yesterday breaking down the big 5 stories from the news cycle:
1. 2024 update
2. NDAA has 1,426 amendments in the House
3. Latest SCOTUS rulings
4. Cocaine in the White House
5. Hypocrisy from the mainstream media

Subscribe now (https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/beyond-the-briefing/id1584002071?mc_cid=b3372102c7&mc_eid=UNIQID)
https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/beyond-the-briefing/id1584002071?i=1000613523771&mc_cid=b3372102c7&mc_eid=UNIQID

** Stories I’m Reading...
------------------------------------------------------------

Doug Burgum is about to drop hundreds of thousands of dollars on gift cards to qualify for the debate (https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/10/doug-burgum-gift-cards-debate-00105512?mc_cid=b3372102c7&mc_eid=UNIQID) - via Politico

Disney World Hasn’t Felt This Empty in Years (https://www.wsj.com/articles/disney-world-crowds-universal-studios-florida-36b0a579?mc_cid=b3372102c7&mc_eid=UNIQID) - via WSJ

Old yeller: Biden’s private fury (https://www.axios.com/2023/07/10/biden-temper-us-president?mc_cid=b3372102c7&mc_eid=UNIQID) - via Axios

Wounded US Army vet Sam Brown targets vulnerable Nevada Democrat with fresh Senate bid: ‘Out of touch’ (https://www.foxnews.com/politics/wounded-us-army-veteran-sam-brown-targets-vulnerable-nevada-democrat-fresh-senate-bid?mc_cid=b3372102c7&mc_eid=UNIQID) - via Fox News

Study: “Forever chemicals” detected in nearly half of US tap water (https://www.axios.com/2023/07/07/forever-chemicals-tap-water-pfas-study?mc_cid=b3372102c7&mc_eid=UNIQID) - via Axios

Karine Jean-Pierre has directly answered only 2% of Biden scandal questions at press briefings, study finds (https://www.foxnews.com/media/karine-jean-pierre-directly-answered-2-biden-scandal-questions-press-briefings?mc_cid=b3372102c7&mc_eid=UNIQID) - via Fox News

Michigan House Approves Anti-Free Speech Bill: Incorrect Pronouns Could Cost you $10,000 or Jail Time (https://beckernews.com/michigan-house-approves-anti-free-speech-bill-incorrect-pronouns-could-cost-you-10000-or-jail-time-50904/?mc_cid=b3372102c7&mc_eid=UNIQID) - via Becker News

Exclusive: Jim Jordan, House Republicans Launch Investigation Into BlackRock, Vanguard, Others Over ESG Practices (https://dailycaller.com/2023/07/06/jim-jordan-house-republicans-blackrock-vanguard-esg-practices/?mc_cid=b3372102c7&mc_eid=UNIQID) - via Daily Caller

Cocaine Found at White House Was in Different Area Than Initially Stated, Near West Executive Entrance (https://themessenger.com/news/cocaine-found-at-white-house-was-in-different-more-secure-area-than-initially-reported-report?mc_cid=b3372102c7&mc_eid=UNIQID) — via The Messenger

** Don’t forget I’m on Locals...
------------------------------------------------------------
Become a VIP Now! (http://seanspicer.locals.com?mc_cid=b3372102c7&mc_eid=UNIQID)

I announced a little while ago that I’d be developing my new show on Locals and I’m grateful for everyone who has joined me over there to give me feedback. We’re also posting some behind the scenes stuff and other content I don’t put on other social media so make sure you check it out.

In addition to getting feedback on content over there, I’m also posting some exclusive content for my VIPs. As a VIP you get access to all my livestreams, we just did one during Trump’s speech after being indicted, some extra videos and more.

Reminder that with the promo code “NEWSLETTER” you get 1 month free trial.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: “No one is afraid of those nerds”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Back in 2019, a “senior” Democratic source talked some shit about us
saying: “No one is afraid of those nerds. They don't have the ability to
primary anyone.”

Well now we’re in 2023, we’ve re-elected the Squad twice and doubled the
number of progressive champions on that bloc.

This kind of change is only possible because of grassroots supporters like
you, Peter.

We work with candidates from day #1 to take on the establishment and we’re
the only group that recruits working-class people to run against
entrenched members of the Democratic establishment who are out of touch
with the people they represent.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135611?refcode=em20230711-29846&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29846%2E1203867%2E0pwe_q ]Will you make a
$3 contribution right now to help us continue to prove the
Democratic establishment wrong and recruit and elect more leaders into our
bloc?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135611?refcode=em20230711-29846&t=1020&akid=29846%2E1203867%2E0pwe_q ]Donate $3

Together we will continue to fight for the soul of the Democratic Party,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=29846%2E1203867%2E0pwe_q ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=29846%2E1203867%2E0pwe_q ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230711-29846-footer&t=1023&refcode2=29846_1203867_0pwe_q&akid=29846%2E1203867%2E0pwe_q

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=29846%2E1203867%2E0pwe_q

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.
---

Chris Christie is running for President of the United States because he thinks the American people deserve better than a Trump vs. Biden re-match. Simply put, he’s doing this for YOU. You will immediately be asked for YOUR unique input. | | Thank you, Brian Executive Director Tell It Like It Is PAC | Why Chris Christie: Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America. | [PAID FOR BY TELL IT LIKE IT IS PAC. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66356510/416053657/857475129?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWViYjJhNi0zOTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KE6uzdWa860LtUzLyciQNTcN0vzSCLVfzD9j7qwc_Q=)

Team, our planet just had its unofficial hottest day in history. Thousands of cities in America are under heat advisories, and the threat of climate change is here.

**Jared went on Meet the Press NOW recently to discuss what we’re facing:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66356511/416053658/357776745?refcode=JMFC_20230711_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWViYjJhNi0zOTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KE6uzdWa860LtUzLyciQNTcN0vzSCLVfzD9j7qwc_Q=&emci=a7cd9f0f-0e20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0eebb2a6-3920-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6576167) We’ve heard it before: climate change hurts our planet, kills wildlife, and threatens our future.

Peter,

I'm grateful for the opportunities that our nation has given me. With hard work, I was able to start my own business, employ other veterans just like me, and live the American dream with my family.

But I felt the pull to serve again - this time in the United States Senate. **That's why I am running. **

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=620b9c45568f49c8b76d0cd5b56470ad&_e=uoHgOkqTtxPmJRql63TIuzkFI8dsHDOZGBmFr1G5IXNkndgAkN8nP5y0h8I5b2DXB2JmOZHcfU3k8HAZyAKhNNL6oe4hpWQaSPv8xvsRA5NOA6racoBNiTFviXRmlWzPM9dwVGz_HvzLOpr9x4AAzS0EnwBlhJpJIj9tKvhZlVu7lVT_wGp9BW_WOHgXtm-Hvh7wntBqjZ1NxZIJOBEm-jmWbepD2xXm9g75J5TpbvLsjK67_osKkIUyvD8ZYmJ9JQXdYvmp8Y-AAkc9AykBH76O_CEkv_sAHDweZ844sXuczVXiz_kCTl5lF93FMzQB4mCVeH2GzZ-JknoRO45XgnrR1M6_nXulNsfRKqIHCDBkIExC23A41Fh0BlwNuEbWRDXeDeF6vkhIXgIjgjV71A%3D%3D)
[** WATCH NOW **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=620b9c45568f49c8b76d0cd5b56470ad&_e=uoHgOkqTtxPmJRql63TIuzkFI8dsHDOZGBmFr1G5IXNkndgAkN8nP5y0h8I5b2DXB2JmOZHcfU3k8HAZyAKhNNL6oe4hpWQaSPv8xvsRA5NOA6racoBNiTFviXRmlWzPM9dwVGz_HvzLOpr9x4AAzS0EnwBlhJpJIj9tKvhZlVu7lVT_wGp9BW_WOHgXtm-Hvh7wntBqjZ1NxZIJOBEm-jmWbepD2xXm9g75J5TpbvLsjK67_osKkIUyvD8ZYmJ9IcjNpded-HWfs-u4g7C2LJpqhnG0jP8OHdE8ydmZ8F_BSdn8fZ0we1p6pkutJ1lZjXV9Rzgg_As0a-SvhBkNkrMrR0jGtoPTk19uU9Waq3M_5R2TlTDPim44XF73fJucY4h6GNiBHqdG9wNljEhIMA%3D%3D)
As a leader on the field of battle, you need to think about the greatest impact you can make. During my military career, it was defending and protecting our great nation. **Now, I want to represent YOU in the United States Senate.**

[** JOIN THE MISSION **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=620b9c45568f49c8b76d0cd5b56470ad&_e=uoHgOkqTtxPmJRql63TIuzkFI8dsHDOZGBmFr1G5IXNkndgAkN8nP5y0h8I5b2DXB2JmOZHcfU3k8HAZyAKhNNL6oe4hpWQaSPv8xvsRA5NOA6racoBNiTFviXRmlWzPM9dwVGz_HvzLOpr9x4AAzS0EnwBlhJpJIj9tKvhZlVu7lVT_wGp9BW_WOHgXtm-Hvh7wntBqjZ1NxZIJOBEm-jmWbepD2xXm9g75J5TpbvLsjK67_osKkIUyvD8ZYmJ9RVi69-NufHOoSEthJy9X52yYhHVL3mv4IpgWhcqqtbDUWeU56VWOX939q4l4t7DQP-RtCDJGu2OSiNA83z5GnV_0vnCkI15h2FEUyfWosOmgL6ndM64BoMPTGpU03jMeSRPqm_JjShPqN2dL677Tmg%3D%3D)
American citizens are facing tough decisions right now. We're dealing with a crisis at our border, inflation has a stranglehold on our families, and we must fix our education system.

**We have some serious challenges facing our nation. We need serious people to solve them.**

When I was asked to serve - it was a serious decision to do so - **but when your country calls and needs you, you MUST answer. **

Peter,**[now I ask you to join this fight with me.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=620b9c45568f49c8b76d0cd5b56470ad&_e=uoHgOkqTtxPmJRql63TIuzkFI8dsHDOZGBmFr1G5IXNkndgAkN8nP5y0h8I5b2DXB2JmOZHcfU3k8HAZyAKhNNL6oe4hpWQaSPv8xvsRA5NOA6racoBNiTFviXRmlWzPM9dwVGz_HvzLOpr9x4AAzS0EnwBlhJpJIj9tKvhZlVu7lVT_wGp9BW_WOHgXtm-Hvh7wntBqjZ1NxZIJOBEm-jmWbepD2xXm9g75J5TpbvLsjK67_osKkIUyvD8ZYmJ9ZXM1Y9mdYdn7-A6LlBWWl2s_jwN6Nb7YV08_zREMJN-cSp3JxJo2yW3K5lTQLm7a_YELHdCdrzlaHvpcPQz4r730hRLGuUUchTf0q5pBVYnFUqjC0Q78FxtAuj5Arj-VGp0vGjOU5NqE7hod-XCN5w%3D%3D) **

Hooyah,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. **If we don’t take back the Senate in 2024, I worry about what America’s future is going to look like. From believing that biological men can be eligible for women’s sports to trusting Joe Biden with our national security, they’re taking our country down a dangerous path. _And they’re doing it while they rewrite reality in their own woke image._

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: The Freedom Caucus said goodbye. | = | Hi Peter - Have you seen the latest news about Marjorie Taylor Greene? Her Republican colleagues kicked her out of the ultra-right Freedom Caucus - not because she made disgusting comments about the Holocaust, claimed several horrific mass shootings were staged, and blamed the California wildfires on a “space laser” (they stood by her for all of that!)... But because she wasn’t extreme enough for them. It’s absolutely crazy. = = It’s no secret that in order to become Speaker, Kevin McCarthy had to make a lot of deals to secure enough votes. He made a deal with Marjorie Taylor Greene: she would vote for him, and he would give her powerful positions on the House Oversight and Homeland Security committees. Now she is even being ousted from the Republican Freedom Caucus because she is too close to Kevin McCarthy. You really can’t make this stuff up. Look, Peter. I know this feels like a reality show. But it doesn’t have to be this way. We can change the channel by winning my seat and helping Democrats take back control of Congress from extremists like Kevin McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thanks for your support. – Josh *

This grassroots team is incredible, Peter.

With your continued support and overwhelming generosity, Angela’s Maryland
Senate campaign continues to reach new heights the critics never thought
possible.

Despite running against a self-funded, multi-millionaire who has seemingly
unlimited resources, Angela set a Maryland fundraising record and earned
support from every county in Maryland!

And best of all: Peter, it’s all been made possible because of
this incredible grassroots team and your continued support.

So please, take a moment to recognize how far we’ve come. But then let’s
all remember why we’re standing behind Angela in the first place: to elect
a leader who fights for Maryland’s working families, protects safe and
legal abortion access, defends our fundamental right to vote, and
safeguards our democracy from the extremists who’ve tried to tear us
apart.

Yes, we’ve accomplished so much in a short amount of time. But we still
have so much ground left to cover. [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3570?t=1008&amount=25&akid=253%2E52803%2E_Kmv-F ]So, if you’re committed to
supporting Angela for the long haul, please give a grassroots donation of

name: =?utf-8?Q?Vincent=20Cavaleri?=
subject: Help us win locally
body:
You can help us retain vital local seats! | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=901caa21b4&u=47486a4a2ba39cfb527e35ec4&id=2e33ab3281)
---
## Friends,
I hope this correspondence finds you well. I am writing today regarding the state of local governance in progressive-led communities around our region. We’ve seen the carnage playing out in most communities led by extremist candidates; and it’s not something we can take lightly, nor can we ignore. As a local legislator for the past eight years, I have been able to do some amazing things at the local level to maintain our city’s character, charm, and security, while providing a template for other pragmatic local leaders in the region. This has been especially true with public safety ordinances and land use determinations. It goes without saying that I could not do this without you. My successes culminate in your successes. I am up for reelection this year and my opponent is well funded by the progressive machine. We have seen what Olympia is capable of after the 2023 legislative session. Therefore, it’s incredibly important we maintain the seats occupied by the common-sense elected officials we currently have at the local level. I am humbly asking for you to help us in this fight by contributing financially to the Cavaleri for Council campaign. This will ensure our ability to execute a flawless campaign strategy and thus retain our seat on the Mill Creek Council. Please donate today by clicking the button below!
| [Donate Today!](https://cavaleriforcouncil.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47486a4a2ba39cfb527e35ec4&id=264ce45269&e=901caa21b4)
---
In Gratitude,Mill Creek CouncilmanVincent Cavaleri
|

name: Greg Casar
subject: Putting money where our mouths are
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66357812/416058328/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjJhZDYzMy00MTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtuugdkAItqE-aYp31SfYWy9bjnhLgNJfA6mK5FstDQ=&emci=1a2ad633-4120-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1b2ad633-4120-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
I wanted to share some news with you first,** ** Peter,

**Today I introduced an amendment to our military spending bill to ensure our nation’s service members get the affordable, high-quality child care they deserve.**

Let me backup just a bit. This week Congress is debating the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA), the bill that sets our nation’s military budget.****

Each year, Congress funds hundreds of millions of dollars in weapons that are **_not_** requested by the Pentagon. _But Congress continues to fail to meet the child care needs of military families—like the tens of thousands that call San Antonio and the surrounding area home._
_[**Chip in to show your support for our amendment!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66357813/416058329/-1326867951?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjJhZDYzMy00MTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtuugdkAItqE-aYp31SfYWy9bjnhLgNJfA6mK5FstDQ=)_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66357814/416058330/-1326867951?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjJhZDYzMy00MTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtuugdkAItqE-aYp31SfYWy9bjnhLgNJfA6mK5FstDQ=)
Peter, as someone who represents tens of thousands of military families, I know that military readiness means more than just stockpiling more weapons. It also means investing in the _people_ of the military and their families.

But right now extremist Republicans are putting forward proposals to spend more money on weapons that the Pentagon isn’t asking for, instead of providing basic child care that these families deserve. It’s the definition of government waste.

**That’s why, along with Rep. Joaquin Castro (TX-20), I’m introducing an amendment to allow the Dept. of Defense to transfer funds to childcare programs for servicemembers and their families.** This would help get military kids off waitlists and into child care programs. My amendment would allow this transfer of funds away from excess weapons and toward military families.

This is going to be an uphill fight, but with your support we can get this done.
