clean_body: I wanted to share some news with you first, Peter, Today I introduced an amendment to our military spending bill to ensure our nation’s service members get the affordable, high-quality child care they deserve. Let me backup just a bit. This week Congress is debating the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA), the bill that sets our nation’s military budget.** Each year, Congress funds hundreds of millions of dollars in weapons that are not requested by the Pentagon. But Congress continues to fail to meet the child care needs of military families—like the tens of thousands that call San Antonio and the surrounding area home. = = Peter, as someone who represents tens of thousands of military families, I know that military readiness means more than just stockpiling more weapons. It also means investing in the people of the military and their families. But right now extremist Republicans are putting forward proposals to spend more money on weapons that the Pentagon isn’t asking for, instead of providing basic child care that these families deserve. It’s the definition of government waste. That’s why, along with Rep. Joaquin Castro (TX-20), I’m introducing an amendment to allow the Dept. of Defense to transfer funds to childcare programs for servicemembers and their families. This would help get military kids off waitlists and into child care programs. My amendment would allow this transfer of funds away from excess weapons and toward military families. This is going to be an uphill fight, but with your support we can get this done. = = Thank you for supporting military families, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

clean_body: Bernie is the outsider we need in the Senate and is the key to taking back the Senate majority for Republicans. | | Fellow conservative, During my time working for President Trump, I saw firsthand the mess Washington D.C. insiders have made of our country. We need to stop electing career politicians and send more outsiders to represent us in Congress, and that’s why I’m proud to share with you that I’m endorsing Bernie Moreno to become the next conservative U.S. Senator from Ohio. Bernie Moreno is the outsider we need in the Senate and is the key to taking back the Senate majority for Republicans. Fellow conservative, Bernie needs your help if he's going flip Ohio and help Republicans take back the Senate. When he was five years old, Bernie's family came to the United States from Colombia. His family believed in the American Dream and they bet it all to start a new life. From there, he grew up to become a successful executive in the auto industry and has created thousands of jobs in Ohio. Now, Bernie is running to lead the fight for freedom and take on the far left and political insiders that have sent our nation down the wrong path. He has the qualifications and the experience to be an effective United States Senator right away. He recognizes that the things that make our country great are under assault by Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer and Sherrod Brown. Bernie is the candidate Ohio needs to fight for the American freedoms that brought his family here. He knows first-hand how great the America Dream is and will fight to make sure we don't lose it. Ohio’s Democrat Senator and career Washington insider Sherrod Brown is vulnerable, and one of Republicans' top targets to defeat in 2024. This is one of our best opportunities to take back the Senate majority, and I believe Bernie can get the job done. Thank you, Ambassador Richard Grenell Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Team Schiff
subject: Each cent adds up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Spare change adds up quickly and each cent counts.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2950%2E5257348%2EvfPDzf)
Derek,
_Can you guess how much spare change you have lying around your house? How many quarters, dimes, and nickels are stuck between the seats in your car? Have you cashed in the jar or piggy-bank full of pennies?_
What if we told you that **you can donate that spare change to our grassroots-powered campaign and make all the difference in our strategy to send Adam to the U.S. Senate?**
Spare change adds up quickly and each cent counts.
We’re not asking you to roll those coins up and ship them to the Schiff HQ or to drive to the bank and cash them in. It’s much simpler than that, and it will take fewer than 40 seconds. [**Sign up for this new donation tool, GoodChange, to start donating your spare change to our campaign for Senate.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2478?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230711_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2950%2E5257348%2EvfPDzf)
[SIGN UP TODAY >>](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2478?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230711_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2950%2E5257348%2EvfPDzf)
---
Once you sign up and make a transaction, your amount rounds up to the nearest dollar. That rounded-up spare change is your donation to our campaign. It’s that simple. (You could even say _it just makes cents!_).
[**After crunching the numbers with our finance team, we know that if just a small portion of folks who receive this email sign up to donate their change, we will surpass our first mid-month fundraising goal of Q3! Can you sign up today? >>**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2478?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230711_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2950%2E5257348%2EvfPDzf)

name: Katy Frisch
subject: why Boebert won
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
During the last campaign, we got out-spent by Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs – by millions and millions of dollars.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66358015/416059358/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWU4ZDE5Yi00NDIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xw_JVg3-hEmKG1mPrzBbJVufEz0ABkmEQDrieekvyag=&emci=379c8839-4320-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e1e8d19b-4420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66358016/416059359/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWU4ZDE5Yi00NDIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xw_JVg3-hEmKG1mPrzBbJVufEz0ABkmEQDrieekvyag=&emci=379c8839-4320-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e1e8d19b-4420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
After the 2022 election, my husband Adam Frisch and I went to Washington for “freshman orientation” for new members of Congress.
We still didn’t know whether or not Adam had defeated Lauren Boebert. We were in the middle of a recount – and Adam was down by only a few hundred votes.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66358017/416059360/1610638071?refcode=em20230711pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=e1e8d19b-4420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWU4ZDE5Yi00NDIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xw_JVg3-hEmKG1mPrzBbJVufEz0ABkmEQDrieekvyag=)
Ultimately, though, after all the votes were counted, Adam came up short. We lost to Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country.
Now, Adam’s running again in 2024 – and this time, I know he can win. But first, we have to fix the reason he so narrowly lost in 2022.
**During the last campaign, we got out-spent by Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs – by millions and millions of dollars.** It wasn’t that we didn’t put in the work (we did). It wasn’t that Adam didn’t have a positive vision for the district (he does). We were just drowned out in millions of dollars of lie-filled attack ads.
You see, Lauren Boebert is one of the best fundraisers in Congress. Her extreme, far-right base funnels millions to her campaign. But Adam doesn’t take money from corporate PACs – never has, never will.
**If Adam’s going to be able to finish the job and defeat Lauren Boebert this time, we cannot afford to get out-spent again – and we’re counting on your help now.**
**We’ve set a goal to raise another $200,000 before our mid-July deadline, but right now, we still have $82,701 left to raise.**

clean_body: During the last campaign, we got out-spent by Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs – by millions and millions of dollars. Hello, After the 2022 election, my husband Adam Frisch and I went to Washington for “freshman orientation” for new members of Congress. We still didn’t know whether or not Adam had defeated Lauren Boebert. We were in the middle of a recount – and Adam was down by only a few hundred votes. = Ultimately, though, after all the votes were counted, Adam came up short. We lost to Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. Now, Adam’s running again in 2024 – and this time, I know he can win. But first, we have to fix the reason he so narrowly lost in 2022. During the last campaign, we got out-spent by Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs – by millions and millions of dollars. It wasn’t that we didn’t put in the work (we did). It wasn’t that Adam didn’t have a positive vision for the district (he does). We were just drowned out in millions of dollars of lie-filled attack ads. You see, Lauren Boebert is one of the best fundraisers in Congress. Her extreme, far-right base funnels millions to her campaign. But Adam doesn’t take money from corporate PACs – never has, never will. If Adam’s going to be able to finish the job and defeat Lauren Boebert this time, we cannot afford to get out-spent again – and we’re counting on your help now. We’ve set a goal to raise another $200,000 before our mid-July deadline, but right now, we still have $82,701 left to raise. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’ll admit, the first campaign was hard – for the whole family. But we’re all-in to kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress next November. Thank you for being on this journey with us, Katy ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado.
